# Daily AI Native Product GitHub Radar - 2026-06-24

数据窗口：2026-06-21T00:00:00Z to 2026-06-24T02:20:00Z; GitHub Search API queries over created/pushed AI agent, MCP, LLM app, RAG, browser/code/voice agent, workflow, assistant, copilot, Claude Code, and Codex terms.

信息来源：GitHub Search API, GitHub repository metadata API, raw GitHub README audit for selected repositories. No clone, install, Docker, or local runtime audit was performed.

关键假设：Prioritize repositories with visible product surfaces, runnable UI/CLI/API/MCP/Skill paths, clear user workflows, documentation, screenshots/demos, CI/tests/examples, and current activity in the 72-hour window. Repeated prior radar picks and mature baselines are downgraded unless they show a new product change. Runnability is README/API-level only. Type-level skips include prompt collections, course/tutorial repos, model-training or paper reproduction repos, one-file demos, thin SDK wrappers, suspicious free-API/SEO repositories, abnormal star spikes without matching product evidence, and private-workspace dumps.

## Top Projects

### 1. [HKUDS/AgentSpace](https://github.com/HKUDS/AgentSpace)
- 分类：Agent Workspace / Human-Agent Team UI
- AI Native Product Score：89
- 做什么：A TypeScript workspace that positions humans, Claude Code, Codex, OpenClaw, Hermes, and other agents as one team in a shared product surface.
- 面向谁：Teams experimenting with multi-agent coding/research workflows that need a visible coordination layer rather than isolated terminal sessions.
- AI native 点：The product value is the workspace itself: routing work to multiple agents, exposing agent state, and giving humans a common command surface for agent collaboration.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-22; 311 stars and 29 forks in the API snapshot; pushed 2026-06-23; README includes logo, bilingual docs link, agent badges, Node/PostgreSQL requirements, and hosted homepage.
- 可运行性判断：README-level audit only. TypeScript app with explicit Node.js 24 and PostgreSQL 16 requirements plus product homepage; no local install/run was performed.
- 建议动作：Priority follow-up: run a minimal local workspace and compare its multi-agent routing with current terminal-based Codex/Claude Code workflows.

### 2. [Johell1NS/browser-search](https://github.com/Johell1NS/browser-search)
- 分类：Agent Skill / Web Search and Browser Capability
- AI Native Product Score：86
- 做什么：A self-hosted browser-search skill that teaches agents to search with SearXNG, browse with Camofox, and handle hostile web pages through CloakBrowser.
- 面向谁：Developers using OpenCode, Claude Code, Cursor, OpenClaw, or similar agents who want web search/browsing without a hosted research API dependency.
- AI native 点：It packages web search and browser operation as an installable agent skill, moving “deep research” from external SaaS into the agent runtime’s capability layer.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-22; 135 stars and 15 forks; pushed 2026-06-23; README has multilingual docs, logo, problem framing, and concrete tool stack.
- 可运行性判断：README-level audit only. JavaScript repo with self-hosted SearXNG/Camofox/CloakBrowser architecture and skill-oriented docs; no local run performed.
- 建议动作：Test as a research skill inside one coding-agent workflow; measure setup friction, browser reliability, and source capture quality.

### 3. [iart-ai/motion-skills](https://github.com/iart-ai/motion-skills)
- 分类：Agent Skill Pack / Motion Graphics Production
- AI Native Product Score：84
- 做什么：A library of 50 motion/video skills and 14 installable packs for AI coding agents to create kinetic typography, explainers, charts, short-form video, WebGL, and Manim outputs.
- 面向谁：Content teams and agent builders who want repeatable motion-design workflows inside Claude Code/Codex-style agents.
- AI native 点：The core artifact is not a model, but craft encoded as agent-native procedures with render/screenshot/verify loops for visual production.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-22; 114 stars and 6 forks; README includes animated showcase, installable packs, audience segmentation, and iart.ai product tie-in.
- 可运行性判断：README-level audit only. Skill-pack repo with examples/showcase and installable pack framing; no render pipeline was executed locally.
- 建议动作：Use one pack to generate a 15-second product explainer and evaluate whether the verify loop reduces visual cleanup time.

### 4. [tianjiangqiji/nova-image-studio](https://github.com/tianjiangqiji/nova-image-studio)
- 分类：AI Image Workbench / Self-hosted Creative Tool
- AI Native Product Score：83
- 做什么：A self-hosted AI image generation workbench with custom models, Agent mode, infinite canvas, prompt reverse-engineering, prompt plaza, GIF generation, PWA, and realtime tasks.
- 面向谁：Individual creators and small teams that want a controllable image-generation studio with model/API configuration rather than a hosted-only tool.
- AI native 点：It turns image generation into a persistent workbench with agent mode, task scheduling, model routing, and multi-device UI instead of single prompt calls.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-21; 67 stars and 16 forks; pushed 2026-06-24; README shows v3.1.0, Next.js 16/React 19, screenshots for desktop/mobile and Agent mode, plus hosted demo.
- 可运行性判断：README-level audit only. Next.js/React frontend plus lightweight Node/SQLite/WebSocket backend are documented; no local install/run performed.
- 建议动作：Run the hosted demo first, then self-host locally to inspect model configuration, task queue, and Agent mode ergonomics.

### 5. [begin0808/LiveCaption](https://github.com/begin0808/LiveCaption)
- 分类：Local Voice/ASR Assistant / Bilingual Captioning
- AI Native Product Score：81
- 做什么：A local real-time browser audio transcription and bilingual subtitle translation system using Chrome tab capture, SenseVoice, Ollama, and DeepSeek.
- 面向谁：Learners, meeting participants, accessibility users, and privacy-sensitive teams that need live captions/translation without uploading audio.
- AI native 点：Combines local ASR, VAD, streaming transport, and LLM translation into an always-on assistive workflow for live media.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-21; 60 stars and 14 forks; pushed 2026-06-22; README has online manual, platform badges, technical flow, and concrete latency claims.
- 可运行性判断：README-level audit only. Chrome extension plus Python/FastAPI-style backend signals are visible; no extension/backend run performed.
- 建议动作：Try it on a known bilingual video and check latency, subtitle segmentation, Ollama/DeepSeek fallback, and privacy boundary.

### 6. [GenseeAI/gensee-crate](https://github.com/GenseeAI/gensee-crate)
- 分类：Coding Agent Runtime Safety / Sidecar Dashboard
- AI Native Product Score：80
- 做什么：A local-first Rust sidecar for long-horizon runtime safety, provenance, lineage, and real-time enforcement around unmodified coding agents such as Claude Code and Codex.
- 面向谁：Developers and platform teams running coding agents on real machines who need monitoring and control without replacing the agent client.
- AI native 点：It treats agent tool calls, memory, skills, and user requests as runtime events that need policy enforcement and after-the-fact provenance.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-23; 19 stars; pushed 2026-06-24; README shows macOS-first alpha, Rust stable, web dashboard, CLI, and agent-side enforcement framing.
- 可运行性判断：README-level audit only. Rust repo with dashboard path and local sidecar positioning; no build/run performed.
- 建议动作：High-value safety experiment: run beside one Codex/Claude Code session and verify what events are observed and where enforcement happens.

### 7. [y-times-y/y](https://github.com/y-times-y/y)
- 分类：Desktop Coding Agent App / Self-modifying Workspace
- AI Native Product Score：79
- 做什么：A macOS desktop coding-agent app for Claude Code, Codex, and future CLI-native agents, with a protected surface that can modify the app itself and roll back unsafe changes.
- 面向谁：Power users of CLI coding agents who want a desktop chat workspace with isolated sessions and side-by-side agent use.
- AI native 点：The app’s product hook is malleability: the software can reshape its own UI through agent-generated changes while preserving a safety/rollback boundary.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-23; 24 stars; pushed 2026-06-24; README includes desktop screenshot, video attachment, macOS download badge, and concrete things to try.
- 可运行性判断：README-level audit only. Release DMG is linked and desktop product surface is visible; no macOS app launch performed.
- 建议动作：Download in a sandboxed local context and test isolated workspaces plus self-modification rollback on a trivial UI change.

### 8. [norika1207-lab/Code-Duo](https://github.com/norika1207-lab/Code-Duo)
- 分类：Multi-agent Coding Workbench / Claude + Codex
- AI Native Product Score：78
- 做什么：A Python coding workbench that puts Claude and Codex in one window, supports routing prompts to either or both, streams work, hands off partial changes, and watches for false completion claims.
- 面向谁：Developers comparing Claude Code and Codex or trying to add peer-review dynamics to coding-agent work.
- AI native 点：Turns two agent CLIs into a supervised collaboration pattern with cross-review, cost visibility, and watchdog behavior.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-21; 37 stars and 8 forks; README has cover image, problem statement, keyboard routing, side-by-side agent workflow, and no-API-key positioning.
- 可运行性判断：README-level audit only. Python app/product repo with docs assets and CLI-driver positioning; no local run performed.
- 建议动作：Run a single small bugfix through Both mode and compare diff quality, elapsed time, and failure detection against one-agent baseline.

### 9. [Francis1998/nexus-llm-router](https://github.com/Francis1998/nexus-llm-router)
- 分类：LLM Gateway / Task-aware Routing Middleware
- AI Native Product Score：76
- 做什么：A Python OpenAI-compatible LLM routing middleware for task-aware model selection, fallback, cost optimization, budget control, audit, and production safety.
- 面向谁：AI infrastructure teams operating multi-model apps where cost, latency, fallback, and routing rationale matter.
- AI native 点：It productizes model choice as runtime infrastructure, letting AI apps call one endpoint while policies decide which model should handle each task.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-21; 31 stars; pushed 2026-06-23; README shows CI/tests badge, 34 passing tests, use-case GIF, and clear production pain points.
- 可运行性判断：README-level audit only. Python 3.11+ project with OpenAI-compatible API framing and tests badge; no server run performed.
- 建议动作：Use as gateway experiment for one internal LLM app: route cheap/simple prompts differently and log quality/cost changes.

### 10. [pranjalbhatia710/descartes-mcp](https://github.com/pranjalbhatia710/descartes-mcp)
- 分类：MCP Planning Guardrail / Assumption Audit
- AI Native Product Score：74
- 做什么：An MCP server that recursively challenges plan decisions, grounds answers in evidence or user input, and returns a refined plan with unresolved decisions separated.
- 面向谁：Agent users who want less hallucinated planning before letting an agent execute code, research, or operational tasks.
- AI native 点：It externalizes skeptical review as an MCP tool, giving agents a structured “doubt loop” before execution.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-21; 22 stars; README has CI badge, landing page, CLI epigraph, sibling project link, and detailed loop description.
- 可运行性判断：README-level audit only. Python MCP server with CI and landing page signals; no MCP client integration was performed.
- 建议动作：Try before a risky coding-agent task; compare generated assumptions and unresolved questions against the usual plan-only flow.

## Watchlist

### [fancydirty/mediary-scout](https://github.com/fancydirty/mediary-scout)
- 分类：Vertical Agent App / Cloud-drive Media Library
- Score：72
- 简述：Agent-driven media library for 115/Quark cloud drives with Next.js/Postgres/self-hosted badges and live demo signal.
- AI native 点：Agent layer is tied to a vertical media management workflow rather than generic chat.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-21; 24 stars; pushed 2026-06-23; README has CI, demo, self-hosted badge.
- 可运行性判断：README-level only; live demo and self-hosted stack visible.
- 建议动作：Watch for importer reliability and agent actions beyond metadata organization.

### [Simpl3x3/ESEILANE](https://github.com/Simpl3x3/ESEILANE)
- 分类：GraphRAG / Knowledge Graph Engine
- Score：71
- 简述：High-performance knowledge graph engine for AI/LLM/GraphRAG workloads.
- AI native 点：Could become infrastructure for agent memory and GraphRAG, but product workflow is not yet clear enough for Top.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-23; 92 stars; homepage and multi-language topics present.
- 可运行性判断：README not deeply audited in this run.
- 建议动作：Recheck when examples, API docs, and agent integration paths are clearer.

### [NVIDIA-BioNeMo/bionemo-agent-toolkit](https://github.com/NVIDIA-BioNeMo/bionemo-agent-toolkit)
- 分类：Domain Agent Toolkit / Life Sciences
- Score：70
- 简述：NVIDIA BioNeMo skills/toolkit for turning general agents into life-science experts.
- AI native 点：Vertical skills are a strong product pattern, but domain dependency and runnability need deeper audit.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-23; 42 stars; pushed 2026-06-23; NVIDIA org signal.
- 可运行性判断：README not deeply audited in this run.
- 建议动作：Watch for concrete notebooks, skill manifests, and agent-client integration.

### [Cheiineeey/netease-music-mcp](https://github.com/Cheiineeey/netease-music-mcp)
- 分类：Consumer MCP / Music Assistant
- Score：68
- 简述：MCP server for NetEase Cloud Music song requests, lyric sync, and playlist management.
- AI native 点：Shows MCP moving from developer tools to personal media control.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-22; seen in created-search output with 10 stars and recent push.
- 可运行性判断：Not present in the second parsed candidate set; only first search output and metadata snapshot were used.
- 建议动作：Recheck next run and verify auth/session handling before promoting.

## Skip Reasons
- [FieldofStrawberries/claude-code-fable-5-free-app](https://github.com/FieldofStrawberries/claude-code-fable-5-free-app)：Suspicious SEO/free-API naming around Claude/Fable terms; product credibility and legitimacy are weak despite stars.
- [ikarma/claude-mythos-ai-anthropic-desktop-app](https://github.com/ikarma/claude-mythos-ai-anthropic-desktop-app)：Keyword-stuffed Claude/free/pro theme repository; likely marketing/SEO bait rather than reliable runnable product.
- [Reyzowter/Hello-Agents](https://github.com/Reyzowter/Hello-Agents)：Course/tutorial repository for building agents from scratch; useful learning material but outside product radar scope.
- [vancyland/DataClaw0](https://github.com/vancyland/DataClaw0)：Coming-soon dataset/model project with code/weights promised later; no current runnable product surface.
- [liushuangls/go-anthropic](https://github.com/liushuangls/go-anthropic)：Thin SDK/API wrapper for Anthropic; useful infrastructure but not a standalone AI-native product workflow.
- [Sakana-AI-labs/Sakana-Fugu](https://github.com/Sakana-AI-labs/Sakana-Fugu)：Model/orchestration research artifact and heavily copied theme today; not enough independent product surface for Top.

类型级跳过：prompt collection、awesome/list、课程/tutorial、paper reproduction、benchmark-only、thin SDK wrapper、只有 README/coming soon 无代码或无安装入口的仓库。

## 今日趋势观察

1. Agent 产品正在补“工作空间层”：AgentSpace、Code Duo、y 都把多 agent 协作、可见状态、回滚/监督做成用户界面，而不仅是单个 CLI。
2. Agent 技能包继续产品化：browser-search 与 motion-skills 都把复杂能力拆成可安装、可迁移、可验证的 agent skill。
3. 安全与治理从外围文档进入 runtime：Gensee Crate、nexus-llm-router、descartes-mcp 分别覆盖运行时事件、模型路由、执行前假设审计。
4. 垂直工作台的 AI native 形态更清晰：Nova Image Studio 和 LiveCaption 有真实 UI、实时任务/本地推理/多模型配置，比泛泛 agent demo 更接近用户价值。

## 今日建议动作

- 优先试跑 AgentSpace 或 Code Duo：用同一个小型代码修改任务比较多 agent 工作空间是否真的降低协调成本。
- 做 browser-search 最小接入：让一个 coding agent 搜索、打开、引用 3 个网页，并记录失败点。
- 对 Gensee Crate 做安全侧车实验：观察 Codex/Claude Code 工具调用事件是否能形成可用审计链。
- 把 Nova Image Studio 作为“本地 AI 创意工作台”复刻样本，重点看任务队列、模型路由、Agent 模式和 PWA 体验。

## 数据观察窗口和关键假设

- run_date：2026-06-24
- 观察窗口覆盖 2026-06-21 到 2026-06-24 上午，重点看 created/pushed/updated 与 star/fork/README 信号。
- 本轮做过实时 GitHub API 和 README 审计；未做 clone、install、Docker、GUI 或 CLI 本地运行。
- 分数体现产品形态、文档完整度、可运行入口、场景清晰度和当前活跃，不等同于长期质量或安全背书。

# Daily AI Native Product GitHub Radar - 2026-06-23

数据窗口：2026-06-21T02:16:01Z to 2026-06-23T02:22:11Z; GitHub Search API queries over created/pushed/updated AI agent, MCP, LLM app, RAG, browser/code/voice agent, workflow, copilot, Claude Code, and Codex terms.

信息来源：GitHub Search API, GitHub repository metadata API, GitHub contents/README API. No clone, install, Docker, or local runtime audit was performed.

关键假设：Prioritize repositories with visible product surfaces, runnable UI/CLI/API/MCP/Skill paths, clear user workflows, documentation, screenshots/demos, Docker/examples/tests, and current activity in the 48-hour window. Mature baselines such as Codex, OpenCode, Dify, Mastra, and repeated prior radar picks are downgraded unless they show a new product change. Runnability is README/API-level only. Type-level skips include prompt collections, course/tutorial repos, model-training or paper reproduction repos, one-file demos, thin SDK wrappers, abnormal star spikes without matching product evidence, and private-workspace dumps.

## Top Projects

### 1. [sricola/drydock](https://github.com/sricola/drydock)
- 分类：Coding Agent Sandbox / macOS VM Isolation
- AI Native Product Score：87
- 做什么：Runs Claude Code or OpenAI Codex against a disposable macOS VM copy of a repo and returns only an approved git diff.
- 面向谁：Developers and teams that want autonomous coding-agent runs without exposing real API keys, network egress, push credentials, or the host filesystem.
- AI native 点：Treats coding agents as untrusted executors and moves the product value to containment, short-lived budget-capped tokens, network allowlists, and diff-only approval.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-15; 6 stars; pushed 2026-06-23; README has threat model, demo breach GIF, release badge, docs, examples, tests, Go modules, Makefile, and dedicated SECURITY/THREAT_MODEL files.
- 可运行性判断：macOS 26+ Apple Silicon oriented; repo includes cmd/config/demo/docs/examples/image/internal/tests and Go build structure. No local VM run performed.
- 建议动作：High-priority experiment: run one disposable Codex task, verify blocked egress/key isolation, and compare its approval loop with existing permission-prompt workflows.

### 2. [Servosity/msp-skills](https://github.com/Servosity/msp-skills)
- 分类：Vertical MSP MCP Servers / Agent Skills
- AI Native Product Score：85
- 做什么：A local-first catalog of MCP servers and Claude/Codex-compatible skills for MSP tools such as PSA, RMM, backup, M365, HubSpot, and HaloPSA.
- 面向谁：Managed service providers and internal IT teams that want agents to answer cross-tool operational questions from local mirrored data.
- AI native 点：Turns many MSP SaaS tools into a governed agent tool layer with local SQLite mirrors, connector catalog, plain-English workflows, and per-skill demos.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-05-26; 8 stars; pushed 2026-06-23; README claims 55 live connectors, demo assets, catalog.json, docs, skills, tools, gitleaks/semgrep config, and security docs.
- 可运行性判断：Repo has .claude-plugin, catalog.json, docs, skills, tools and Go code structure; README links demo walkthroughs. No connector credentials or local run used.
- 建议动作：Use as a vertical MCP quality benchmark; inspect one connector end to end for auth, local mirror schema, rate-limit behavior, and skill contracts.

### 3. [s0912758806p/agentic-sop-to-work](https://github.com/s0912758806p/agentic-sop-to-work)
- 分类：Claude Code Plugin / SOP-to-Agent Workflow
- AI Native Product Score：84
- 做什么：A Claude Code plugin that decomposes human SOPs into deterministic, gated, human-approved agentic workflows.
- 面向谁：Operators and automation builders who need repeatable agent workflows with explicit gates instead of open-ended autonomous runs.
- AI native 点：Uses single-tool skills, explicit I/O contracts, per-step gates, branch/map orchestration, draft outputs, and stop-hook regression guards to make SOP execution auditable.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-09; 191 stars, 19 forks; pushed 2026-06-23; README includes plugin marketplace install, flow GIF, bilingual docs, plugin metadata and skills directory.
- 可运行性判断：Install path is documented with Claude Code plugin marketplace commands; repo exposes .claude-plugin and plugins/agentic-sop-kit. No plugin execution performed.
- 建议动作：Try converting one internal checklist into a gated workflow; evaluate whether the run.py/orchestration contract is portable to Codex skills.

### 4. [dnotitia/akb](https://github.com/dnotitia/akb)
- 分类：Agent Knowledge Base / MCP Memory Vault
- AI Native Product Score：83
- 做什么：A Git-backed organizational knowledge base for agents with docs, tables, files, URI graph, hybrid search, MCP access, and Claude/Codex plugins.
- 面向谁：Teams that want a permissioned alternative to Confluence/Notion that agents can read/write through MCP while preserving source-grounded memory.
- AI native 点：Makes knowledge operations agent-native: session capture, wiki ingestion, structured tables, cited answers, bearer-token MCP access, and lifecycle hooks for coding-agent memory.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-05-07; 60 stars, 3 forks; pushed 2026-06-23; README shows npm package akb-mcp, Claude/Codex plugin marketplace commands, backend/frontend/deploy/eval/templates, Docker compose variants.
- 可运行性判断：Docker compose files, backend/frontend, deploy config and npm MCP proxy are present; README includes live demo and plugin commands. No self-hosted run performed.
- 建议动作：Run a small vault with prior radar artifacts and test whether Codex can ingest, query, and update cited project cards without memory drift.

### 5. [vellum-ai/vellum-assistant](https://github.com/vellum-ai/vellum-assistant)
- 分类：Personal AI Assistant / Memory and Proactivity
- AI Native Product Score：82
- 做什么：A personal assistant stack with multiple memory types, identity files, hourly proactive loops, app actions, clients, plugins, gateway, and evaluations.
- 面向谁：Users and builders who want an always-on personal assistant with durable preferences, channels, and local-first memory behavior.
- AI native 点：Its core product is memory and agency: episodic/semantic/procedural/prospective/shared memories, source attribution, local embeddings, onboarding-generated identity, and proactive hourly checks.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-02-07; 744 stars, 114 forks; pushed 2026-06-23; repo includes assistant, clients, credential-executor, gateway, plugins, skills, evals, docs, setup.sh and architecture docs.
- 可运行性判断：README points to docs/community and appears to support setup scripts and multiple components; no local setup or credential audit performed.
- 建议动作：Watch closely; before adopting, audit permission boundaries, credential-executor behavior, and whether memory extraction remains user-controllable.

### 6. [avibe-bot/avibe](https://github.com/avibe-bot/avibe)

## Watchlist

- [farion1231/cc-switch](https://github.com/farion1231/cc-switch) - Cross-agent Desktop Manager - Score 73 - Tauri desktop manager for Claude Code, Claude Desktop, Codex, Gemini CLI, OpenCode and related agents; huge visible star count but needs provenance/growth validation. 建议：Keep on watchlist until star/download provenance and release artifacts are independently validated.

- [openclaw/openclaw](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw) - Very large star count and strong product surface, but abnormal-looking growth/branding signal needs independent provenance validation before using as today’s discovery signal.
- [openai/codex](https://github.com/openai/codex) - Important baseline coding agent and currently active, but already known and covered by the user’s actual workflow; not a fresh radar discovery for today.
- [anomalyco/opencode](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode) - Mature open coding-agent baseline with strong activity; excluded to preserve today’s focus on newer surrounding product layers.
- [langgenius/dify](https://github.com/langgenius/dify) - High-quality production workflow platform, but mature and repeatedly visible; no new 24-72h product-specific signal was audited in this run.
- [microsoft/hve-core](https://github.com/microsoft/hve-core) - Mostly component/instructions/prompts/skills collection; valuable methodology, but not a single runnable AI-native product surface for this radar.

类型级跳过：prompt collection、awesome/list、课程教程、模型训练/论文复现、个人工作区 dump、thin SDK wrapper、单 README 营销仓库、异常星标 spike、未说明授权来源的“免费 API/桌面客户端”均降权或排除。

## 今日趋势观察

1. Agent 安全从“权限弹窗”继续往执行隔离和调用防火墙移动：drydock、AgentGuard、Reef、ClawQL 都在不同层处理 agent 的执行边界。
2. 垂直 MCP/Skills 开始从通用 connector 走向行业工作流：MSP Skills 和 Rails Informant 的价值在于把真实业务对象、错误、工单、备份和 SaaS 数据变成 agent 可操作面。
3. Agent 记忆正在组织化：AKB、Vellum Assistant、Thane 都强调长期记忆，但真正差异在权限、来源、生命周期 hook 和可撤销性。
4. 多 agent/多工具使用者需要控制台：Avibe、Claudewerk、CC Switch、Ghost Tab 类项目都在处理“从哪里看、管、批准 agent 工作”的问题。
5. 新仓库的叙事强度明显上升，异常星标、夸大 OS/substrate 叙事和个人工作区 dump 需要继续降权。

## 今日建议动作

- 第一优先级：试跑 drydock 的一次低风险 Codex task，重点验证短期 token、deny-by-default 网络和 diff-only 回传。
- 第二优先级：用 AKB 或 MSP Skills 选择一个小数据源，测试 agent 读写/查询是否真的能形成结构化、可引用的业务记忆。
- 第三优先级：把 AgentGuard/ClawQL/Reef 拆成一张治理层地图，区分执行隔离、工具调用审批、API spec 压缩和多租户调度的位置。
- 低成本观察：Vellum、Avibe、Claudewerk、CC Switch 都进入“agent work surface”长期跟踪，但先审计 auth/credential/session 边界。

Recently updated older repos enter Top only with clear product surface and current activity. Runnability is README/API-level unless stated; no repository was cloned, installed, Docker-run, or locally launched.

## Top Projects

### 1. [umacloud/umadev](https://github.com/umacloud/umadev)

- 面向谁：Builders using coding agents for full project delivery who need PRD, architecture, UI/UX review, implementation gates, QA evidence and delivery artifacts.
- AI native 点：It wraps agent coding with deterministic process state, gates, audit traces, knowledge/rules and proof packs, treating agent output as something that needs operational governance.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-19; 75 stars, 29 forks; pushed 2026-06-22; README is bilingual and detailed; repo has Cargo workspace, npm distribution, docs, spec, tests, knowledge and website.
- 可运行性判断：README documents `npm install -g umadev`, `umadev init`, `umadev`; source build via Cargo is documented. This run did not install or launch it.
- 建议动作：High-priority trial on a small empty app: test whether the stage gates produce useful artifacts or mainly add ceremony.

## 今日趋势观察

1. Agent 产品的主战场从“更强的 coding agent”转到“agent 工作面”：UmaDev 管流程，agmsg 管协作，roborev 管质量回路，amux/lightcode/cmux 管多会话。
2. 本地优先正在具体化为 SQLite、tmux、git hooks、Tauri desktop、Rust/Go 单二进制、技能目录同步和本地语音/TTS，而不是泛泛的 privacy 叙事。
3. Agent 技能生态开始产品化：Skills Hub 管分发与同步，Blue Spec 把安全 hardening 包成命令流，MetaHarness 试图把 harness/MCP/发布一起生成。
4. 成本与上下文治理继续升温：Token-Goat、Ctxo、Better Code Review Graph、ax 都在减少重复读取、盲搜、失忆和不可追踪经验。
5. 语音与移动端开始围绕 coding agents 补体验：Heard 做输出播报，AgentWire/Hermes Relay 做远程输入和控制，但要特别看权限边界。

## 今日建议动作

- 第一优先级：选 `agmsg` 做一次双 agent code-review handoff 实验，成本低、对现有 Codex 工作流最贴近。
- 第二优先级：用 `roborev` 在 throwaway worktree 跑一次 post-commit review，重点看误报率与 `fix/refine` 是否安全。
- 第三优先级：把 `Skills Hub` 作为技能目录治理候选，但先只读扫描，不让它写入真实技能目录。
- 保守跟踪：UmaDev、BitFun、MetaHarness 叙事强、范围大，先审计权限、生成物质量和实际运行稳定性，再投入长实验。

runs.markdownReport:
# Daily AI Native Product GitHub Radar - 2026-06-21

数据窗口：2026-06-19T02:30:03Z to 2026-06-21T02:48:00Z；覆盖上次自动化后约 48 小时，重点看 GitHub Search API created/pushed/updated 与 README/目录结构审计。

信息来源：GitHub Search API, GitHub repository API, GitHub contents/README API; no clone/install/local runtime audit.

关键假设：Prioritize runnable UI/CLI/API/MCP products with clear user workflows, installation paths, screenshots/demos, tests or release artifacts. Recently updated older repos may enter Top only when they show strong product shape or current activity. Runnability is README/API-level unless explicitly stated; no repository was cloned or executed locally.

## Top Projects

### 1. [tsouth89/conduit](https://github.com/tsouth89/conduit)
- 分类：Local MCP Gateway / Desktop Manager
- AI Native Product Score：88
- 做什么：A local Tauri + React MCP gateway that lets multiple AI coding tools share one managed MCP server catalog, profile scope, auth, audit log, and lazy tool discovery surface.
- 面向谁：Developers and small teams using Claude, Cursor, VS Code, Codex, and other AI tools with overlapping MCP server setups.
- AI native 点：It treats MCP sprawl as an agent-operating problem: collapse many server tools into a small searchable meta-tool surface, centralize credentials in the OS keychain, and scope tool access per agent profile.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-19; 5 stars, 1 fork; pushed 2026-06-21; README includes screenshots, demo GIF, governance claims, Tauri app, gateway binary, docs, scripts, package files, and src-tauri/source tree.
- 可运行性判断：README describes desktop app + conduit-gateway architecture. Root contains package.json, src, src-tauri, docs, scripts, screenshots, and Vite/Tauri config. This run did not build or launch it.
- 建议动作：High-priority local trial: install/build, connect two real MCP servers, then test lazy discovery, per-client profile scoping, destructive-tool hiding, and audit logs.

### 2. [TaewoooPark/Agent-Blackbox](https://github.com/TaewoooPark/Agent-Blackbox)
- 分类：Coding Agent Observability / Session Replay
- AI Native Product Score：85
- 做什么：A local-first flight recorder and context-efficiency profiler for OpenCode runs, rendering agent work as replayable operational graphs and measuring context/token cost.
- 面向谁：Power users running coding agents who need to understand what an agent read, changed, ran, delegated, blocked on, and spent.
- AI native 点：Moves agent UX from transcript-only review to observed execution telemetry: session maps, context bill scoring, and suggested fixes back into AGENTS.md.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-16; 7 stars; pushed 2026-06-21; npm package referenced; README has multilingual docs, dashboard screenshots, one-command quickstart, packages/apps monorepo, tests, and Vite/Vitest config.
- 可运行性判断：README quickstart: `npx @taewooopark/agent-blackbox up`; requires Node 20+ and OpenCode. Source tree includes apps, packages, package.json, tests and docs.
- 建议动作：Run against a disposable OpenCode session and compare its measured session map against raw logs; watch whether Codex support appears beyond OpenCode.

### 3. [momoraul/Lupen](https://github.com/momoraul/Lupen)
- 分类：Claude Code / Codex Cost Receipts
- AI Native Product Score：84
- 做什么：A macOS app that recomputes Claude Code and Codex session spend from raw logs, breaking cost down by provider, session, turn, step, skill group, sub-agent, and attachments.
- 面向谁：Mac users with real Claude Code/Codex usage who need auditable cost attribution and searchable/resumable session history.
- AI native 点：Cost control becomes a native agent surface: pricing is recomputed and diffed from logs instead of trusted from coarse provider totals, while attachments and sub-agent costs stay attributable.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-17; 19 stars, 4 forks; pushed 2026-06-21; README includes signed DMG/Homebrew install, demo GIF, screenshots, CI/release badges, tests and Xcode project.
- 可运行性判断：Install path: `brew install --cask momoraul/lupen/lupen` or signed DMG. Requires macOS 26 on Apple Silicon; not locally launched in this run.
- 建议动作：Track closely and test when macOS compatibility is available; the product maps directly to agent budget governance and retrospective analysis.

### 4. [openwong2kim/wmux](https://github.com/openwong2kim/wmux)
- 分类：Windows Multi-agent Terminal / MCP Browser Workbench
- AI Native Product Score：83
- 做什么：A native Windows tmux-style terminal for running Claude Code, Codex CLI and Gemini side by side, with panes, agent-to-agent delegation, browser automation, MCP tools, approvals and durable sessions.
- 面向谁：Windows developers who want multi-agent coding workflows without WSL, plus terminal/browser control in one cockpit.
- AI native 点：The product is built around agent coordination: pane-addressed delegation, browser MCP tools, approval gates, fleet view, stuck-agent inbox, and persistent supervised agent panes.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-03-20; 179 stars, 34 forks; pushed 2026-06-21; README has screenshots, install via winget/choco/Setup.exe, release/download badges, architecture/docs/examples/integrations.
- 可运行性判断：README quickstart: `winget install openwong2kim.wmux`; source includes Electron/Vite app, package files, install.ps1, integrations and examples. Not run on this macOS host.
- 建议动作：Keep as Windows-side benchmark for multi-agent terminals; compare its attention/approval model with tmux-agent-state and local Codex desktop workflows.

### 5. [PerpetualSoftware/pad](https://github.com/PerpetualSoftware/pad)
- 分类：Local-first Project Management for Agents
- AI Native Product Score：82
- 做什么：A single-binary local project-management system with CLI, web UI, SQLite storage, Docker support, and an AI skill/onboarding workflow for agent-era project state.
- 面向谁：Solo developers and small teams who want Linear/Jira-like project context that local agents can read and operate without cloud accounts.
- AI native 点：It makes project memory operational for agents: `pad init`, local workspace collections, `/pad onboard` playbook, and codebase-aware conventions/roles/playbooks.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-03-26; 79 stars, 7 forks; pushed 2026-06-21; README has screenshots, website/docs/changelog, CI/release/container badges, Dockerfiles, Go modules, docs and internal source tree.
- 可运行性判断：Quickstart: `brew install PerpetualSoftware/tap/pad`, `pad init`, `pad server open`; Docker and Makefile present. Not installed in this run.
- 建议动作：Trial as a local control plane for a small repo: compare pad collections/playbooks against existing AGENTS.md + issue tracker notes.

### 6. [Forsy-AI/agent-apprenticeship](https://github.com/Forsy-AI/agent-apprenticeship)
- 分类：Agent Experience / Training Signal Exchange
- AI Native Product Score：80
- 做什么：A CLI and dataset-oriented system for agent apprenticeship loops, reusable lessons, mentor modes, execution traces, and task-level learning signal exchange.
- 面向谁：Researchers/builders trying to turn real agent work into reusable experience, task traces, mentor review loops, and training/evaluation assets.
- AI native 点：It frames agent work as compounding experience: apprentice agents, mentor agents/humans, loop artifacts, task value estimates, lessons, and execution traces.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-19; 532 stars; pushed 2026-06-20; README exposes npm install/CLI quickstart, ecosystem/examples/schemas/seed_dataset tree and claims 500+ tasks, 495 lessons, 1000+ traces.
- 可运行性判断：README quickstart: `npx agent-apprenticeship init` or `npm install -g agent-apprenticeship`; root has examples/schemas/seed_dataset. No local install/run audit.
- 建议动作：Treat as promising but validate hard: inspect npm package, schema quality, dataset licensing, and whether loops produce useful work artifacts rather than only high-level narrative.

### 7. [joeseesun/qiaomu-llm-mcp](https://github.com/joeseesun/qiaomu-llm-mcp)
- 分类：Local Multi-model MCP Gateway
- AI Native Product Score：78
- 做什么：A local MCP gateway for multiple LLM providers, API keys, model routing, multi-model comparison, pipelines, HeavySkill-style discussion, and safe Claude Code CLI calls.
- 面向谁：Chinese/English Codex and Claude users juggling multiple providers such as Z.ai, DeepSeek, OpenAI-compatible APIs and Claude Code CLI.
- AI native 点：MCP becomes the neutral tool surface for model choice and multi-model orchestration, while keys stay local and only key presence is exposed to clients.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-19; 40 stars, 2 forks; pushed 2026-06-19; README is detailed, bilingual, lists concrete MCP tools, env examples, pyproject, src/examples/docs tree.
- 可运行性判断：Requires Python 3.10+ and an MCP client; clone + install path documented. Registry in `~/.config/qiaomu-llm/registry.json`, macOS Keychain support mentioned. Not locally run.
- 建议动作：Compare with Trinity/Claude-code-router style tools; run a small provider registry with fake or low-risk keys and verify key handling plus `qllm_compare` output quality.

### 8. [MikkoParkkola/trvl](https://github.com/MikkoParkkola/trvl)
- 分类：Vertical Travel MCP / CLI
- AI Native Product Score：77
- 做什么：A Go travel MCP server and CLI with one smart travel router, 66 compatibility aliases, 22 providers, no API keys, demos, status/dashboard, and token-efficient tool-list design.
- 面向谁：AI assistant users who want agents to plan travel and developers integrating travel intent into MCP-compatible assistants.
- AI native 点：It converts a broad travel workflow into a compact agent tool surface with typed provider failure states, partial-result degradation, provider observability, and a tiny tools/list footprint.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-04-02; 41 stars, 5 forks; pushed 2026-06-21; README has CI/release/download badges, demo GIF, live browser demo, provider count, docs, Dockerfile and MCP install links.
- 可运行性判断：Single Go binary; README points to `trvl mcp install`, VS Code/Cursor install links, Dockerfile and live demo. Not executed locally.
- 建议动作：Use as a vertical MCP quality benchmark: inspect how it compresses 66 aliases into one smart router and how it reports provider blocking/rate limits.

### 9. [markhuangai/dense-mem](https://github.com/markhuangai/dense-mem)
- 分类：Governed Agent Memory / MCP Server
- AI Native Product Score：76
- 做什么：A self-hosted HTTP MCP memory server with provenance, typed claims/facts, conflict detection, embeddings, recall, team isolation, REST/OpenAPI, PostgreSQL and Neo4j.
- 面向谁：Teams building durable agent memory where evidence, conflicts, permissions and recall quality need more governance than vanilla vector RAG.
- AI native 点：Separates host LLM judgment from memory state and returns structured outcomes with evidence/provenance, aiming to stop memory from silently rewriting facts.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-04-13; 28 stars, 4 forks; pushed 2026-06-21; README has hosted demo, Docker/GHCR, video intro, OpenAPI/MCP badges, examples, tests, web, migrations and cmd tree.
- 可运行性判断：Hosted demo available; Dockerfiles and Go modules present; MCP served at `/mcp`. Not self-hosted in this run.
- 建议动作：Watch and run a small memory-conflict experiment against prior radar project facts; compare with EGC/mind-mem/local-rag-core.

### 10. [lishuangqiang/backend-agent-resume-scout](https://github.com/lishuangqiang/backend-agent-resume-scout)
- 分类：Codex Skill / Career Project Scout
- AI Native Product Score：73
- 做什么：A Codex Skill workflow for backend and AI-agent job seekers that searches GitHub, filters project candidates, requires source evidence, and generates resume project packages.
- 面向谁：Chinese backend/AI-agent job seekers who need project selection and resume wording grounded in source-code evidence.
- AI native 点：It productizes a skill workflow: candidate search, business-value filtering, shortlist confirmation, local source verification, and resume/interview artifact generation.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-20; 16 stars, 2 forks; pushed 2026-06-20; README has strong positioning, asset branding, Apache badge, nested skill directory and clear workflow.
- 可运行性判断：Intended as a Codex Skill under `backend-agent-project-selector`; README describes Markdown/PDF outputs and source verification. Not installed or invoked.
- 建议动作：Good复刻样本 for domain-specific Codex skills; inspect the nested skill contract before trusting outputs as resume advice.

## Watchlist

- [CortexPrism/cortex](https://github.com/CortexPrism/cortex) - AI Agent OS - Score 72 - Self-hosted Deno agent OS with providers, memory, tools, web UI, sandboxing and routing. Claims are broad, repo looks substantial, but created 2026-06-14 and needs deeper run audit. 建议：Watch; only promote after install/security-model audit.
- [yotamleo/Himmel](https://github.com/yotamleo/Himmel) - Claude Code Harness / Guardrails - Score 71 - Orchestrated Claude Code harness with hooks, guardrails, Jira CLI, handovers, PR-gated workflow and overnight shifts. 建议：Watch; compare with existing AGENTS.md practices and avoid adopting full complexity prematurely.
- [linkwut-create/local-rag-core](https://github.com/linkwut-create/local-rag-core) - Local-first RAG Core / MCP - Score 69 - Headless local knowledge library with CLI/HTTP/read-only MCP, SQLite FTS5, optional vector/rerank backends and strict source attribution. 建议：Watch for first external adoption and package maturity.
- [itssosunny/im-not-strange-ai](https://github.com/itssosunny/im-not-strange-ai) - Korean AI-writing Humanizer Plugin - Score 68 - Claude Code/Codex plugin for detecting and smoothing Korean AI-style writing while preserving meaning. 建议：Watch as a language-specific content skill pattern; outside today core agent-infra theme.

## Skip Reasons

- [dikurdikur/palmier-pro-windows](https://github.com/dikurdikur/palmier-pro-windows) - AI video editor + MCP story is product-shaped, but repo metadata/topics include suspicious `code-leak`; only release ZIP and sources folder were observed. Needs provenance validation before promotion.
- [zyn26/minimax-m3-desktop-app-free-api](https://github.com/zyn26/minimax-m3-desktop-app-free-api) - Desktop client for free model access is runnable-looking, but the project is unofficial, access method may be unstable, and positioning leans toward model/API access workaround rather than durable AI-native product.
- [Karovia/fullstack-ai-agent-roadmap](https://github.com/Karovia/fullstack-ai-agent-roadmap) - Course/roadmap/tutorial corpus rather than runnable product surface.
- [johnmn3/mmllm](https://github.com/johnmn3/mmllm) - Huge repository size and vague description; likely model/training code or experimental corpus rather than a clearly runnable product surface.
- [Mysticchiwharf98/Rust-Quantum-NextGen-Aim-Assist](https://github.com/Mysticchiwharf98/Rust-Quantum-NextGen-Aim-Assist) - Game aim-assist / optimizer style repository with AI wording; not appropriate for product radar and likely policy/provenance risk.

类型级跳过：prompt collection、awesome/list、课程教程、模型训练/论文复现、单 README 营销仓库、thin SDK wrapper、异常星标 spike、未说明授权来源的“免费 API/桌面客户端”均降权或排除。

## 今日趋势观察

1. MCP 从“更多 server”转向“本地网关和治理层”：Conduit、qiaomu、trvl、Dense-Mem 都在压缩工具面、隔离凭据、记录调用或输出可解释状态。
2. Coding-agent 周边产品继续从生成能力转向可观测性、成本、审计和注意力管理：Agent-Blackbox 记执行轨迹，Lupen 算账，wmux 管多 agent pane。
3. 本地优先仍是高频卖点，但今天更具体：SQLite/OS keychain/本地日志/单二进制/本地 MCP，而不是泛泛强调 privacy。
4. 垂直 MCP 开始出现成熟质量标准：trvl 的 typed provider failures、token-efficient tool list、status dashboard 比普通 “API wrapper MCP” 更像产品。
5. 新仓营销叙事变强，尤其 “agent OS / apprenticeship / free model desktop” 类项目，需要把星标和 README 叙事同真实源码、包发布、授权边界分开看。

## 今日建议动作

- 第一优先级：试跑 Conduit，连接两个 MCP server，验证 lazy discovery、profile scoping、keychain 和 audit log。
- 第二优先级：用 Agent-Blackbox 或 Lupen 选一个做 agent 成本/执行回放实验，和现有 Codex 自动化日志对照。
- 第三优先级：拆 Pad 的 `/pad onboard` 信息架构，看本地项目管理是否能替代一部分 AGENTS.md + 手写项目笔记。
- 低成本观察：qiaomu、Dense-Mem、local-rag-core 都可以进入“本地 agent substrate”趋势跟踪，但先不要把它们当稳定基础设施。

runs.markdownReport:
# Daily AI Native Product GitHub Radar - 2026-06-20

数据窗口：2026-06-18T02:59:06Z to 2026-06-20T06:19:27Z；重点看 GitHub API created:>2026-06-17、pushed:>2026-06-17、topic:mcp、topic:ai-agent，并逐项打开候选 README 做产品形态审计。

信息来源：GitHub Search API、GitHub repository API、GitHub raw README。今天 GitHub API 在 shell 内可用；本轮没有 clone、install、Docker、本地启动或真实 MCP/插件运行审计。

## Top Projects

1. ksimback/looper - Agent Loop Design / Claude Code Skill - Score 86 - 设计、审阅和结构化 agent loop，生成 RUN_IN_SESSION.md、loop.yaml、loop.resolved.json 和可选 Python runner。2026-06-18 新建，68 stars、8 forks。
2. abluva-research/mcp-trust-plane - MCP Trust / Policy Filter Plane - Score 84 - 为 MCP tool call 提供 pre-request/post-response filter，覆盖 SQL Guard、PII redaction、row limit、schema validation、rate limit 和 54 个 provider guard。2026-06-18 新建，54 stars、10 forks。
3. cloudflare/security-audit-skill - Coding Agent Security Audit Skill - Score 83 - Cloudflare 发布的六阶段 coding-agent 安全审计 skill，输出 REPORT.md、FINDINGS-DETAIL.md、findings.json 并做独立验证。2026-06-18 新建，57 stars。
4. osntak/careermate - MCP-first Local Career Workspace - Score 81 - 本地职业申请工作台，dashboard + SQLite + MCP tools，把 Claude/Codex 作为职业资料和求职流程的操作界面。2026-06-18 新建，README 完整但当前 0 stars。
5. Ciucky/no-numb - Claude Code Learning Gate / Plugin - Score 78 - Claude Code Stop hook 在写文件后生成理解测验，默认答对才继续。2026-06-18 新建，20 stars。
6. Gentleman-Programming/tmux-agent-state - Multi-agent Session Monitor / tmux Adapter - Score 76 - 在 tmux tab bar 显示 opencode、pi、Claude Code、Codex 的 working/blocked/idle 状态。2026-06-19 新建，20 stars。
7. electron-stagewright/electron-stagewright - Electron Automation MCP / Desktop Agent Testing - Score 75 - 面向 AI agents 的 Electron MCP server，提供 snapshot/click/type/expect/trace/production validation。2026-06-20 活跃更新，pre-alpha。
8. keepwhatworks/trinity - Cross-provider Local Council / Personal Model Routing - Score 74 - 本地 Claude/Codex/Gemini council 与 personal lens 层，通过 MCP/CLI/Chrome extension 捕获和路由多模型判断。

## Watchlist

- Avishekdevnath/helpdesk-assistant - Vertical Helpdesk Chrome Extension - Score 70 - Bengali helpdesk reply drafting extension，场景明确但需验证代码质量。
- kensaurus/mushi-mushi - LLM-native Feedback / Auto-fix Layer - Score 69 - 用户反馈、session replay、draft PR auto-fix 方向值得观察。
- hectormr206/lifeos - Local-first Personal AI OS - Score 68 - Voice + vision + memory + Qwen 本地助手，需硬件和模型运行审计。
- Ub207/vault-sync - AI Employee / Business Ops Automation - Score 67 - AI Employee + HITL ops 自动化叙事明确，需验证真实 workflow。

## Skip Reasons

- openclaw/openclaw - star/fork 数异常，需额外验证。
- n8n-io/n8n - 成熟基线，不是今天的新 discovery。
- Significant-Gravitas/AutoGPT - 成熟基线，持续活跃但不符合今日优先级。
- abdokhalil5555/AgenticDeFi-Trainer - 更像训练/演示项目。
- loulanyue/dream-xi-ai - 概念强于可运行证据。

## 今日趋势观察

1. Coding-agent 周边产品从更强 agent 转向更可靠的人机控制面。
2. MCP 安全治理开始产品化，filter plane 与 agent 审计 skill 同时出现。
3. 本地优先仍是强主题，AI 作为操作界面或决策层，数据留在本机。
4. Electron/desktop agent tooling 是 browser automation 之后的新空位。
5. 低 star 新仓叙事很强，必须提高本地运行和可审计代码面的权重。

## 今日建议动作

- 试跑 Looper 设计本 radar 自动化 loop spec。
- 用 mcp-trust-plane 做只读 SQL MCP filter 实验。
- 拆解 CareerMate 的本地 DB + MCP + dashboard 应用边界。
- 观察 Cloudflare security-audit-skill 的 structured findings schema。

runs.markdownReport:
# Daily AI Native Product Radar - 2026-06-18

数据窗口：2026-06-16 10:30 to 2026-06-18 10:30 Asia/Shanghai; GitHub repository pages/README/release metadata accessed live on 2026-06-18, plus prior radar memory to avoid repeating 2026-06-17 picks.

信息来源：Live GitHub repository pages for dyad-sh/dyad, musistudio/claude-code-router, simstudioai/sim, nanobrowser/nanobrowser, supermemoryai/supermemory, screenpipe/screenpipe, mcp-use/mcp-use, humanlayer/humanlayer, plus watchlist repos and prior local automation memory.

关键假设：
- Shell network access to GitHub API failed in this environment due proxy/DNS; repository evidence is from live GitHub web pages fetched through the browser tool and prior automation memory.
- No repository was cloned, installed or executed locally; runnability is README/release/source-tree based.
- Scores prioritize AI-native product surface and direct user workflow over pure framework quality.
- Some projects are mature but have fresh release/activity signals inside the data window; repeated mature baselines were demoted unless the current signal was strong.
- Skip reasons list only real repositories; type-level exclusions are captured in this assumptions/trend section.

## Top Projects (8)

### 1. [dyad-sh/dyad](https://github.com/dyad-sh/dyad)
- 分类: Local AI App Builder / Vibe Coding Desktop
- AI Native Product Score: 91/100
- 做什么: Local, open-source AI app builder positioned as a v0/Lovable/Bolt alternative running on the user machine.
- 面向谁: Power users and small teams who want AI app generation without hosted builder lock-in.
- AI native 点: AI generation is the primary creation surface, while local execution, BYO keys, project files, Electron app packaging and benchmarks make it closer to a product than a prompt demo.
- 增长/活跃信号: GitHub page showed 20.7k stars, 2.5k forks, 1,526 commits, 227 issues, 9 PRs and latest release v1.4.0 on Jun 17, 2026.
- 可运行性判断: README advertises Mac/Windows downloads, no signup, BYO AI keys, docs/contributing/security, plus source tree with apps, packages, e2e-tests and Storybook.
- 建议动作: Try the desktop build first; evaluate whether it can replace hosted app builders for small internal tools.

### 2. [musistudio/claude-code-router](https://github.com/musistudio/claude-code-router)
- 分类: Claude Code Model Router / Coding Agent Infrastructure
- AI Native Product Score: 88/100
- 做什么: Routes Claude Code requests to different providers/models with transformers, logging, dynamic model switching and GitHub Actions support.
- 面向谁: Developers already using Claude Code who want cost, latency, long-context, local-model, or CI routing control.
- AI native 点: It treats coding-agent traffic as an infrastructure plane: route by task type, subagent, provider, environment and workflow instead of binding one agent UI to one model endpoint.
- 增长/活跃信号: GitHub README is deep and operational, covering model routing, multi-provider support, transformations, CLI model management, subagent routing and CI integration.
- 可运行性判断: Install path is explicit: install Claude Code, then `npm install -g @musistudio/claude-code-router`, configure `~/.claude-code-router/config.json`, and run via `ccr`/activated env vars.
- 建议动作: Run a small cost-routing experiment: Sonnet for planning, cheaper/local model for background or repetitive tasks.

### 3. [simstudioai/sim](https://github.com/simstudioai/sim)
- 分类: AI Agent Workspace / Workflow Orchestration
- AI Native Product Score: 86/100
- 做什么: Open-source AI workspace for teams to build, deploy and manage agents conversationally, visually, or with code.
- 面向谁: Teams automating internal workflows across many integrations and model providers.
- AI native 点: The product surface is an agent workforce layer: visual/conversational/code authoring, deployment, integrations, model orchestration and team management.
- 增长/活跃信号: GitHub page describes 1,000+ integrations, every major LLM, Apache-2.0 licensing, docs/community links and an existing project card in the Yuque radar base.
- 可运行性判断: Repository exposes docs, examples and deployment-oriented structure; current run did not clone locally, so runtime friction still needs direct audit.
- 建议动作: Keep as workflow-builder benchmark; compare against n8n/Activepieces for agent-native collaboration and deployment depth.

### 4. [nanobrowser/nanobrowser](https://github.com/nanobrowser/nanobrowser)
- 分类: Browser Agent / Local Chrome Extension
- AI Native Product Score: 85/100
- 做什么: Open-source Chrome extension for AI-powered web automation with a local multi-agent planner/navigator setup.
- 面向谁: Individuals and operators who need browser task automation while keeping credentials and model keys local.
- AI native 点: It wraps browsing as a multi-agent workflow with planner/navigator roles, self-correction, local execution, configurable model assignment and task history.
- 增长/活跃信号: GitHub page showed 13.3k stars, 1.4k forks, 368 commits, 47 issues and 22 PRs; README has demo GIF, Chrome Web Store path, manual release path and source build path.
- 可运行性判断: Install from Chrome Web Store, load latest zip manually, or build via `pnpm install` and `pnpm build`; supports OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Ollama, Groq, Cerebras and compatible providers.
- 建议动作: Run a controlled browser-agent benchmark on GitHub research and form workflows; inspect failure recovery and credential safety.

### 5. [supermemoryai/supermemory](https://github.com/supermemoryai/supermemory)
- 分类: Agent Memory / Context Engine
- AI Native Product Score: 84/100
- 做什么: Memory and context engine plus app/API/local runtime for persistent AI assistant memory, RAG, profiles and connectors.
- 面向谁: AI app builders and heavy AI-tool users who need cross-session memory without building vector/RAG plumbing.
- AI native 点: Memory, profile, hybrid RAG, connector sync, MCP, plugins and local runtime are packaged as a first-class context layer for agents and assistants.
- 增长/活跃信号: GitHub page showed 27.2k stars, 2.4k forks, 1,721 commits, 6 issues and 12 PRs; README claims top memory benchmark results and supports Claude Desktop, Cursor, VS Code, Claude Code, OpenCode, OpenClaw and Hermes.
- 可运行性判断: Has app, MCP quick install, npm/pip SDKs, `curl -fsSL https://supermemory.ai/install | bash`, `npx supermemory local`, local server at `localhost:6767`, and hosted API docs.
- 建议动作: Pilot as a shared memory layer for Codex/Claude workflows; focus on privacy, project scoping and stale-memory correction.

### 6. [screenpipe/screenpipe](https://github.com/screenpipe/screenpipe)
- 分类: Personal Context Capture / MCP Memory
- AI Native Product Score: 82/100
- 做什么: Local desktop/CLI system that records screen/audio context and exposes it to AI assistants through MCP.
- 面向谁: Users who want AI assistants to recall what they saw, said or heard during work, meetings and app usage.
- AI native 点: It turns personal computer history into an agent-readable context substrate with local storage, desktop app, CLI and MCP query tools.
- 增长/活跃信号: GitHub page showed 19.3k stars, 1.8k forks, 10,350 commits and latest Screenpipe App v2.5.47 release on Jun 17, 2026.
- 可运行性判断: README gives desktop app download, `npx screenpipe record`, and `claude mcp add screenpipe -- npx -y screenpipe-mcp@latest`; MCP works with Claude Desktop, Cursor, VS Code/Cline/Continue.
- 建议动作: Experiment on meeting/work recap only with explicit privacy boundaries; validate local indexing cost and retrieval precision.

### 7. [mcp-use/mcp-use](https://github.com/mcp-use/mcp-use)
- 分类: Full-stack MCP Apps / Server Framework
- AI Native Product Score: 80/100
- 做什么: Framework for building MCP Apps and MCP Servers for ChatGPT, Claude and AI agents, with inspector and deployment path.
- 面向谁: Developers creating tool servers or interactive MCP Apps for agent hosts.
- AI native 点: It moves MCP beyond tool JSON into app UX, inspector-driven debugging, deployment, metrics/logs and coding-agent skills.
- 增长/活跃信号: GitHub page showed 958 commits and README links to npm, PyPI, docs, online inspector, MCP cloud deployment and coding-agent skill install.
- 可运行性判断: Quickstart is `npx create-mcp-use-app@latest`; TypeScript and Python docs are linked; examples and docs folders are present.
- 建议动作: Use for a small MCP App prototype with UI payload, then compare against MCP-UI-Org/mcp-ui.

### 8. [humanlayer/humanlayer](https://github.com/humanlayer/humanlayer)
- 分类: Coding Agent IDE / Human-in-the-loop Orchestration
- AI Native Product Score: 79/100
- 做什么: CodeLayer open-source IDE and HumanLayer SDK for orchestrating AI coding agents on hard problems in complex codebases.
- 面向谁: Engineering teams trying to scale Claude Code/opencode/Codex-style agents while keeping human checkpoints.
- AI native 点: The core product claim is agent orchestration: workflows, human-in-the-loop approvals, IDE surface and team-scale coding-agent operations.
- 增长/活跃信号: GitHub README positions CodeLayer as an open-source IDE built on Claude Code; topics include codex, opencode, human-in-the-loop, agents and claude-code.
- 可运行性判断: Repository has app/SDK source and Apache-2 licensing; this run did not perform install, so it remains a high-interest but needs-run audit pick.
- 建议动作: Put into a direct-run audit against vibe-kanban/open-swe: can it manage multi-step repo work better than plain Claude Code sessions?

## Watchlist (4)

- [ArcadeAI/arcade-mcp](https://github.com/ArcadeAI/arcade-mcp) - Agent Authorization / MCP Tool Framework - Score 75: MCP server framework and tool-development library from Arcade, relevant to agent action auth and enterprise tool capability. 建议：Watch closely; promote after checking OAuth/policy examples and local server path.
- [MCP-UI-Org/mcp-ui](https://github.com/MCP-UI-Org/mcp-ui) - MCP UI SDK - Score 73: UI over MCP with TypeScript/Ruby/Python packages for interactive MCP experiences. 建议：Use as SDK reference when testing mcp-use.
- [cloudflare/agents](https://github.com/cloudflare/agents) - Agent Deployment Runtime - Score 72: Cloudflare framework to build and deploy agents that hibernate when idle and wake on demand. 建议：Watch as deployment substrate; not Top because it is framework infrastructure.
- [rowboatlabs/rowboat](https://github.com/rowboatlabs/rowboat) - AI Coworker with Memory - Score 70: Open-source AI coworker with memory; product direction matches persistent teammate trend. 建议：Watch and audit before promotion.

## Skip Reasons

- [MCP-UI-Org/mcp-ui](https://github.com/MCP-UI-Org/mcp-ui): Strong MCP UI SDK, but latest release evidence is older than the 24-72h window; kept in Watchlist rather than Top.
- [cloudflare/agents](https://github.com/cloudflare/agents): Important deployment substrate, but framework/infrastructure shape is less product-specific than today’s Top picks.
- [rowboatlabs/rowboat](https://github.com/rowboatlabs/rowboat): Promising AI coworker direction, but current run did not capture enough runnable README details for a Top score.
- [ArcadeAI/arcade-mcp](https://github.com/ArcadeAI/arcade-mcp): Highly relevant to agent authorization, but today’s evidence was more framework/funding signal than audited product workflow.
- [openai/codex](https://github.com/openai/codex): Core baseline coding agent, but not a new discovery for this radar window; use as benchmark instead of repeating Top slot.

## 今日趋势观察

1. Local-first agent products are strengthening: Dyad, Nanobrowser, Supermemory local and Screenpipe all emphasize local execution, BYO keys, local data or desktop extension UX.
2. Coding-agent infrastructure is splitting into routing, orchestration and memory/context layers rather than only terminal chat UIs.
3. MCP is shifting from connector count toward interactive app surfaces, inspection, deployment and persistent personal context.
4. Runnability bar is rising: the strongest projects now show desktop downloads, Chrome Web Store paths, npm/pip/CLI installs, MCP add commands or one-command local runtimes.
5. Privacy remains a product differentiator for personal agents: screen history, browser credentials and memory state all require explicit local-first claims and audit paths.

## 今日建议动作

- 第一优先级：试跑 Dyad 桌面版，验证本地 app builder 是否能完成一个真实小工具闭环。
- 第二优先级：用 claude-code-router 做一次模型路由实验，记录成本、延迟和任务质量。
- 第三优先级：用 Nanobrowser 跑固定网页任务，观察 planner/navigator 自纠错能力。
- 第四优先级：在 Supermemory 或 Screenpipe 里只做低敏个人上下文实验，先确认隐私边界。

## 数据观察窗口和审计状态

- 数据窗口：2026-06-16 10:30 to 2026-06-18 10:30 Asia/Shanghai; GitHub repository pages/README/release metadata accessed live on 2026-06-18, plus prior radar memory to avoid repeating 2026-06-17 picks.
- 实时仓库审计：已做 GitHub 页面/README/release 元数据审计；未做 clone/install/local run。
- 外部趋势假设：agent 产品正在从“单一聊天/代码生成”走向本地工作台、浏览器执行、持久记忆、MCP UI 和模型路由。

runs.trendObservations: Agent products are moving from generic assistants into local-first personal/team memory, app-bridge automation, agentic commerce, coding-agent lifecycle plugins, and safety/provenance wrappers. The strongest fresh product shapes are still small, low-star repos, so runnability and concrete workflow matter more than star count today.
runs.assumptions: Prioritize product-shaped repositories with runnable UI/CLI/API, concrete user scenarios, examples or clear install paths. Exclude pure lists, prompt collections, paper/model training repos, thin wrappers, and SEO-like repos. # Daily AI Native Product Radar - 2026-06-17

数据窗口：2026-06-14 至 2026-06-17 10:35 CST；重点使用 GitHub Topic 页（ai-agent、mcp、llm、rag、claude-code）按最近更新排序，并抽查可打开的仓库页。已做实时仓库审计：是，限网页层；未 clone、未安装、未运行。

## Top Projects

### 1. [Tianzeyui/brainPlus](https://github.com/Tianzeyui/brainPlus)
- 分类：Agent Platform / Extensible Desktop Runtime
- AI Native Product Score：84
- 做什么：Open-source AI Agent platform with React/TSX and HTML plugin development modes, built-in APIs, multi-project support, MCP tools, and a sandbox engine.
- 面向谁：Developers and power users who want an extensible local agent platform rather than a single chat app.
- AI native 点：The core product surface is an agent ecosystem: plugins, MCP tools, sandboxed execution, and multi-project agent workspaces.
- 增长/活跃信号：GitHub ai-agent topic showed it as recently updated on Jun 15, 2026 with 41 stars and TypeScript implementation.
- 可运行性判断：Topic metadata indicates Electron/TypeScript/plugin/MCP/sandbox architecture; repository page fetch was unstable, so install depth still needs direct audit.
- 建议动作：Create a project card and watch closely; next run should inspect README/install scripts or clone if network allows.

### 2. [soeltanakbar/opentulpa](https://github.com/soeltanakbar/opentulpa)
- 分类：Personal AI Agent / Self-hosted Assistant
- AI Native Product Score：82
- 做什么：Self-hosted personal AI agent that remembers user data and builds custom tools through chat commands over Telegram or an API.
- 面向谁：Individuals who want a persistent personal assistant with memory and tool-building behavior on their own server.
- AI native 点：Memory and tool creation are first-class product loops, with chat commands acting as the interface for extending the assistant.
- 增长/活跃信号：GitHub ai-agent topic listed it as updated Jun 15, 2026 with self-hosted, personal-assistant, automation, multimodal, RAG, LangGraph and agentic tags.
- 可运行性判断：Python project shape with Telegram/API promise; repository page fetch was unstable, so Docker/API setup requires follow-up audit.
- 建议动作：Track as a personal-agent OS candidate; verify setup and memory model before promotion.

### 3. [BeluyOff/agorio](https://github.com/BeluyOff/agorio)
- 分类：Agentic Commerce / Shopping Agent
- AI Native Product Score：80
- 做什么：Toolkit for agents to find merchants, explore products, and complete purchases using open commerce protocols.
- 面向谁：Builders experimenting with shopping agents, x402/agentic-commerce flows, and autonomous purchase UX.
- AI native 点：The product premise is not search UI, but agent-initiated merchant discovery and checkout across open commerce/payment protocols.
- 增长/活跃信号：GitHub ai-agent topic listed it as updated Jun 15, 2026 with TypeScript, UCP, ACP, checkout, commerce, Gemini, x402/payment-related tags.
- 可运行性判断：Likely SDK/tooling surface; topic metadata is strong but README/API examples still need direct inspection.
- 建议动作：Add to trend map; monitor for working merchant catalog demos and payment safety constraints.

### 4. [SujoyRoy9/claude-apple-bridges](https://github.com/SujoyRoy9/claude-apple-bridges)
- 分类：Claude Code App Bridge / macOS Automation CLI
- AI Native Product Score：78
- 做什么：Swift CLI tools connecting Claude Code skills to Apple Reminders, Calendar, Contacts, Notes, Mail, and tmux.
- 面向谁：macOS users who want Claude Code to operate local Apple productivity apps with explicit command-line tools.
- AI native 点：Bridges agent skills into native personal data/apps, turning the assistant into an automation layer over local Apple workflows.
- 增长/活跃信号：GitHub MCP topic listed it as updated Jun 15, 2026; repository page shows 3 stars, 43 commits, Swift source files, Makefile and test.sh.
- 可运行性判断：README provides macOS requirements, executable usage examples for reminders/calendar/mail/notes/tmux, and native permission notes; no release published yet.
- 建议动作：Experiment candidate: try read-only list commands first, then evaluate permissions and safety before write actions.

### 5. [costajohnt/oss-autopilot](https://github.com/costajohnt/oss-autopilot)
- 分类：Open Source Contribution Agent / Claude Code Plugin
- AI Native Product Score：76
- 做什么：Claude Code plugin for managing open-source contribution flow: PR tracking, maintainer replies, issue discovery, and contribution velocity.
- 面向谁：Developers maintaining or contributing across many OSS repositories.
- AI native 点：Focuses the agent on a recurring workflow around issues, PRs, review response, and contribution tracking rather than one-off code generation.
- 增长/活跃信号：GitHub claude-code topic listed it as updated Jun 12, 2026 with 9 stars, TypeScript, CLI, GitHub automation, PR management and issue-discovery tags.
- 可运行性判断：Plugin/CLI-shaped TypeScript project; direct README audit still needed for install and auth model.
- 建议动作：Watch and compare against GitHub Copilot/agent inbox workflows; verify token scopes before use.

### 6. [RonenMars/threadbase-mobile](https://github.com/RonenMars/threadbase-mobile)
- 分类：Coding Agent Mobile Client / Session Management
- AI Native Product Score：74
- 做什么：iOS and Android client for browsing, resuming, and managing Claude Code sessions on a remote Threadbase streamer.
- 面向谁：Developers who want to inspect or resume coding-agent sessions away from the desktop.
- AI native 点：The mobile app treats agent sessions as the primary object and extends coding-agent operations beyond the terminal.
- 增长/活跃信号：GitHub claude-code topic listed it as updated Jun 12, 2026 with React Native/Expo/mobile-app tags.
- 可运行性判断：Expo/TypeScript mobile client shape is visible from topic metadata; backend dependency on tb-streamer needs direct verification.
- 建议动作：Track as a mobile agent-ops surface; inspect pairing/security model before any real session use.

### 7. [kage-core/Kage](https://github.com/kage-core/Kage)
- 分类：Coding Agent Memory / Code Graph MCP
- AI Native Product Score：73
- 做什么：Verified memory for coding agents that cites claims against current code and exposes savings receipts through a graph MCP scan.
- 面向谁：Teams using Claude Code/Codex/Cursor on codebases where agent context needs provenance and cost control.
- AI native 点：Builds agent memory as a cited, queryable code graph rather than a human-only documentation layer.
- 增长/活跃信号：GitHub claude-code topic listed it as updated Jun 12, 2026 with 6 stars and explicit npx command in the topic description.
- 可运行性判断：Topic page includes `npx -y @kage-core/kage-graph-mcp scan`; direct package/repo audit still needed.
- 建议动作：Watch-to-try; compare with agentmap and CodeGraphContext on one repo.

### 8. [Round-Tower/murphysig](https://github.com/Round-Tower/murphysig)
- 分类：AI Code Provenance / CLI Convention
- AI Native Product Score：70
- 做什么：Natural-language provenance convention for signing human-AI collaborative code, with a spec, CLI, and empirical benchmark.
- 面向谁：Engineering teams that need lightweight attribution and review records for AI-assisted code.
- AI native 点：Addresses the post-agent governance layer: who accepted what, why, and with which AI collaboration boundary.
- 增长/活跃信号：GitHub LLM topic listed it as updated Jun 14, 2026 with Python implementation and provenance/code-attribution/dev-conventions tags.
- 可运行性判断：Spec and CLI are advertised in topic metadata; direct CLI audit still required.
- 建议动作：Add to governance watchlist; evaluate whether the convention is practical in pull-request workflows.

## Watchlist

- [fantasyce/across-context](https://github.com/fantasyce/across-context)：Local-first shared memory layer for coding agents. 分数 66。信号：GitHub MCP topic listed it as updated Jun 15, 2026 with local-first, codex, cursor, Claude Code and agent-memory tags. 建议：Watch for examples and protocol clarity.

- [Svmiizzz/conventional-commit-batcher](https://github.com/Svmiizzz/conventional-commit-batcher)：Organizes mixed local changes into reviewable Conventional Commit batches. 分数 64。信号：GitHub ai-agent topic listed it as updated Jun 15, 2026 with Codex, Claude Code, Gemini, Qwen, git-hooks and agent-skill tags. 建议：Watch as a small but practical post-agent workflow tool.

- [MuhDur/oraclemcp](https://github.com/MuhDur/oraclemcp)：Safe-by-default Oracle Database MCP server in Rust with fail-closed SQL guard and stdio/HTTP transports. 分数 63。信号：GitHub MCP topic listed it as updated Jun 15, 2026 with Rust, database, Oracle, PL/SQL and model-context-protocol tags. 建议：Watch for guardrail design; do not run against real data before review.

- [firatcand/forge](https://github.com/firatcand/forge)：Lightweight framework for shipping software products from idea to production with Claude Code, Codex CLI, Cursor and Gemini. 分数 62。信号：GitHub claude-code topic listed it as updated Jun 12, 2026 with 8 stars and agentic-coding/spec-driven-development tags. 建议：Watch, but avoid over-weighting until examples show real product output.

- [rNLKJA/signal](https://github.com/rNLKJA/signal)：Interactive US public-data product with an LLM analyst layer and governance log aligned to APS/EU AI Act language. 分数 60。信号：GitHub LLM topic listed it as updated Jun 14, 2026 with ai-governance and EU-AI-Act tags. 建议：Watch for governance-log implementation details.

## Skip Reasons

- `NousResearch/hermes-agent`：Repeated abnormal high-star signal from earlier runs; still needs API/community verification before using as a growth datapoint.

- `linny006/llm-agents-radar`：Useful index, but it is an auto-updated list rather than a runnable AI-native product.

- `Megaboy12346/complex-RAG-guide`：Guide/Jupyter material, not a product with UI/CLI/API.

- `Mithun-033/SharpGPT`：Model training implementation, outside product radar scope.

- `Harshil-fx/claw-market`：Marketplace concept has agentic-commerce keywords, but product trust/runnability signals are too weak today.

- `KARIMMOHAMED2729/critical-briefs`：Looks more like skills/prompts for business validation than a standalone runnable product.

## 今日趋势观察
1. Agent 产品继续从“单个聊天/代码生成”转向可运营的工作面：桌面 agent 平台、移动 session 客户端、OSS 贡献 autopilot、Apple app bridge 都是在把 agent 放进真实日常流程。
2. 低星但产品味更强的仓库变多：今天 Top 里很多项目只有个位数到几十 stars，但有明确 CLI、插件、移动端或平台形态，优先级高于高星列表/教程。
3. MCP 的新机会集中在“高权限工具的安全封装”：Oracle MCP、Apple app bridge、agentic commerce 都把外部系统写操作暴露给 agent，因此权限、审计、只读模式和 fail-closed 设计会成为核心差异。
4. Coding-agent 后处理层正在成形：commit batching、verified memory、provenance signing、session recovery/mobile browsing 都在补齐 agent 执行后的理解、回放、归档和交付。

## 数据窗口与关键假设
- 数据窗口：2026-06-14 至 2026-06-17 10:35 CST，覆盖 GitHub Topic 最近更新页和可打开仓库页。
- 信息来源：GitHub Topic pages for ai-agent/mcp/llm/rag/claude-code，以及可成功打开的 GitHub 仓库页。
- 实时仓库审计：已做网页层 README/目录/星标/更新信号粗审；未 clone、未安装依赖、未跑 Docker/npm/pip/CLI。
- 排序假设：优先真实产品入口、具体用户场景、可运行线索和 agent-native 工作流；降权列表、教程、prompt/skill 包、模型训练、营销/SEO 仓库。
- 技术限制：shell 端 GitHub API 访问失败（本地代理 127.0.0.1:7890 不通；去代理后 DNS 无法解析 api.github.com），因此星数和更新日期以网页观察为准。

# Daily AI Native Product Radar - 2026-06-16

数据窗口：2026-06-13 至 2026-06-16 10:30 CST；重点使用 GitHub Search API、GitHub 仓库页、GitHub Topic 页。已做实时仓库审计：是，限于 API/网页层；未 clone、未安装、未运行。

## Top Projects

### 1. [omnigent-ai/omnigent](https://github.com/omnigent-ai/omnigent)
- 分类：Agent Meta-Harness / Multi-Agent Control Plane
- AI Native Product Score：90
- 做什么：把 Claude Code、Codex、Pi 和自定义 agent 放进统一会话层，支持跨设备继续会话、多 agent 协作、策略和沙箱治理。
- 面向谁：同时使用多个 coding agent 的开发者、团队、agent 平台构建者。
- AI native 点：核心对象是 agent session、sub-agent、策略、远程沙箱和共享实时协作，不是传统 IDE 插件。
- 增长/活跃信号：2026-06-11 创建；GitHub API 观察到约 1.9k stars、238 forks、116 commits，2026-06-16 仍在 push；仓库页显示 macOS app 下载、docs、examples、SDK、openapi。
- 可运行性判断：README 提供一键安装脚本、`uv tool install`、`pip install`、Homebrew、repo 安装，且有 Web/API/SDK 目录；可运行性强。
- 建议动作：列为长期跟踪；优先试用本地/云沙箱模式，观察它是否成为 coding-agent 编排入口。

### 2. [Jeidoban/Ironsmith](https://github.com/Jeidoban/Ironsmith)
- 分类：Prompt-to-Native-App / Local Mac Agent App
- AI Native Product Score：88
- 做什么：macOS 菜单栏应用，用自然语言生成、编译、运行和导出小型 SwiftUI 原生 App。
- 面向谁：想用 AI 快速生成个人 Mac 工具的高级用户、开发者、设计/运营同学。
- AI native 点：LLM 不是辅助写代码，而是从需求到 SwiftUI App bundle 的主流程；支持 Ollama、OpenAI-compatible API、OpenAI、Anthropic、Gemini、Apple Foundation Model。
- 增长/活跃信号：2026-06-14 创建；GitHub web 观察到 133 stars、7 forks、2 个 release，latest v0.1.1 发布于 2026-06-15；API 首轮还观察到 2026-06-15 push。
- 可运行性判断：提供 GitHub Releases/官网下载、`xcode-select --install`、`script/build.sh run`、`script/test.sh`；有真实截图和示例 prompt；可运行性强，但要求 macOS 26+。
- 建议动作：复刻思路值得跟踪：把“prompt-to-app”收敛到小工具和本地编译，适合做垂直工具生成器原型。

### 3. [alchaincyf/fanbox](https://github.com/alchaincyf/fanbox)
- 分类：Coding Agent Cockpit / Local Desktop App
- AI Native Product Score：86
- 做什么：本地 coding agent 驾驶舱，左侧文件/预览，右侧内嵌终端，追踪 Claude Code/Codex 改动、会话、diff、截图和发版流程。
- 面向谁：每天用 Claude Code/Codex 起多个本地项目的人，尤其是需要找回、预览、轻改和续跑上下文的开发者。
- AI native 点：围绕 agent 写文件、改动回放、会话继续、skills 透视、用量统计来组织桌面工作流。
- 增长/活跃信号：2026-06-10 创建；GitHub API 观察到 578 stars、82 forks；仓库页显示 75 commits、真实截图、Electron/terminal/file-preview 代码结构。
- 可运行性判断：有 dmg 下载、截图、package.json、server/electron/build 目录；看起来是完整桌面产品而非 README 概念。
- 建议动作：重点观察“agent session browser + diff inbox”的信息架构，可作为本地 Codex 工作台参考。

### 4. [manuelschipper/nah](https://github.com/manuelschipper/nah)
- 分类：Agent Permission Guard / AI Security
- AI Native Product Score：84
- 做什么：为 coding agent 提供动作感知的确定性权限守卫，把命令/工具调用映射到风险意图后 allow/ask/block。
- 面向谁：使用 Claude Code、Codex、shell agent、MCP 工具且担心自动模式安全边界的开发者和团队。
- AI native 点：权限模型从命令名升级到 agent action intent，覆盖敏感文件、网络、MCP、git history、shell wrapper 等 agent 风险面。
- 增长/活跃信号：2026-03 创建但 2026-06-16 仍活跃；GitHub web 观察到 452 stars、25 forks、735 commits；README 给出 benchmark 和 threat model 覆盖数据。
- 可运行性判断：`pipx install "nah[config,keys]"`、`uv tool install`、Nix、`nah codex setup`、Claude plugin、demo 和 pytest 审计；可运行性强。
- 建议动作：加入 agent 安全/治理长期卡片；下一步本地试 `nah test` 和 Codex setup。

### 5. [liuluhaixiu/DaVinci-AutoEdit-Agent](https://github.com/liuluhaixiu/DaVinci-AutoEdit-Agent)
- 分类：Vertical Agent Workflow / Video Editing
- AI Native Product Score：82
- 做什么：面向 Codex 的 DaVinci Resolve 自动剪辑 skills，从素材分析、脚本、TTS、剪辑蓝图到 Resolve 时间线构建和成片审计。
- 面向谁：自媒体剪辑师、视频创作者、希望把本地素材工作流 agent 化的创作者。
- AI native 点：agent 承担完整剪辑生产链，并在每个创作阶段要求用户确认；MCP/Resolve 写入审计明确。
- 增长/活跃信号：2026-06-12 创建；GitHub web 观察到 134 stars、24 forks、4 commits；README 中英双语、examples/scripts/skills/.env.example/requirements 齐全。
- 可运行性判断：提供 `python -m pip install -r requirements.txt`、`python scripts/install_skills.py`、`npx davinci-resolve-mcp setup`、环境检查脚本；需要 Resolve/FFmpeg/MCP 环境，蓝图模式可降级运行。
- 建议动作：写入复刻候选；优先复刻“素材只读、阶段确认、写入审计”的工作流设计。

### 6. [raymondchins/agentmap](https://github.com/raymondchins/agentmap)
- 分类：Coding Agent Context Map / Token Reduction
- AI Native Product Score：80
- 做什么：为 TS/JS 代码库生成可查询的 import/symbol/PageRank repo map，并通过 hook 强制 agent 在 grep 前先查 map。
- 面向谁：大型前端/Node 项目里的 Claude Code/Codex 用户。
- AI native 点：不是给人看的文档，而是 agent loop 中会自动刷新、自动被调用的上下文层。
- 增长/活跃信号：2026-06-13 创建；GitHub web 观察到 31 stars、9 forks、52 commits；README 有 benchmark、eval、hooks、npm 安装。
- 可运行性判断：`npx @raymondchins/agentmap --install-hooks`，单文件 CLI、`mcp.mjs`、hooks、benchmark/eval；可运行性较强，但当前只适合 TS/JS。
- 建议动作：加入 Watch-to-Try；可在本仓库或前端项目做一次 token/context 实验。

### 7. [Ishannaik/agent-sweep](https://github.com/Ishannaik/agent-sweep)
- 分类：Agent History Security / Secret Redaction
- AI Native Product Score：73
- 做什么：扫描并脱敏 AI coding agent 历史中的 secrets，目标包括 Claude Code 等 agent 记录。
- 面向谁：频繁使用 coding agent、担心本地历史/日志泄漏 token 的个人和团队。
- AI native 点：安全对象是 agent 历史，而非通用源码仓库；补齐 agent 使用后的数据卫生环节。
- 增长/活跃信号：2026-06-11 创建；GitHub API 观察到 37 stars、4 forks，2026-06-13 push；README/目录显示 Python CLI 安全工具方向。
- 可运行性判断：仓库体量约 2MB，Python 项目，已有 tests/CLI 迹象；需要进一步本地安装审计。
- 建议动作：放入安全工具跟踪；下次若网络允许，clone 后对本地假样本跑一次。

### 8. [0dust/OKFy](https://github.com/0dust/OKFy)
- 分类：Agent Knowledge Packaging / MCP Memory
- AI Native Product Score：72
- 做什么：把文档转成 agent-readable knowledge bundles，围绕 Open Knowledge Format、agent memory、MCP 做知识包。
- 面向谁：需要把产品/代码/内部文档打包给 agent 使用的开发者、文档工程师。
- AI native 点：产物目标是 agent 可读知识结构，而不是人类阅读页面；靠格式化知识提升 agent 上下文质量。
- 增长/活跃信号：2026-06-14 创建；GitHub API 观察到 12 stars、1 fork、TypeScript、MIT、topics 包含 agent-memory/mcp/memory/okf。
- 可运行性判断：仓库约 518KB，有 TypeScript 实现迹象；星数小，需补充 README/CLI 审计。
- 建议动作：Watchlist 升级为 Top 的低分项；关注是否形成 CLI/API 和示例知识包。

## Watchlist

- [baskduf/FableCodex](https://github.com/baskduf/FableCodex)：Codex-style coding agent workflow，2026-06-14 创建、约 117 stars；更像 workflow/skills 包，等可运行 CLI 或案例。
- [DanMcInerney/architect-loop](https://github.com/DanMcInerney/architect-loop)：spec-driven coding agent guardrails/hooks，约 43 stars；方向好，但需要确认文档和安装路径。
- [udityamerit/NeuroLens-Knowledge-Retrieval-Engine](https://github.com/udityamerit/NeuroLens-Knowledge-Retrieval-Engine)：RAG 前后端完整形态，约 10 stars，有 GitHub Pages demo；星数低但产品形态明确。
- [PentHertz/grimoire](https://github.com/PentHertz/grimoire)：离线 offensive knowledge 搜索盒，约 127 stars；安全领域知识库产品，MCP 相关但场景偏窄。
- [MangoX-ai/ai-video-downloader](https://github.com/MangoX-ai/ai-video-downloader)：AI agent 自动下载视频并生成旁白，约 32 stars；方向偏内容自动化，需查合法性和真实运行深度。

## Skip Reasons

- `DietrichGebert/ponytail`：增长极强，但更像 prompt/agent-skills/YAGNI 规则包，产品可运行面弱，先不放 Top。
- `majidmanzarpour/threejs-game-skills`：是技能包集合，不是独立产品。
- `claude-code-ai-anthropic/free-claude-code-ai-desktop-app`：命名和描述带明显 SEO/营销风险，缺少可信产品信号。
- `GuardianNurse/Microsoft-365-One-Liner`：与 AI native 产品无关，且疑似激活/灰产关键词。
- `THUDM/slime`、`tile-ai/TileOPs`：模型训练/算子基础设施，活跃但不是终端用户产品。
- `dancinlab/anima`：概念性/研究味较重，缺少明确用户任务和可信运行闭环。

## 今日趋势观察

1. Coding agent 的机会继续从“更强模型”转向“工作台和治理层”：Omnigent/FanBox/nah/agentmap 分别覆盖编排、可视化、权限、上下文。
2. 本地优先正在变成卖点：Ironsmith、FanBox、nah 都强调本地、沙箱、无需云账号或可带本地模型。
3. 垂直 agent workflow 更像可复刻机会：DaVinci-AutoEdit-Agent 把视频剪辑拆成素材审查、文案、蓝图、写入、审计，结构比通用 agent 更容易落地。
4. “agent 使用后的安全与卫生”开始有产品形态：权限前置是 nah，历史脱敏是 agent-sweep，未来还会有 session audit、secret quarantine、policy replay。

## 数据窗口与关键假设

- 数据窗口：2026-06-13 至 2026-06-16 10:30 CST，覆盖新创建、近 72 小时更新和高增长仓库。
- 信息来源：GitHub Search API 第一轮结果、GitHub 仓库网页、GitHub Topic 页；部分 API 查询随后出现空响应，因此星数以本次观察到的网页/API值为准，可能存在短时差异。
- 实时仓库审计：已做 API/网页层 README、目录、stars/forks/releases/commit 粗审；未 clone、未安装依赖、未跑 Docker/npm/pip/CLI。
- 排序假设：优先产品形态、可运行入口、真实用户场景、demo/screenshots/examples；降权技能包、纯训练框架、列表、营销仓库、灰产关键词仓库。
