# Daily AI Native Product Radar - 2026-06-15

数据窗口：2026-06-12 至 2026-06-15（Asia/Shanghai），以 GitHub Topic `ai-agent` / `mcp` 的最近更新、仓库 README、公开 star/release/commit 信号为主。  
关键假设：本次 shell 无法解析 `api.github.com`，未 clone、未安装、未 Docker 或本地运行；评分基于 README 产品形态、可运行入口、近期更新和长期跟踪价值。

## Top Projects

### 1. sattyamjjain/agent-audit-kit
- GitHub: https://github.com/sattyamjjain/agent-audit-kit
- 分类：Agent / MCP Security Scanner
- AI Native Product Score：82
- 做什么：面向 MCP-connected AI agent pipeline 的离线安全扫描器，覆盖工具投毒、hook RCE、secret 泄露、MCP 配置、A2A 协议等风险。
- 面向谁：使用 Claude Code、Cursor、Copilot、Goose、Gemini CLI 等 agent 工具的工程团队和安全团队。
- AI native 点：把 agent 配置、MCP server、tool schema、技能/钩子文件当作新的软件供应链边界来审计。
- 增长/活跃信号：GitHub Topic `mcp` 最近更新列表靠前；仓库显示 148 commits、6 stars、9 issues、1 PR；README 标注 221 rules、75 scanner modules、GitHub Action、SARIF 和 PyPI/CLI。
- 可运行性判断：`pip install agent-audit-kit`、`agent-audit-kit scan .`、GitHub Action、pre-commit hook、Dockerfile 和 examples 都存在；产品化程度高。
- 建议动作：优先拉一个真实 agent/MCP repo 做扫描试验，观察误报率和 SARIF 输出质量。

### 2. MCP-Audit/MCTS
- GitHub: https://github.com/MCP-Audit/MCTS
- 分类：MCP Threat Scanner
- AI Native Product Score：78
- 做什么：本地优先的 MCP server 威胁扫描器，支持静态/动态工具发现、多分析器、风险评分、JSON/SARIF/HTML 输出。
- 面向谁：MCP server 作者、平台团队、agent infra 团队。
- AI native 点：直接围绕 MCP 的 tools/list、tools/call、server manifest、tool 风险面做审计，而非传统依赖扫描。
- 增长/活跃信号：GitHub Topic `mcp` 最近更新列表中出现，23 stars；README 定位清晰，强调 CI-ready 和 no cloud API。
- 可运行性判断：README 给出 local-first scanner 定位和输出格式，适合纳入 CI；本次未做安装运行。
- 建议动作：与 agent-audit-kit 做同一批 MCP server 横向对比，保留更低噪音的一套。

### 3. macro-inc/macro
- GitHub: https://github.com/macro-inc/macro
- 分类：Agentic Workspace / Personal Ops OS
- AI Native Product Score：77
- 做什么：把 email、messages、tasks、calls、agents、PR、docs、CRM 放进一个统一界面，并用 shared AI memory 连接。
- 面向谁：需要跨消息、任务、PR、文档协作的 founder、工程/运营团队。
- AI native 点：AI memory 是工作台中多对象、多渠道的上下文连接层。
- 增长/活跃信号：GitHub Topic `mcp` 最近更新列表中出现；仓库显示 237 stars、21 forks、20 PR、3530 commits。
- 可运行性判断：仓库文件结构包含 agents、docs、infra 等完整产品骨架；本次未看到一键安装说明，需进一步审计部署链路。
- 建议动作：进入 watch+deep dive，重点看本地运行门槛、数据源接入和 memory schema。

### 4. browserbase/stagehand
- GitHub: https://github.com/browserbase/stagehand
- 分类：Browser Agent SDK
- AI Native Product Score：76
- 做什么：用自然语言和代码混合控制浏览器，提供 act/extract/agent 等 browser automation 原语。
- 面向谁：需要把网页自动化跑进生产环境的开发者、RPA/agent workflow 团队。
- AI native 点：允许在确定性 Playwright/CDP 代码和 LLM 驱动操作之间切换，并缓存/自愈重复动作。
- 增长/活跃信号：23.1k stars、1.6k forks、1339 commits；GitHub 页面显示 latest release `@browserbasehq/stagehand@2.5.9` 为 2026-06-11，Topic `ai-agent` 中仍高频活跃。
- 可运行性判断：`npx create-browser-app`、`pnpm install`、`pnpm run build`、`pnpm run example`、docs 和 examples 明确；依赖 LLM/Browserbase API key。
- 建议动作：不重复建卡，更新长期卡片并把它作为 browser-agent 可靠性基线。

### 5. flowork-os/Flowork_Agent
- GitHub: https://github.com/flowork-os/Flowork_Agent
- 分类：Self-hosted Multi-agent Runtime
- AI Native Product Score：73
- 做什么：自托管 AI agents，强调 per-agent memory/dream/immune、multi-agent orchestration、Telegram + MCP、security radar、single Go binary。
- 面向谁：想要本地优先、可长期运行 agent 的个人/小团队。
- AI native 点：把 agent 的记忆、健康检查、防护和编排做成运行时结构。
- 增长/活跃信号：GitHub Topic `ai-agent` 最近更新列表靠前；5 stars，Go 项目，更新时间显示 2026-06-10。
- 可运行性判断：Topic 描述里明确 single Go binary、本地优先和 Telegram/MCP；README 需后续深读确认安装质量。
- 建议动作：Watchlist 转 Top 的早期项目；建议等 star/issue 或 release 增长后再投入复刻。

### 6. h-wata/kioku-mesh
- GitHub: https://github.com/h-wata/kioku-mesh
- 分类：Agent Memory / MCP
- AI Native Product Score：72
- 做什么：为 Claude Code、Codex CLI、Gemini CLI 等 coding agents 提供跨机器共享记忆；默认 SQLite，本地无 daemon，mesh 模式支持 Zenoh + RocksDB。
- 面向谁：多设备、多 agent 工程工作流用户。
- AI native 点：把 agent 决策、观察和上下文作为可保存/搜索/同步的 MCP memory layer。
- 增长/活跃信号：157 commits、2 stars、8 issues；Topic `mcp` 最近更新；README 提供 `uv tool install`、`kioku-mesh mcp install --client codex-cli` 等路径。
- 可运行性判断：PyPI/CLI/MCP server/测试命令齐全；README 标注 macOS support not verified，本机环境需谨慎。
- 建议动作：适合作为 Codex/Claude Code 多 agent memory 的低成本实验候选。

### 7. httuicom/httui
- GitHub: https://github.com/httuicom/httui
- 分类：Local-first API / Runbook Workspace with MCP
- AI Native Product Score：70
- 做什么：桌面 Markdown 编辑器，支持可执行 HTTP 和数据库 blocks，定位为 git-native/local-first Postman alternative，并带 MCP integration。
- 面向谁：API 调试、runbook、数据库操作、内部工具团队。
- AI native 点：MCP 使 agent 能读取/执行可审计的 HTTP/DB runbook。
- 增长/活跃信号：GitHub Topic `mcp` 最近更新；15 stars；TypeScript/Tauri/Rust 桌面产品形态清晰。
- 可运行性判断：Topic 描述显示桌面 app 形态，README 需进一步确认安装包/源码构建。
- 建议动作：进入 watchlist+试用队列，关注它是否能成为 agent 可执行 runbook 的轻量底座。

### 8. Agience/agience-core
- GitHub: https://github.com/Agience/agience-core
- 分类：AI Workflow Data Layer / MCP Gateway
- AI Native Product Score：69
- 做什么：为 AI workflows 提供结构化输入、身份、provenance、复用和审计的数据层。
- 面向谁：搭建可审计 AI workflow 的平台团队、数据/知识管理团队。
- AI native 点：把 provenance、identity、semantic search、MCP gateway 组合成 agent workflow 的可信数据底座。
- 增长/活跃信号：GitHub Topic `mcp` 最近更新；39 stars；描述里明确 opensearch、FastAPI、MCP gateway。
- 可运行性判断：产品方向明确但公开信号还早；本次未做 README 深读和部署验证。
- 建议动作：保留观察，优先确认它是否有可运行 demo 和 connector 示例。

## Watchlist

1. wishmikaovindu-stack/nowaikit - ServiceNow AI automation toolkit，支持多模型和 MCP，场景明确但 0 star，先观察是否有安装文档和真实示例。https://github.com/wishmikaovindu-stack/nowaikit
2. h-wata/kioku-mesh - 若后续 release/issue 增长，值得升级为“agent memory infra”长期项目。https://github.com/h-wata/kioku-mesh
3. aqm857886159/Nomi - local-first AI video creation desktop app，脚本到图片/视频/时间线/导出，产品形态强但需要确认 demo 和模型依赖。https://github.com/aqm857886159/Nomi
4. DimitriGeelen/agentic-engineering-framework - coding agents governance framework，任务追踪、结构门禁、session continuity 和 audit trail 很贴近 agent engineering，但当前 star 低。https://github.com/DimitriGeelen/agentic-engineering-framework
5. aXL333/Foreman - AI coding agents safety monitor，观察 risky commands/stuck runs/MCP changes，方向好但 0 star 且 Windows/WPF 较窄。https://github.com/aXL333/Foreman

## Skip Reasons

- thedaviddias/Front-End-Checklist：https://github.com/thedaviddias/Front-End-Checklist - 虽然标注 AI agents，但本质是 checklist/reference，不是 AI native product。
- shareAI-lab/learn-claude-code：https://github.com/shareAI-lab/learn-claude-code - 教程/学习项目，产品运行面弱。
- siyuan-note/siyuan：https://github.com/siyuan-note/siyuan - 成熟 PKM，AI agent 只是 topic/扩展信号，不是本轮 AI native 新产品重点。
- ZhuLinsen/daily_stock_analysis：https://github.com/ZhuLinsen/daily_stock_analysis - 垂直金融分析项目，可能有价值，但更像自动化报表/策略系统，需额外验证数据源和合规边界。
- linny006/mcp-servers-live：https://github.com/linny006/mcp-servers-live - 自动更新索引，适合作为发现源，不作为 product Top 项目。
- SeKondBrainAILabs/homebrew-s9n：https://github.com/SeKondBrainAILabs/homebrew-s9n - Homebrew tap/installer 仓库，主产品应审计 s9n CLI 本体。

## 今日趋势观察

1. Agent 安全和治理开始从“概念风险”变成可运行工具：agent-audit-kit、MCTS、Foreman 都把 MCP/agent config/工具调用风险做成扫描器、monitor 或 CI 输出。
2. Agent memory 正在从单机长期记忆走向 shared/mesh：kioku-mesh、macro 都强调跨工具、跨机器或跨工作对象的共享上下文。
3. MCP 正在进入普通生产工具的底层：httui、Macro、Agience 这类工作台/数据层项目把 MCP 当成 agent 可执行接口，而不是单独 MCP server 列表。
4. 新项目质量分化很大：最近更新列表里有不少 0-5 star 的好概念，但很多仍缺安装包、demo、截图或真实用户反馈，应先 watch 后投入。

## 今日建议动作

- P0：用 agent-audit-kit 和 MCTS 扫描同一批已有 MCP/agent 项目，形成一页误报/覆盖对照。
- P1：把 Stagehand 作为 browser-agent workflow 的可靠性基线，后续新 browser agent 项目都与它对比。
- P1：复刻 kioku-mesh 的本地模式，评估它能否服务 Codex/Claude Code 多会话记忆。
- P2：继续观察 Macro/Agience 这类“agent workspace + data provenance”项目，等安装链路成熟后再深挖。

## 信息来源与审计边界

- 来源：GitHub Topic `ai-agent`、GitHub Topic `mcp`、各仓库 README/公开仓库页。
- 实时仓库审计：做过公开网页实时审计；未做 GitHub API、clone、install、Docker、测试或本地运行。
- 关键假设：Topic 最近更新排序足以反映 24-72 小时活跃方向；star 数对早期项目仅作弱信号，产品形态和可运行入口权重更高。

# Daily AI Native Product Radar - 2026-06-12

数据窗口：2026-06-09 18:19 to 2026-06-12 18:19 Asia/Shanghai；实时查看 GitTrend AI Agent / AI Skills / AI Coding Assistant / AI Infrastructure 页面、GitHub 仓库 README 页面，以及定向搜索 AI agent、MCP、code agent、RAG、workflow、local AI runtime、browser/social research agent 方向。

关键假设：优先保留有真实产品形态、可运行 UI/CLI/API、明确用户场景、文档/截图/安装路径完整的仓库；降权纯 prompt/skills collection、教程指南、论文/训练代码、疑似异常 star 速度和只有 README 的营销仓库。本轮 shell 侧 GitHub API 仍受本机代理 `127.0.0.1:7890` 影响不可用，因此未做 API、clone、install、Docker 或本地运行审计；GitTrend star velocity 只作为方向性信号。

## Top Projects

1. [Panniantong/Agent-Reach](https://github.com/Panniantong/Agent-Reach) - Agent Internet Capability Layer - Score 88

   - 面向谁：需要让 agent 做真实外部调研、社媒口碑抓取、视频/网页/RSS/GitHub 信息读取的个人和团队。
   - AI native 点：它不只是单个 scraper，而是为 agent 维护“首选 + 备选”的渠道路由、安装、doctor 诊断和 skill 注册，让 agent 能自己调用合适上游工具。
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitTrend AI Agent 页面列为 #3，显示 +1.1k today、24.3k stars；GitHub 页面显示 26.5k stars、2.2k forks、282 commits、27 issues、14 PRs，并有 docs、tests、install/update 文档和安全模式。
   - 可运行性判断：README 提供一句话安装/更新、安全模式、`agent-reach doctor`、pip 安装、渠道配置和卸载说明；未做本地安装审计。
   - 建议动作：作为本 radar 的数据源能力候选，先用安全模式安装到隔离环境，测试 GitHub/YouTube/RSS/网页四个零配置渠道。

2. [nexu-io/open-design](https://github.com/nexu-io/open-design) - Agent-native Design Workspace - Score 86
   - 做什么：Local-first 的 Claude Design 替代品，提供原生桌面 app、web/desktop/mobile prototype、slides、images、videos、HyperFrames、HTML/PDF/PPTX/MP4 export 和 MCP/CLI 集成。
   - 面向谁：希望把设计系统、原型、幻灯片、品牌素材和 agent 工作流放在同一套本地优先工具里的产品/设计/开发团队。
   - AI native 点：把设计交付从画布操作变成 agent 可调用的 skills、design system、automation、plugin、MCP server 和 sandboxed artifact preview。
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitTrend AI Agent 页面列为 #5，显示 +774 today、61.7k stars；GitHub README 有完整 product tour、核心页面截图、Studio 多产物截图、MCP 安装矩阵。
   - 可运行性判断：README 展示 native app、CLI/MCP、sandbox preview、导出能力和多 agent 平台支持；本轮未 clone/run。
   - 建议动作：加入复刻候选，重点拆解其“design system -> artifact -> export”链路，而不是先复制完整桌面 app。

3. [aaif-goose/goose](https://github.com/aaif-goose/goose) - General-purpose Local AI Agent - Score 84

   - 建议动作：与 Graphify、Understand-Anything 做同 repo 对比，优先看查询准确性、增量索引速度和 MCP 配置成本。

5. [qixing-jk/all-api-hub](https://github.com/qixing-jk/all-api-hub) - LLM Account Asset Manager - Score 79
   - 做什么：浏览器扩展/管理台，用于统一管理 New-API/Sub2API 等中转站账号余额、用量、模型价格、自动签到、API 凭据、网页内测试、渠道/模型同步。

   - AI native 点：它把模型访问从“复制 key + 手动查余额”变成 AI 资产管理面板，适合作为中国市场 LLM ops 的轻量产品信号。
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitTrend AI Infrastructure 页面列为 #3，显示 +475 today、3.9k stars；GitHub 页面显示 2,680 commits，包含 docs、docs_assistant、plugins、resources、tests、e2e、Chrome/Edge/Firefox 扩展入口和快速上手文档。
   - 可运行性判断：README 指向快速上手、支持站点、集成工具和更新日志；代码结构包含扩展配置与测试，但本轮未安装浏览器扩展。
   - 建议动作：作为“AI 资产管家”趋势样本保留，观察是否从个人 relay 管理扩展到团队级 cost/governance。

6. [lemonade-sdk/lemonade](https://github.com/lemonade-sdk/lemonade) - Local AI App Runtime - Score 77
   - 做什么：帮助用户发现并运行本地 AI apps，通过 GPU/NPU/CPU 后端服务优化后的 LLM、Whisper、TTS、image generation 等模型。
   - 面向谁：需要本地模型运行、桌面/嵌入式 AI app backend、多模态本地推理的开发者和硬件生态团队。
   - AI native 点：它把本地模型服务、模型库、backends、自带 model manager 和 embeddable runtime 做成可被应用捆绑的 AI runtime。

7. [agentscope-ai/agentscope-java](https://github.com/agentscope-ai/agentscope-java) - Java Agent Framework - Score 75

   - 可运行性判断：README 指向 desktop release、web interface 和 VS Code Marketplace；未做安装审计。

## Watchlist

## Skip Reasons

- [yasasbanukaofficial/claude-code](https://github.com/yasasbanukaofficial/claude-code) - GitTrend AI Coding Assistant #6，但 README 自称是 Claude Code CLI skeleton/source-style project，真实性和可持续产品边界需要验证。

## 今日趋势观察

1. Agent 能力层正在从“单工具”变成“路由 + 诊断 + 安装 + skill 注册”：Agent-Reach 是最清晰样本。
2. 设计类 agent 产品开始把 Design System、Artifact export、MCP/CLI、sandbox preview 合并成 agent-native workspace，Open Design 值得拆链路。
3. 代码上下文产品继续分化：Graphify / Understand-Anything 偏 skill 和可视化，CodeGraphContext 更偏 MCP server + CLI + graph database。
4. AI ops 不只在模型网关，也开始覆盖账号资产、余额/价格、自动签到、客户端配置，All API Hub 是中国市场里的实用信号。
5. 本地 AI runtime 仍有产品机会：Lemonade 的多后端和 embeddable runtime 指向“把本地模型能力塞进 app”的路线。

## 今日建议动作

- 第一优先级：用隔离环境试 Agent-Reach safe install，验证网页、YouTube、RSS、GitHub 四类零配置渠道能否帮助下一次 radar 减少人工搜索。
- 第二优先级：拆 Open Design 的最小复刻链路：输入 brief + design system，输出 HTML/PPTX artifact，不先做完整桌面端。
- 第三优先级：用同一个中等规模 repo 对比 CodeGraphContext、Graphify、Understand-Anything，记录索引速度、查询准确性、MCP 接入成本。
- 第四优先级：把 All API Hub 作为“AI 资产管家”案例，观察是否可迁移到团队模型成本治理。

# Daily AI Native Product Radar - 2026-06-11

数据窗口：2026-06-08 18:18 to 2026-06-11 18:18 Asia/Shanghai; GitTrend AI Agent/AI Skills pages updated June 9, 2026, GitTrend AI Infrastructure page updated June 6, 2026, GitHub repository README pages, and targeted web search for AI agent, coding-agent, MCP, workflow, sandbox/runtime, RAG and LLM product repositories.

关键假设：Prioritized repositories with visible product surface, runnable UI/CLI/API, install instructions, docs/examples/screenshots/demo assets, and recent growth or update signals. Downgraded pure guides, one-file prompt collections, model training/tutorial repos, abnormal star spikes, and projects without a durable user workflow. GitTrend star deltas are directional until GitHub API-verified.

## Top Projects

1. [builderz-labs/mission-control](https://github.com/builderz-labs/mission-control) - Agent Operations Control Plane - Score 91
   - 做什么：Self-hosted dashboard for dispatching AI agent tasks, coordinating multi-agent workflows, tracking spend, managing skills, and auditing security from one SQLite-backed control surface.
   - 面向谁：Teams running multiple coding/research agents who need task queues, review gates, costs, logs, skills, schedules, and governance in one place.
   - AI native 点：It treats agent work as an operated system: agents, tasks, skills, memory, MCP calls, evals, trust scores, cron schedules, webhooks, alerts, and quality gates are first-class product objects.
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitTrend AI Infrastructure ranked it #4 with +372 stars today; GitHub showed 5.3k stars, 906 forks, 366 commits, 7 issues and 11 PRs, with docs, examples, tests, Docker, OpenAPI and screenshots.
   - 可运行性判断：README documents one-command local install, manual pnpm dev, Docker compose, GHCR image, hardened compose profile, setup page, API examples and optional gateway mode.
   - 建议动作：Run the Docker path and test whether Codex/Claude/OpenCode tasks can be registered, queued, reviewed and audited without custom glue.

2. [mvanhorn/last30days-skill](https://github.com/mvanhorn/last30days-skill) - Agent Research Skill / Social Intelligence - Score 88
   - 做什么：AI agent skill that searches Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, GitHub and web sources, scores signals by real engagement, then synthesizes a grounded last-30-days brief.
   - 面向谁：Operators, researchers, sales/product people and agent users who need recent community truth rather than stale web search summaries.
   - AI native 点：It uses an agent as a cross-platform research engine with source-specific connectors, entity resolution, competitive comparison, HTML brief export and agent-judged synthesis.
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitTrend AI Skills ranked it #1 with +3.5k stars today; GitHub showed 39.3k stars, 3.2k forks, 623 commits, 75 issues and 72 PRs.
   - 可运行性判断：README documents Claude plugin install, npx skills add for Codex/Cursor/Copilot/Gemini-style hosts, zero-config sources for Reddit/HN/Polymarket/GitHub, and guided setup for X/YouTube/TikTok.
   - 建议动作：Use it as a radar-source experiment on one topic and compare output quality, citation fidelity and auth friction against this current manual workflow.

3. [safishamsi/graphify](https://github.com/safishamsi/graphify) - Code Knowledge Graph Skill - Score 85
   - 做什么：Agent skill that turns code, schemas, scripts, docs, papers, images and videos into a queryable knowledge graph for Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Cursor and Gemini-style assistants.
   - 面向谁：Developers onboarding to complex systems or trying to give coding agents richer project context.
   - AI native 点：It creates a durable graph context layer that agents can query across app code, database schema, infrastructure and docs instead of relying only on current-context text.
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitTrend AI Skills ranked it #3 with +1.5k stars today and 63.5k stars; GitHub README shows architecture docs, extraction pipeline, optional Docker MCP Toolkit and SQLite integrations.
   - 可运行性判断：Repository includes skills, docs, tests and architecture references; this run did not clone it, so install/runtime friction still needs direct audit.
   - 建议动作：Benchmark against Understand-Anything and CodeGraphContext on this repo; promote only if graph answers materially improve agent edits.

4. [Egonex-AI/Understand-Anything](https://github.com/Egonex-AI/Understand-Anything) - Interactive Code Understanding UI - Score 83
   - 做什么：Interactive knowledge graph and dashboard that turns code into searchable, askable architecture maps for multiple agent hosts.
   - 面向谁：Developers, PMs and codebase reviewers who need visual exploration and question-answering over unfamiliar repositories.
   - AI native 点：The product wraps code context in a persona-adaptive UI with architectural layers and language concepts, making agent comprehension inspectable rather than hidden in chat.
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitTrend AI Skills ranked it #8 with +837 stars today; GitHub shows badges for Claude Code, Codex, Copilot, Gemini CLI, OpenCode, live demo and homepage links.
   - 可运行性判断：Quick Start and live-demo assets are visible in README; no local run was performed today.
   - 建议动作：Run side-by-side with Graphify on one known codebase; assess whether the UI helps humans validate agent context.

5. [anthropic-experimental/sandbox-runtime](https://github.com/anthropic-experimental/sandbox-runtime) - Agent Process Sandbox - Score 81
   - 做什么：Lightweight OS-level runtime for enforcing filesystem and network restrictions on arbitrary processes without requiring a container.
   - 面向谁：Agent platform builders and tool authors who need local execution controls around shell commands, code interpreters or untrusted workflows.
   - AI native 点：As agents gain more action tools, sandboxing becomes a core product primitive; this provides a focused runtime layer for constraining what agent-launched processes can touch.
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitTrend AI Infrastructure ranked it #8 with +337 stars today; GitHub showed 4.3k stars and 316 forks under an Anthropic experimental org.
   - 可运行性判断：README and repository surface indicate a lightweight runtime package; this run did not perform install or policy tests.
   - 建议动作：Audit policy expressiveness and macOS/Linux behavior; consider as a dependency candidate for any local agent execution harness.

6. [SWE-agent/mini-swe-agent](https://github.com/SWE-agent/mini-swe-agent) - Minimal Coding Agent CLI - Score 80
   - 做什么：Small Python coding agent that solves GitHub issues or local command-line tasks using a deliberately simple bash-only loop.
   - 面向谁：Researchers and developers who want a transparent coding-agent baseline, fast CLI workflow, or benchmarkable agent scaffold.
   - AI native 点：It pushes product value into model capability plus a minimal, auditable execution loop, making trajectories easier to debug, benchmark and sandbox.
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitTrend AI Coding Assistant ranked it #5 with +568 stars today; GitHub showed 5.1k stars, 693 forks, 995 commits and latest release v2.4.0 on June 10, 2026.
   - 可运行性判断：README documents uvx/pipx one-shot CLI, pip install, source install, Python bindings, local/docker/podman/singularity/bubblewrap environments and docs.
   - 建议动作：Use as a baseline in future code-agent evaluations; compare task success and observability against heavier agent shells.

7. [vercel-labs/just-bash](https://github.com/vercel-labs/just-bash) - Virtual Bash Runtime for Agents - Score 78
   - 做什么：TypeScript virtual bash environment with in-memory/overlay/read-write filesystems, many Unix commands, optional network, Python, JavaScript and SQLite support.
   - 面向谁：AI app and agent developers who need safe, embeddable command execution without exposing the host shell directly.
   - AI native 点：It productizes the shell as a controllable agent tool: virtual filesystem, allow-listed network, custom commands, execution limits and typed integration for JS/TS apps.
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitTrend AI Infrastructure ranked it #9 with +264 stars today; GitHub showed 3.7k stars, 207 forks, examples and a 620-line package README.
   - 可运行性判断：README documents npm install, import { Bash }, custom commands, supported Unix commands, filesystem modes, cancellation and network allow-list configuration.
   - 建议动作：Prototype a safe mini execution tool for local agents and test whether command coverage is enough for real troubleshooting loops.

8. [looplj/axonhub](https://github.com/looplj/axonhub) - LLM Gateway / AI Operations - Score 76
   - 做什么：Open-source AI gateway for calling 100+ LLMs through existing SDKs with failover, load balancing, cost control and tracing.
   - 面向谁：Teams juggling multiple model providers and relay accounts who need observability and routing without rewriting application SDK calls.
   - AI native 点：It is infrastructure rather than an agent app, but it supports AI-native products by making model choice, cost, fallback and tracing operational controls.
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitTrend AI Infrastructure ranked it #5 with +366 stars today; GitHub showed Docker readiness, multilingual README and docker-compose deployment.
   - 可运行性判断：README includes config.example.yml, docker-compose.yml, render.yaml and Docker Compose deployment steps; TiDB DSN setup suggests some deployment friction.
   - 建议动作：Keep as gateway watchlist-plus; run only if current projects need multi-provider routing or spend tracing.

## Watchlist

- [TanStack/ai](https://github.com/TanStack/ai) - Type-safe AI App SDK - Score 74 - Provider-agnostic TypeScript SDK for streaming chat, tool calls, structured outputs, realtime voice, media generation and framework-native AI apps. 建议：Watch for API stability and examples before adopting.
- [openchamber/openchamber](https://github.com/openchamber/openchamber) - OpenCode Desktop/Web Interface - Score 73 - Desktop and web interface for OpenCode AI agent. 建议：Watch; avoid repeating unless releases show stronger integration depth.
- [agentscope-ai/agentscope-java](https://github.com/agentscope-ai/agentscope-java) - Java Multi-agent Framework - Score 71 - Java framework for agent-oriented programming and LLM applications. 建议：Watch as Java-enterprise signal, but do not prioritize over product surfaces.
- [qixing-jk/all-api-hub](https://github.com/qixing-jk/all-api-hub) - LLM Account/Relay Dashboard - Score 70 - Dashboard for New-API/Sub2API account balance, usage, auto check-in, key use, price comparison and health checks. 建议：Watch for China-market LLM operations patterns; not a Top product today.

## Skip Reasons

- [Leonxlnx/taste-skill](https://github.com/Leonxlnx/taste-skill) - High GitTrend rank, but still reads primarily as taste/style skill guidance rather than durable product surface with auditable runtime.
- [mattpocock/skills](https://github.com/mattpocock/skills) - Popular skills directory, but mostly reusable engineering habits; product shape is weaker than agent control planes or runnable tools.
- [affaan-m/ECC](https://github.com/affaan-m/ECC) - Repeated abnormal star velocity and very high headline numbers; requires API/community validation before promotion.
- [multica-ai/andrej-karpathy-skills](https://github.com/multica-ai/andrej-karpathy-skills) - Single CLAUDE.md/prompt-methodology style project; lacks runnable product workflow.
- [rohitg00/ai-engineering-from-scratch](https://github.com/rohitg00/ai-engineering-from-scratch) - Educational build-from-scratch repository; useful learning content but outside product-shaped radar focus.

## 今日趋势观察

1. Agent 操作控制面变成今天最强的产品形态：Mission Control 把任务、agent、skills、成本、审计、质量门禁和调度集中到一个可运行 dashboard。
2. “agent 能执行命令”之后，安全执行层开始升温：sandbox-runtime 和 just-bash 都在把 shell/process 变成可控、可审计、可嵌入的产品能力。
3. 社交/社区研究 agent 开始产品化：last30days-skill 的价值不在单个来源，而在跨 Reddit/X/YouTube/HN/Polymarket/GitHub 的实体解析、评分和综合。
4. 代码上下文工具继续分化：Graphify 偏 agent 可查询知识图谱，Understand-Anything 偏人可检查的交互式架构图。
5. LLM 基础设施仍活跃，但要区分 agent-native 产品与通用 SDK/网关；今天只把 AxonHub、TanStack AI 放在“支撑层”视角评估。

## 今日建议动作

- 第一优先级：试跑 Mission Control 的 Docker 或本地安装路径，确认能否接入一个真实 agent task queue。
- 第二优先级：用 last30days-skill 跑一个“AI Native Product Radar”主题，评估它能否减少人工找源成本。
- 第三优先级：在同一个 repo 上比较 Graphify、Understand-Anything、CodeGraphContext，选一个作为代码上下文实验基线。
- 安全实验：用 just-bash 做一个极小 agent shell tool，记录命令覆盖、网络 allow-list、文件系统隔离和失败模式。

## 信息来源

- GitTrend AI Agent: https://gittrend.io/trending/ai-agent
- GitTrend AI Skills: https://gittrend.io/trending/ai-skills
- GitTrend AI Coding Assistant: https://gittrend.io/trending/ai-coding-assistant
- GitTrend AI Infrastructure: https://gittrend.io/trending/ai-infrastructure
- GitHub README pages for all Top/Watchlist repositories listed above.

# Daily AI Native Product Radar - 2026-06-10

数据窗口：2026-06-07 18:17 to 2026-06-10 18:17 Asia/Shanghai; GitTrend AI Agent/AI Coding Assistant/AI Skills pages updated June 6-9, 2026, GitHub repository README pages, and targeted web search for AI agent, coding-agent, MCP, skills, RAG/notebook, and AI workflow products.

关键假设：Prioritized repositories with visible product surface, runnable UI/CLI/API, install instructions, docs/examples/screenshots/demo assets, and recent growth or update signals. Downgraded pure prompt/CLAUDE.md collections, model-training tutorials, abnormal star spikes, and repositories without a durable user workflow. This run used live web/README audit only; no local clone, package install, docker start, or GitHub API audit was performed.

## Top Projects

1. [santifer/career-ops](https://github.com/santifer/career-ops) - Vertical Career Agent OS - Score 91
   - 做什么：AI-powered job-search command center that turns Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, Qwen or OpenCode into a pipeline for job evaluation, tailored CV generation, portal scanning, batch processing and tracking.
   - 面向谁：Job seekers, career switchers and AI builders who want a structured, human-reviewed job-search operating system.
   - AI native 点：The workflow is agent-native: coding CLIs navigate career pages, reason over CV/job fit, personalize PDFs, update trackers, deduplicate applications and keep a TUI/dashboard view of the pipeline.
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitTrend ranked it #6 in AI Agent on June 9 with +754 stars today; GitHub showed 52.1k stars, 10.5k forks, 259 commits, 88 issues and 79 PRs, with demo images and multilingual README.
   - 可运行性判断：Fast path is npx @santifer/career-ops init, then open Claude/Gemini/Codex/Qwen/OpenCode in the generated workspace; manual clone/npm install and Playwright Chromium setup are documented.
   - 建议动作：High-priority vertical product study. Run onboarding with a dummy CV and compare its data contract, tracker integrity and HITL safeguards against simpler prompt-pack workflows.

2. [esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix](https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix) - Model-specific Coding Agent CLI - Score 89
   - 做什么：DeepSeek-native coding agent for terminal and desktop workflows, redesigned around stable prefix-cache economics, long-running sessions, SEARCH/REPLACE review and Go-based native distribution.
   - 面向谁：Developers using DeepSeek models heavily, especially cost-sensitive users who leave agents running across long coding sessions.
   - AI native 点：It treats model-cache behavior as a product primitive: the agent loop, command set, session memory, MCP wiring and desktop client are all shaped around keeping prompts cache-stable.
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitTrend ranked it #7 in AI Agent on June 9 with +608 stars today; GitTrend repo page showed 13.8k stars, 797 forks and 309 issues, while GitHub showed 747 commits and a main-v2 Go rewrite note.
   - 可运行性判断：Install paths include npm i -g reasonix and brew install esengine/reasonix/reasonix; prebuilt archives and SHA256SUMS are documented for macOS/Linux/Windows.
   - 建议动作：Run a small coding benchmark against generic agents using the same DeepSeek key; inspect whether cache metrics and review/apply loop create a real cost/quality advantage.

3. [CopilotKit/CopilotKit](https://github.com/CopilotKit/CopilotKit) - Agent Frontend / Generative UI Stack - Score 87
   - 做什么：Frontend stack for embedding agents and generative UI into React, Next.js, Angular, Vue, React Native and chat surfaces, with AG-UI protocol positioning.
   - 面向谁：Product teams and frontend engineers building user-facing AI copilots, in-app agents and multi-surface assistant experiences.
   - AI native 点：The AI surface is not a chat widget bolted on later; it exposes one agent backend across app UI, mobile, team chat and generative UI components.
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitTrend ranked it #10 in AI Agent on June 9 with +468 stars today; GitHub showed 10,905 commits plus monorepo packages, SDKs, docs, showcase and skills folders.
   - 可运行性判断：React/Next.js and React Native quickstarts are GA, Angular/Vue supported, and Slack/Teams/Discord/Google Chat are marked beta/early-access.
   - 建议动作：Track as a protocol/product layer. Test a tiny internal dashboard copilot and compare AG-UI ergonomics against ad hoc streaming UI implementations.

4. [lfnovo/open-notebook](https://github.com/lfnovo/open-notebook) - Self-hosted NotebookLM / RAG Workspace - Score 85
   - 做什么：Open-source NotebookLM-like workspace with notebooks, AI providers, API/frontend structure, Docker deployment, local/Ollama option and persistent data service.
   - 面向谁：Researchers, students, content teams and knowledge workers who want NotebookLM-style workflows outside a closed hosted product.
   - AI native 点：It packages source-grounded AI synthesis into a deployable workspace: users bring documents/data, configure model providers, then create notebooks with local or API models.
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitTrend ranked it #9 in AI Skills on June 9 with +702 stars today; GitHub showed 739 commits and a structured repo with api, frontend, examples, docs, tests and Docker files.
   - 可运行性判断：README provides docker-compose.yml, SurrealDB service, app ports 8502/5055, encryption key setup, provider registration and Ollama/local AI option.
   - 建议动作：Run the Docker compose path with a small document set and compare ingestion, citation behavior and provider configuration against hosted NotebookLM.

5. [dontbesilent2025/dbskill](https://github.com/dontbesilent2025/dbskill) - Business Diagnosis Agent Skills - Score 82
   - 做什么：Chinese business diagnosis toolbox distilled into 21 agent skills for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Trae Solo and similar agent workbenches.
   - 面向谁：Creators, founders, consultants and operators who want repeatable business/content/decision diagnostics inside coding-agent style tools.
   - AI native 点：The product is an agent skill operating system: routing, diagnostics, content systems, decision records, learning flows, state save/restore and report generation are encoded as reusable agent workflows.
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitTrend ranked it #1 in AI Coding Assistant on June 6 with +1.7k stars today; GitHub showed 6.4k stars, 834 forks, 53 commits and a visible v2.14.2 update note.
   - 可运行性判断：Install paths include Claude plugin marketplace commands, npx skills add for Codex/Claude Code, Trae Solo zip packages, and local build scripts.
   - 建议动作：Use as a vertical-skill case study: inspect packaging, routing and state persistence patterns; do not treat it as a generic agent platform benchmark.

6. [phuryn/pm-skills](https://github.com/phuryn/pm-skills) - Product Management Agent Skill Marketplace - Score 80
   - 做什么：PM skill marketplace with 68 skills and 42 chained workflows across 9 plugins for discovery, strategy, execution, launch, growth and AI-built code shipping.
   - 面向谁：Product managers and founders who want structured PM frameworks inside Claude Code, Claude Cowork and Codex-like agent environments.
   - AI native 点：It turns PM methods into executable agent workflows with marketplace/plugin installation, chained commands and framework-specific skills rather than static templates.
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitTrend AI Skills ranked it #10 on June 9 with +486 stars today; GitHub README shows installation for Claude Cowork, Claude Code and Codex CLI plus marketplace screenshots.
   - 可运行性判断：Claude plugin marketplace and Codex plugin marketplace commands are documented; slash command behavior differs by host, which needs practical audit.
   - 建议动作：Watch and sample one discovery-to-PRD workflow. Promote only if chained workflows produce better decisions than a good checklist plus general LLM.

7. [Panniantong/Agent-Reach](https://github.com/Panniantong/Agent-Reach) - Agent Internet Reach CLI - Score 79
   - 做什么：CLI/scaffold that gives agents searchable/readable access to web and social sources including X/Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, Xiaohongshu, Douyin, LinkedIn, RSS and WeChat.
   - 面向谁：Research-agent builders and operators who need broad source collection without implementing every connector from scratch.
   - AI native 点：It packages external-world perception tools for agents with channel setup, diagnostics, dry-run safety and pluggable upstream dependencies.
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitTrend ranked it #3 in AI Agent on June 9 with +1.1k stars today and 24.3k stars; it remained a strong carry-over signal from yesterday.
   - 可运行性判断：README describes CLI/scaffold concepts, doctor/install/safe/dry-run flow and per-channel dependencies, but this run did not clone or test credentials.
   - 建议动作：Track for radar-workflow reuse, but audit credential handling, platform ToS exposure and source-quality controls before using logged-in social channels.

8. [uditgoenka/autoresearch](https://github.com/uditgoenka/autoresearch) - Autonomous Research Skill Loop - Score 77
   - 做什么：Claude/OpenCode/Codex skill that runs a goal-directed modify-verify-keep/discard loop with commands, safety hooks and guided installation.
   - 面向谁：Agent power users trying to automate iterative research, benchmarking, debugging or eval loops inside coding assistants.
   - AI native 点：It formalizes an autonomous agent loop around measurable goals, repeated verification and rollback/keep decisions, exposed as skills and commands across multiple hosts.
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitTrend ranked it #10 in AI Coding Assistant on June 6 with +369 stars today; GitHub README advertises support for Claude Code, OpenCode and OpenAI Codex with 13 commands and 9 safety hooks.
   - 可运行性判断：Guided installer supports OpenCode and Codex, with manual copy fallback into .agents/skills/autoresearch; local behavior still needs a controlled run.
   - 建议动作：Use as a small experiment candidate for this radar itself: test whether it can run a bounded source-collection/evaluation loop without drifting.

## Watchlist

- [tw93/Waza](https://github.com/tw93/Waza) - Engineering Habits Skills - Score 73 - Engineering habits packaged as Claude-runnable skills. 建议：Watch; promote only if it proves more than a skill/prompt collection.
- [obra/superpowers](https://github.com/obra/superpowers) - Agentic Skills Methodology - Score 72 - Agentic skills framework and software-development methodology across Claude, Codex, OpenCode, Cursor, Gemini and Copilot. 建议：Watch as methodology reference; avoid Top unless new product surface emerges.
- [Egonex-AI/Understand-Anything](https://github.com/Egonex-AI/Understand-Anything) - Interactive Code Knowledge Graph - Score 72 - Interactive code knowledge graph with search/Q&A for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot and Gemini CLI. 建议：Compare later against Graphify and CodeGraphContext on one known repo.
- [CodeGraphContext/CodeGraphContext](https://github.com/CodeGraphContext/CodeGraphContext) - Code Context MCP - Score 70 - MCP server plus CLI that indexes local code into a graph database for AI assistants. 建议：Keep in context-engineering watchlist; do not duplicate experiments until one code-graph tool wins.

## Skip Reasons

- [Leonxlnx/taste-skill](https://github.com/Leonxlnx/taste-skill) - High GitTrend rank, but mainly a taste/style skill pack; useful as workflow inspiration, not enough durable UI/CLI/API product surface for today's Top list.
- [affaan-m/ECC](https://github.com/affaan-m/ECC) - Repeated abnormal star velocity and very high headline numbers; product shape still reads closer to agent harness methodology than a validated user-facing product. Requires API/community verification.
- [multica-ai/andrej-karpathy-skills](https://github.com/multica-ai/andrej-karpathy-skills) - Single CLAUDE.md/prompt-methodology style project; downgraded because it lacks a runnable product workflow.
- [FlorianBruniaux/claude-code-ultimate-guide](https://github.com/FlorianBruniaux/claude-code-ultimate-guide) - Documentation/guide repository rather than AI-native product surface.
- [rohitg00/ai-engineering-from-scratch](https://github.com/rohitg00/ai-engineering-from-scratch) - Educational/build-from-scratch content; outside the product-shaped agent/workflow focus.

## 今日趋势观察

1. 垂直 agent 产品正在从“提示词包”升级成领域操作系统：Career-Ops、dbskill、PM Skills 都在把知识、流程、状态和产物交付放进同一个 agent 工作台。
2. Coding agent 进入模型经济学阶段：Reasonix 把 DeepSeek prefix-cache 稳定性当成产品核心，说明下一轮差异化会来自 agent loop 与模型特性的深绑定。
3. Agent UI/前端协议继续升温：CopilotKit 的 AG-UI/generative UI 方向说明“让 agent 进入真实产品界面”仍是高价值基础设施层。
4. 自托管知识工作台有产品化空间：open-notebook 这类 NotebookLM 替代品开始把 Docker、Provider 配置、本地模型和持久化作为第一屏能力。
5. Skills 生态出现两极：一边是可安装、可组合的垂直工作流，另一边是单文件/方法论集合；本雷达继续优先前者。

## 今日建议动作

- 第一优先级：试跑 Career-Ops 的 dummy profile 流程，观察它如何组织 agent、数据契约、PDF 和 tracker。
- 第二优先级：用 Reasonix 做一次小型代码任务，记录 cache 命中、成本、review/apply 体验。
- 第三优先级：用 open-notebook 跑 Docker compose，验证 NotebookLM 替代品的部署摩擦和引用质量。
- 低成本观察：关注 CopilotKit/AG-UI 是否成为多端 agent UI 的事实协议，暂不把纯 skill/prompt spike 当成产品趋势。

## 信息来源

- GitTrend AI Agent: https://gittrend.io/trending/ai-agent
- GitTrend AI Coding Assistant: https://gittrend.io/trending/ai-coding-assistant
- GitTrend AI Skills: https://gittrend.io/trending/ai-skills
- GitTrend DeepSeek-Reasonix repo page: https://gittrend.io/repo/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix
- GitHub README pages: santifer/career-ops、esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix、CopilotKit/CopilotKit、lfnovo/open-notebook、dontbesilent2025/dbskill、phuryn/pm-skills、Panniantong/Agent-Reach、uditgoenka/autoresearch、tw93/Waza、obra/superpowers。

runs.markdownReport:
# Daily AI Native Product Radar - 2026-06-09

数据窗口：2026-06-06 18:17 至 2026-06-09 18:17（Asia/Shanghai）。本次是同日二次运行，更新当天 `data/runs/2026-06-09.*`，重点使用 GitTrend 6 月 6-9 日 AI Agent / AI Coding Assistant / AI Skills 趋势页、GitHub README 页面和定向搜索。

关键假设：本地 `gh` 不存在，本轮没有 clone 或实际运行仓库；GitTrend 的 star velocity 只作为方向性信号，异常高星项目继续降权。筛选偏向真实产品形态、可运行 UI/CLI/API、明确用户场景、安装/文档/截图/演示完整度和复刻价值。

## Top Projects

1. pewdiepie-archdaemon/odysseus - Self-hosted AI Workspace - Score 92
   - GitHub: https://github.com/pewdiepie-archdaemon/odysseus
   - 做什么：Self-hosted AI workspace for chat, agents, deep research, documents, notes/tasks, email/calendar integrations, local/API model backends and admin-gated local tools.
   - 面向谁：Local-first AI users, builders, creators and small teams who want a private ChatGPT/Claude-style workspace they control.
   - AI native 点：The product is an AI operating workspace: LLM chat, agent tools, memory, research, documents, calendar/email and model serving converge into one self-hosted app.
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitTrend ranked it #2 overall on June 8 with +2.2k stars today and 63.9k stars; GitHub README shows 23 commits, 48 issues, 69 PRs, Docker/native/macOS/Windows launchers and a security-heavy setup guide.
   - 可运行性判断：Docker Compose starts the app plus ChromaDB, SearXNG and ntfy; native macOS/Linux/Windows commands are documented; no local run audit performed.
   - 建议动作：High priority trial. Run Docker or macOS launcher locally and inspect agent permissions, admin controls, memory/doc flows and model-provider setup.

2. chopratejas/headroom - Agent Context Compression / MCP - Score 90
   - GitHub: https://github.com/chopratejas/headroom
   - 做什么：Local-first layer that compresses tool outputs, logs, RAG chunks, files and conversation history before they reach an LLM, exposed as library, proxy, wrapper and MCP server.
   - 面向谁：Heavy Claude/Codex/Cursor/Aider/Copilot users and agent-platform builders paying high context/token costs.
   - AI native 点：It attacks agent runtime economics directly: reversible context compression, retrieval-on-demand, cross-agent memory and failure mining become part of the agent loop.
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitTrend ranked it #3 overall on June 8 with +2.0k stars today and 19.0k stars; GitHub page showed 19.6k stars, 1.3k forks, 1,489 commits, 126 issues and 93 PRs.
   - 可运行性判断：pip/npm/Docker install paths, headroom wrap/proxy/MCP commands, benchmarks, docs, examples and tests are present; no local run audit performed.
   - 建议动作：Run a controlled Codex/Claude comparison on the same repo and measure prompt size, retrieval misses and answer quality.

3. nexu-io/open-design - Agent-native Design Studio - Score 88
   - GitHub: https://github.com/nexu-io/open-design
   - 做什么：Local-first open-source Claude Design alternative with native desktop app, design systems, skills/plugins, prototypes, decks, images, video, exports and MCP support for many coding agents.
   - 面向谁：Design/product teams and solo builders using Codex/Claude/Cursor/OpenCode as creative production engines.
   - AI native 点：It turns the coding agent into a design engine: brief, design-system contract, artifact streaming, critique, sandboxed preview and export are the core workflow.
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitTrend ranked it #5 in AI Agent on June 9 with +774 stars today; GitHub page showed 61.9k stars, 6.9k forks, 2,101 commits, 247 issues and 145 PRs.
   - 可运行性判断：Native downloads, CLI/MCP install paths, BYOK proxy, sandboxed iframe previews, HTML/PDF/PPTX/MP4 export and visible product tour are documented; no local run audit performed.
   - 建议动作：Track as a high-value design-agent product. Test whether its DESIGN.md + plugin model can inform internal artifact-generation workflows.

4. tech-leads-club/agent-skills - Agent Skills Registry / Supply Chain - Score 86
   - GitHub: https://github.com/tech-leads-club/agent-skills
   - 做什么：Secure, validated skill registry and CLI/MCP for installing curated skills into Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot, Antigravity and other agents.
   - 面向谁：Teams standardizing reusable agent workflows while worrying about malicious or low-quality skill packs.
   - AI native 点：Agent capability distribution is treated as a supply-chain problem: catalog, lockfiles, hashing, static analysis, path isolation, audit trail and MCP progressive disclosure.
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitHub page showed 4.6k stars, 403 forks and 56 releases; README emphasizes 13.4% vulnerable marketplace-skill baseline and support for Codex, Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot and more.
   - 可运行性判断：npx CLI, global install, list/install/update/remove commands, MCP server setup and security docs are present; no local run audit performed.
   - 建议动作：Compare against local Codex skill installation and audit whether lockfile/hash/audit concepts should be copied into internal skill workflows.

5. safishamsi/graphify - Coding Agent Knowledge Graph - Score 84
   - GitHub: https://github.com/safishamsi/graphify
   - 做什么：AI coding assistant skill that turns code, schemas, scripts, docs, images, video/audio and project artifacts into a queryable knowledge graph for agents.
   - 面向谁：Developers onboarding to large repos or needing agent-readable codebase context across code, infra, docs and media.
   - AI native 点：It gives coding agents a structured project map with inferred relationships, confidence tags, suggested questions and graph-first context retrieval.
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitTrend ranked it #7 overall on June 8 and #3 in AI Skills on June 9 with +1.5k stars today; README lists Codex, Claude Code, OpenCode, Cursor and Gemini CLI support.
   - 可运行性判断：Skill/CLI install paths and broad parser matrix are documented, including 28 tree-sitter grammars and optional Google Workspace/PDF/image/video extraction; no local run audit performed.
   - 建议动作：Run on this radar repo or another known codebase and evaluate if the graph improves agent orientation versus plain rg/file reads.

6. Panniantong/Agent-Reach - Agent Internet Reach CLI - Score 82
   - GitHub: https://github.com/Panniantong/Agent-Reach
   - 做什么：CLI/scaffold that wires agents to searchable/readable sources including web, Twitter/X, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, Xiaohongshu, Douyin, LinkedIn, RSS and WeChat.
   - 面向谁：Research agents and operators who need broad web/social/media collection without building every connector from scratch.
   - AI native 点：It packages the external-world tool layer for agents and exposes channel health/configuration, local credentials, dry-run safety and pluggable upstream tools.
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitTrend ranked it #3 in AI Agent on June 9 with +1.1k stars today; README details channel architecture and current upstream tool choices.
   - 可运行性判断：pip/CLI-style scaffold with doctor/install/safe/dry-run concepts and per-channel dependencies; no local run audit performed.
   - 建议动作：Useful for research-agent experiments, but inspect credential handling and ToS risk before using against logged-in social platforms.

7. openchamber/openchamber - OpenCode Agent Desktop/Web UI - Score 80
   - GitHub: https://github.com/openchamber/openchamber
   - 做什么：Desktop, web/PWA and VS Code interface for the OpenCode AI agent with tunnels, mobile access, session management, branchable timeline and GitHub-native workflows.
   - 面向谁：OpenCode users who want agent sessions outside a raw terminal, especially remote/mobile and editor-adjacent workflows.
   - AI native 点：The product layer is the operating surface around the agent: remote access, session activity, notifications, timeline branching, GitHub issues/PR context and project actions.
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitTrend ranked it #2 in AI Coding Assistant on June 6 with +977 stars today; README shows desktop, web/PWA and VS Code extension surfaces.
   - 可运行性判断：Requires OpenCode CLI; releases, VS Code Marketplace install, web/PWA, desktop and tunnel onboarding paths are documented; no local run audit performed.
   - 建议动作：Watch and compare against Vibe Kanban, Agent Deck and IDE plugins as an agent control surface category.

8. zhukunpenglinyutong/jetbrains-cc-gui - JetBrains Codex / Claude Code GUI - Score 78
   - GitHub: https://github.com/zhukunpenglinyutong/jetbrains-cc-gui
   - 做什么：JetBrains IDE plugin that gives Claude Code and OpenAI Codex a visual programming assistant UI with sessions, file context, images, MCP, skills, diffs and usage analytics.
   - 面向谁：JetBrains users who want Codex/Claude Code inside IDEA-family IDEs with GUI controls and review affordances.
   - AI native 点：It brings agent sessions, permissions, MCP, skills, diffs and code navigation into the IDE as a dedicated product surface.
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitTrend ranked it #4 in AI Coding Assistant on June 6 with +569 stars today; GitHub page showed 1,371 commits and plugin/docs/webview/test structure.
   - 可运行性判断：JetBrains Marketplace install is linked; Gradle plugin repo, docs and bilingual README are present; no local run audit performed.
   - 建议动作：Watch for Codex compatibility maturity and test if JetBrains-native review/diff flows outperform terminal-only coding agents.

## Watchlist

- Egonex-AI/Understand-Anything - Interactive Code Knowledge Graph - Score 75 - https://github.com/Egonex-AI/Understand-Anything - Claude Code plugin and dashboard for interactive codebase knowledge graphs with search/Q&A. 建议：Compare against Graphify; promote only if dashboard workflow proves materially better.
- mvanhorn/last30days-skill - Research Agent Skill - Score 73 - https://github.com/mvanhorn/last30days-skill - Agent skill for researching a topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket and web sources, then synthesizing a grounded brief. 建议：Potentially useful for this radar itself; test source quality and citation discipline.
- SWE-agent/mini-swe-agent - Minimal Coding Agent CLI - Score 72 - https://github.com/SWE-agent/mini-swe-agent - Small AI agent for solving GitHub issues or command-line software tasks. 建议：Watch as a baseline implementation rather than a full product surface.
- CodeGraphContext/CodeGraphContext - Code Context MCP - Score 71 - https://github.com/CodeGraphContext/CodeGraphContext - MCP server plus CLI for indexing local code into a graph database for AI assistants. 建议：Watch alongside Graphify and Understand Anything; avoid duplicate experiments until one stands out.

## Skip Reasons

- affaan-m/ECC: https://github.com/affaan-m/ECC - GitTrend and topic pages show huge star velocity, but prior run already flagged the signal as abnormal; treat as unverified until GitHub API/community validation. Product shape is also closer to an agent harness/skills methodology than a clear user product.
- Leonxlnx/taste-skill: https://github.com/Leonxlnx/taste-skill - High GitTrend rank, but appears to be a taste/style skill pack rather than a runnable AI-native product with a durable UI/CLI/API workflow.
- mattpocock/skills: https://github.com/mattpocock/skills - Likely useful skill directory, but mainly a personal skills collection; does not meet this radar run’s product-surface threshold.
- angelos-p/llm-from-scratch: https://github.com/angelos-p/llm-from-scratch - Educational/training-oriented repository, outside the product-shaped AI agent/workflow focus.

## 今日趋势观察

1. 自托管 AI workspace 重新升温：Odysseus 说明“本地模型 + agent 工具 + 文档/邮件/日历 + 管理权限”正在形成大众可理解的产品形态。
2. 上下文工程正在基础设施化：Headroom 把压缩、可逆检索、agent wrapper、MCP 和失败学习放到同一个 runtime 层，说明 token 成本已经成为产品机会。
3. Skills 进入供应链阶段：Agent Skills、Graphify、last30days-skill、Taste Skill 等说明 skill 不再只是 prompt 文件，安全、安装、版本、来源和可运行性会变成竞争点。
4. Agent GUI 正在贴近具体工作台：Open Design、OpenChamber、JetBrains CC GUI 分别切入设计、OpenCode 和 JetBrains IDE，控制面越来越垂直。
5. 代码知识图谱出现第二波：Graphify / Understand Anything / CodeGraphContext 都在争夺“让 coding agent 先理解项目结构”的入口，短期需要真实代码库试跑区分效果。

## 今日建议动作

- 第一优先级：本地试跑 Odysseus 或 Headroom，一个看产品完整度，一个看 agent runtime 成本。
- 第二优先级：把 Graphify 或 Understand Anything 跑在一个熟悉项目上，比较它们是否真的减少 agent 读代码时间。
- 第三优先级：观察 Open Design 的 DESIGN.md + 插件 + MCP 模型，判断能否迁移到内部设计/文档生成流程。
- 风险控制：对 GitTrend 中几十万 star 的异常项目保持审慎，必须 API/社区二次验证后再进入 Top。

## 信息来源

- GitTrend overall trending: https://gittrend.io/
- GitTrend AI Agent: https://gittrend.io/trending/ai-agent
- GitTrend AI Coding Assistant: https://gittrend.io/trending/ai-coding-assistant
- GitTrend AI Skills: https://gittrend.io/trending/ai-skills
- GitHub README pages: pewdiepie-archdaemon/odysseus、chopratejas/headroom、nexu-io/open-design、tech-leads-club/agent-skills、safishamsi/graphify、Panniantong/Agent-Reach、openchamber/openchamber、zhukunpenglinyutong/jetbrains-cc-gui。

# Daily AI Native Product Radar - 2026-06-08

数据窗口：2026-06-05 10:17 至 2026-06-08 10:17（Asia/Shanghai）。重点查看 GitHub Topic 最近更新列表、仓库 README、可运行入口、demo/screenshots、stars/forks/issues/PR/commits 等页面信号。

关键假设：本地 `gh` 不可用，shell 侧 `curl` 被本机 `127.0.0.1:7890` 代理配置阻断；本轮使用实时 GitHub/AI Native Landscape 网页审计，没有 clone 或实际运行仓库。分数偏向真实产品形态、可运行 UI/CLI/API、文档完整度、近期活跃和可复刻价值；纯指南、模板、awesome list、论文/benchmark、低代码空壳项目降权。

## Top Projects

1. shep-ai/shep - Coding Agent Control Plane - Score 89
   - GitHub: https://github.com/shep-ai/shep
   - 做什么：用 CLI + Web Dashboard 管理多个 AI coding agent 并行开发，每个任务独立 worktree，可自动 commit、push、开 PR、看 CI、失败重试。
   - 面向谁：同时跑 Claude Code、Cursor CLI、Gemini CLI 等 coding agent 的工程团队和独立开发者。
   - AI native 点：产品核心不是写代码本身，而是把多个 agent 的执行生命周期、隔离、审计和 PR 流程产品化。
   - 增长/活跃信号：仓库页显示约 203 stars、31 forks、1,026 commits、63 issues、33 PR；README 有 Shep Cloud、localhost dashboard、CLI、CI auto-fix 等完整产品叙事。
   - 可运行性判断：支持 `npx @shepai/cli`、`npm i -g @shepai/cli`，本地启动 `shep` 打开 `localhost:4050`，具备截图和命令示例；未实际运行。
   - 建议动作：高优先级复刻拆解，重点看 worktree 隔离、agent session 状态机、CI 失败回收和 PR 审批边界。

2. MCPJam/inspector - MCP Debugging / Evaluation Platform - Score 87
   - GitHub: https://github.com/MCPJam/inspector
   - 做什么：面向 MCP servers、MCP apps、ChatGPT apps 的调试、检查、聊天、OAuth、eval、CI/CD 平台。
   - 面向谁：开发和维护 MCP server/app 的工程师、agent 工具团队、平台团队。
   - AI native 点：把 MCP tool/resource/prompt、JSON-RPC trace、OAuth、模型聊天和 eval 放进同一个开发工作台。
   - 增长/活跃信号：仓库页显示约 2k stars、237 forks、3,814 commits、45 issues、56 PR；MCP server Topic 页显示 2026-06-02 更新。
   - 可运行性判断：提供 hosted app、desktop app、`npx @mcpjam/inspector@latest`、Docker 四条路径；README 有 demo、CLI、SDK、CI 说明。
   - 建议动作：作为 MCP 开发工具链标杆，优先试用 hosted/npx 路径，提炼“trace + eval + OAuth debugger”产品模块。

3. dcSpark/shinkai-local-ai-agents - Local No-code Agent Builder - Score 84
   - GitHub: https://github.com/dcSpark/shinkai-local-ai-agents
   - 做什么：两步安装的本地 AI agent 应用，用可视化方式创建本地/远程模型 agent，支持 MCP、加密支付和多 agent 协作。
   - 面向谁：想在本地创建 agent workflow、自动化、个人/团队 assistant 的非专业和半专业用户。
   - AI native 点：agent builder、多 agent orchestration、MCP、local-first、payments/crypto 共同构成产品体验。
   - 增长/活跃信号：mcp-agents Topic 页显示约 427 stars，2026-06-05 更新；README 强调 demo、examples、release 下载和跨平台桌面应用。
   - 可运行性判断：提供 release 下载、一键安装、Tauri desktop、React UI、NX monorepo；未实际运行。
   - 建议动作：放入“local agent app + MCP + no-code builder”观察线，重点验证安装包成熟度和真实 agent 模板质量。

4. gobii-ai/gobii-platform - Always-on AI Workforce Platform - Score 83
   - GitHub: https://github.com/gobii-ai/gobii-platform
   - 做什么：面向团队的 always-on AI coworker 平台，支持 schedule/event 唤醒、真实浏览器操作、webhook、agent 身份、邮件/SMS 入口和 agent-to-agent 协作。
   - 面向谁：希望把 agent 放进生产工作流、自动触发、持续运行的团队和业务自动化开发者。
   - AI native 点：持久 agent、身份、事件队列、浏览器 runtime、密钥/代理/sandbox 控制是核心产品结构。
   - 增长/活跃信号：仓库页显示约 447 stars；README 展示 hosted product、自托管平台、Docker Compose、API quick start 和 production use cases。
   - 可运行性判断：支持 `curl -fsSL https://gobii.ai/install.sh | bash`、`docker compose up --build`、`localhost:8000` 设置；未实际运行。
   - 建议动作：作为“团队级长时运行 agent”样本，拆解 agent identity、schedule/event trigger、browser-use API 兼容层。

5. blackwell-systems/knowing - Code Intelligence MCP / Agent Context Layer - Score 81
   - GitHub: https://github.com/blackwell-systems/knowing
   - 做什么：为 AI coding agent 提供代码关系图、上下文检索、blast radius、test scope、Merkle proof 和 supply-chain audit。
   - 面向谁：大型代码库、平台工程、安全审计、希望减少 agent grep/read 循环的开发团队。
   - AI native 点：agent 通过 MCP 直接查询图谱上下文，系统会随代码变化自动失效旧知识，并输出可验证关系证明。
   - 增长/活跃信号：仓库页显示约 10 stars、1,981 commits；MCP server Topic 页显示 2026-06-02 更新，README 给出 28 MCP tools、38 edge types、benchmark 和多语言 extractors。
   - 可运行性判断：支持 Homebrew、npm、pip、go install，MCP stdio/HTTP 配置完整；未实际运行。
   - 建议动作：列入 coding-agent context plane 复刻候选，优先小仓库验证 `context_for_task`、`blast_radius`、`test_scope`。

6. ictechgy/light_terminal - Agent Terminal Session Daemon - Score 79
   - GitHub: https://github.com/ictechgy/light_terminal
   - 做什么：为 AI coding agent 提供 tmux-compatible 持久 PTY session daemon，支持 Claude、Codex、Gemini、Cursor、Aider、Goose 等 launchers。
   - 面向谁：需要远程/移动查看 agent session、保持终端状态、兼容 tmux/cmux 的开发者。
   - AI native 点：把 agent 运行环境、日志、等待、通知、进程树和 tmux shim 做成稳定 CLI substrate。
   - 增长/活跃信号：ai-agents Topic 页显示约 4 stars，2026-06-03 更新；README 提供 Homebrew、npm、Cargo、smoke test、agent launcher 列表和公共命令契约。
   - 可运行性判断：支持 `brew install ictechgy/tap/lterm`、`npm install -g @ictechgy/lterm`、`cargo install`；未实际运行。
   - 建议动作：作为 agent terminal/runtime substrate 小样本，观察是否能补足 Codex/Claude 长任务会话管理。

7. gambletan/cortex - Local Personal Agent Memory Engine - Score 77
   - GitHub: https://github.com/gambletan/cortex
   - 做什么：本地优先的个人 AI agent memory engine，强调 AES-256-GCM、LoCoMo 分数、快速 ingest、本地数据库和自有云同步。
   - 面向谁：个人 assistant、IM agent、长期记忆型 agent app 开发者。
   - AI native 点：把 episodic/semantic/preference memory、身份解析、检索和 MCP server 作为 agent 的长期记忆层。
   - 增长/活跃信号：MCP server Topic 页显示约 15 stars，2026-06-02 更新；README 有 Rust API、Homebrew、source build 和本地隐私叙事。
   - 可运行性判断：支持 `brew install cortex-mcp-server` 和源码构建；更偏 library/MCP infra，产品 UI 尚弱。
   - 建议动作：加入 memory layer watchlist，和 supermemory/mem0/本地记忆方案对比 API 边界。

8. AgentStaqAI/agentgate - MCP Zero-trust Gateway - Score 75
   - GitHub: https://github.com/AgentStaqAI/agentgate
   - 做什么：MCP 的零信任防火墙和协议桥，代理 MCP traffic，做 allowlist、策略拦截、audit log、HITL approval。
   - 面向谁：把 MCP server 接入生产 agent 的平台/安全/DevOps 团队。
   - AI native 点：解决 agent tool calling 的权限、审计、人工审批和协议桥接问题，是 agent 上生产的治理层。
   - 增长/活跃信号：mcp-agents Topic 页列为 2026 年内活跃项目；README 有 Go binary、install script、Homebrew、配置示例和 HITL 截图。
   - 可运行性判断：支持 one-liner、Homebrew、源码构建，配置样例明确；stars 信号较弱，需验证维护节奏。
   - 建议动作：作为 MCP gateway 安全样本保留，后续和 ToolHive、mcpproxy-go、MCPJam 的治理/调试边界对比。

## Watchlist

- 20alexl/claude-engram - Coding Agent Memory - Score 72 - https://github.com/20alexl/claude-engram - 方向是 Claude Code hook + session intelligence + cross-session search，适合观察 agent memory 是否从工具库走向产品；需要确认跨 agent 支持和安装路径。
- chunxiaoxx/nautilus-compass - Multi-agent Reliability Layer - Score 71 - https://github.com/chunxiaoxx/nautilus-compass - 方向是 cross-dialog contracts、drift detection、black-box memory，不依赖 LLM extraction；需要验证 README 之外是否有稳定 CLI/API。
- moiraweave-labs/moiraweave-cli - Agent Ops CLI - Score 68 - https://github.com/moiraweave-labs/moiraweave-cli - ai-agents Topic 显示为本地 startup、workload templates、runs、agent sessions、deployment flows；0 star 且更新信号偏早，先观察。
- blackwell-systems/knowing - Code Graph Context Layer - Score 81 - https://github.com/blackwell-systems/knowing - 已进 Top，但 adoption 很早；建议在小仓库做一次实际 MCP 工具调用后再提高优先级。

## Skip Reasons

- zebbern/claude-code-guide：https://github.com/zebbern/claude-code-guide - 4.2k stars 且 2026-06-07 更新，但主要是 Claude Code guide/commands/workflows/skills 文档集合，不是可运行产品。
- shanraisshan/claude-code-best-practice：https://github.com/shanraisshan/claude-code-best-practice - stars 异常高，定位更像 best practice/agentic engineering 内容页，缺少清晰产品运行面。
- thinkwee/AgentsMeetRL：https://github.com/thinkwee/AgentsMeetRL - Agentic RL awesome list，偏资料索引，不符合产品形态优先标准。
- Gudvin82/vibe-coding-protocols：https://github.com/Gudvin82/vibe-coding-protocols - 有实用模板价值，但本轮判定为 markdown protocol/template collection。

## 今日趋势观察

1. AI coding agent 生态正在从“单 agent 写代码”转向“多 agent 执行控制面”：worktree、PR、CI、日志、恢复、审批变成核心产品面。
2. MCP 的机会从 server 数量增长转向开发者工具和治理工具：inspector、eval、OAuth debugger、gateway、HITL、audit log 会逐渐标配。
3. 长时运行 agent 产品正在强调身份和触发器：email/SMS/webhook/schedule/event queue 让 agent 更像“可联系的数字同事”。
4. Agent memory/context 层出现分化：个人记忆、代码图谱上下文、session mistake mining 是不同赛道，短期更适合作为基础设施试验。

## 今日建议动作

- 优先试跑 Shep：验证 `npx @shepai/cli`、dashboard、worktree/PR/CI loop 是否真能闭环。
- 用 MCPJam Inspector 调试一个本地 MCP server，把 trace/eval/OAuth debugger 的产品模块拆成可复刻清单。
- 为 Gobii 建一张“always-on agent 平台”卡片，重点看 agent identity、schedule/event trigger、browser task API。
- 选 knowing 或 cortex 做一个 30 分钟小实验，确认 memory/context 层和本地 Codex 工作流的结合点。

## 信息来源

- GitHub Topic: https://github.com/topics/ai-agents?o=desc&s=updated
- GitHub Topic: https://github.com/topics/mcp-agents
- GitHub Topic: https://github.com/topics/mcp-server?o=desc&s=updated
- AI Native Landscape: https://landscape.jimmysong.io/
- 项目仓库 README/页面：shep-ai/shep、MCPJam/inspector、dcSpark/shinkai-local-ai-agents、gobii-ai/gobii-platform、blackwell-systems/knowing、ictechgy/light_terminal、gambletan/cortex、AgentStaqAI/agentgate。

runs.dataWindow: 2026-06-04 12:56 to 2026-06-07 12:56 Asia/Shanghai; GitHub repositories recently updated, newly visible, or showing product traction in AI agents, LLM apps, RAG, MCP, AI workflow, browser/desktop/code/voice agents, assistants, automation, and copilot-style tools.
runs.sourceSummary: Live GitHub topic/search/repository pages and README-level evidence; local gh/GitHub API access was not available, so no clone/run audit was performed.
runs.trendObservations: Agent products are splitting into runtime/CLI, workflow backend/automation, and UI/desktop assistant layers; IM-based agents remain a practical vertical entry; AI workflow platforms are converging with automation tools through MCP and agent actions; trend monitoring and memory layers are becoming reusable agent product infrastructure.
runs.assumptions: Prioritized product-shaped repositories with runnable UI/CLI/API, explicit user scenarios, documentation, demos/examples/screenshots, and visible recent activity. Repeated projects from the 2026-06-05 radar were not re-ranked unless they provided new category context. Growth signals are qualitative page observations and should be API-verified before investment decisions.

# Daily AI Native Product Radar - 2026-06-07

数据窗口：2026-06-04 12:56 至 2026-06-07 12:56（Asia/Shanghai），重点查看 GitHub 近期更新、Topic 新鲜度、README 产品证据、安装路径、demo/examples、issues/PR/release 活跃度。

关键假设：本地 `gh`/GitHub API 仍不可用，本次基于实时 GitHub 页面与 Topic/Search 页面审计；未 clone 或实际运行仓库。分数偏向真实产品形态、可运行 UI/CLI/API、文档完整度、近期活跃和可复刻价值。6 月 5 日已入选的 Dograh、WeKnora、Stagehand、Cua 等项目仅作为趋势背景，今天不重复进入 Top。

## Top Projects

1. NousResearch/hermes-agent - General AI Agent Runtime - Score 91
   - GitHub: https://github.com/NousResearch/hermes-agent
   - 做什么：NousResearch 的通用 agent 项目，围绕 Hermes 模型生态提供可执行 agent 能力。
   - 面向谁：想基于开源模型构建 agent runtime、研究/产品化 agent 行为的开发者和实验团队。
   - AI native 点：模型、agent loop、工具使用和可运行代码是主体，不只是模型权重说明。
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitHub Topic 页面显示约 185k stars、31.8k forks，并在 2026-06-07 更新；体量异常高，需后续用 API 二次确认。
   - 可运行性判断：仓库有 README 与代码入口，但本轮未 clone/run；建议先做依赖与示例审计。
   - 建议动作：加入高优先级复核，确认 stars/README/许可/运行路径是否真实匹配。

2. zhayujie/CowAgent - Agent Workflow / WeChat Assistant - Score 88
   - GitHub: https://github.com/zhayujie/CowAgent
   - 做什么：面向微信、企业微信和飞书的 AI agent 框架，支持任务自动化、上下文理解和工具集成。
   - 面向谁：要把 AI assistant 接入 IM 场景、客服、个人助手或企业流程的开发者。
   - AI native 点：IM 会话、agent 编排、上下文、插件/工具和自动化动作直接组成产品体验。
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitHub Topic 页面显示约 8.1k stars、1.5k forks，2026-06-07 更新。
   - 可运行性判断：项目形态明确，适合从 IM bot 到 workflow assistant 复刻；需要后续验证部署文档和渠道配置门槛。
   - 建议动作：做一张 IM-agent 产品卡，重点看飞书/企微接入、插件机制和安全边界。

3. iOfficeAI/AionUi - AI Agent Web UI - Score 87
   - GitHub: https://github.com/iOfficeAI/AionUi
   - 做什么：Web 端 AI agent UI/工作台，面向多 agent 或 assistant 操作界面。
   - 面向谁：需要给 agent 能力提供桌面式 Web 操作台的产品团队。
   - AI native 点：把 agent 操作、任务、会话和用户交互沉淀到 UI，而不是只提供后端 SDK。
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitHub Topic 页面显示约 3k stars、536 forks，2026-06-07 更新。
   - 可运行性判断：产品 UI 方向清晰；本轮未运行，需要下一步核对 Docker/前端启动方式和截图质量。
   - 建议动作：纳入 UI 形态观察，拆解 agent workspace 的信息架构。

4. jackwener/OpenCLI - AI CLI / Agent Shell - Score 85
   - GitHub: https://github.com/jackwener/OpenCLI
   - 做什么：开源 CLI agent/AI shell 项目，目标是在终端中提供 AI 辅助执行与自动化。
   - 面向谁：命令行重度用户、DevOps、工程自动化和本地 agent 工具开发者。
   - AI native 点：LLM 与 shell/workflow 执行路径结合，CLI 是核心交互面。
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitHub Topic 页面显示约 2k stars、256 forks，2026-06-07 更新。
   - 可运行性判断：CLI 产品形态明确；需要后续验证安装命令、权限模型和命令执行保护。
   - 建议动作：作为 coding/ops agent CLI 候选，优先审计安全策略与任务恢复能力。

5. activepieces/activepieces - AI Workflow Automation - Score 84
   - GitHub: https://github.com/activepieces/activepieces
   - 做什么：开源自动化平台，正在把 AI、MCP、agent workflows 和应用连接器合并到低代码流程里。
   - 面向谁：运营、增长、内部工具、SaaS 自动化和 AI workflow 团队。
   - AI native 点：AI agent/action 逐步成为 workflow 节点，与 280+ integrations 和自托管平台结合。
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitHub Topic 页面显示约 18.7k stars、2.8k forks，2026-06-06 更新。
   - 可运行性判断：成熟产品形态，通常具备 Docker/前后端/connector 结构；本轮未重复深跑。
   - 建议动作：跟踪 AI workflow 节点和 MCP 连接器，作为 Zapier+n8n+agent 方向标杆。

6. CherryHQ/cherry-studio - Desktop AI Assistant - Score 83
   - GitHub: https://github.com/CherryHQ/cherry-studio
   - 做什么：跨平台桌面 AI assistant，整合多模型、对话、知识和生产力工作流。
   - 面向谁：重度 AI 用户、知识工作者和需要本地桌面 assistant 的团队。
   - AI native 点：多模型、多会话、知识工作台和桌面入口构成完整 AI app，而非 SDK。
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitHub Topic 页面显示约 31.9k stars、3k forks，2026-06-07 更新。
   - 可运行性判断：桌面产品成熟，通常有 release/app 交付；本轮主要观察近期活跃，不重复审计基础功能。
   - 建议动作：作为桌面 assistant 体验标杆，关注 plugin/MCP/本地知识库演进。

7. santifer/career-ops - Vertical AI Workflow App - Score 80
   - GitHub: https://github.com/santifer/career-ops
   - 做什么：垂直职业运营/求职流程自动化项目，用 AI 支撑简历、申请和跟进流程。
   - 面向谁：求职者、职业教练、个人效率工具开发者。
   - AI native 点：把 LLM 放进具体业务流，产品价值来自端到端任务完成，而不是泛聊天。
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitHub Topic 页面显示约 716 stars、105 forks，2026-06-07 更新。
   - 可运行性判断：垂直场景明确，适合复刻；需要后续确认 UI、数据模型和第三方集成。
   - 建议动作：作为“垂直 workflow agent”样本拆解，关注 onboarding 和任务闭环。

8. MotiaDev/motia - Evented AI Workflow Backend - Score 79
   - GitHub: https://github.com/MotiaDev/motia
   - 做什么：面向 API、events、background jobs 和 agentic workflow 的统一后端框架。
   - 面向谁：需要把 agent 步骤与生产后端事件流整合的工程团队。
   - AI native 点：把 agent/workflow 运行纳入事件驱动 backend，而不是独立脚本。
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitHub Topic 页面显示约 7.6k stars、556 forks，2026-06-06 更新。
   - 可运行性判断：框架/平台形态较成熟，适合做 agent workflow backend 评估；需验证 AI examples 深度。
   - 建议动作：观察其与 Mastra、Activepieces、LangGraph 类项目在 workflow runtime 上的分工。

## Watchlist

- sansan0/TrendRadar - Trend Monitoring Agent - Score 74 - GitHub Topic 页面显示约 3.6k stars、386 forks，2026-06-07 更新；方向契合“自动化雷达”，但需要确认数据源、调度和消息投递是否产品化。
- supermemoryai/supermemory - Memory API / Knowledge Layer - Score 76 - 约 13.3k stars、1.2k forks，2026-06-07 更新；长期价值高，但更偏基础设施，等更多 agent app 样例。
- upstash/context7 - MCP Documentation Context - Score 77 - 约 26.8k stars、1.4k forks，2026-06-07 更新；MCP 文档上下文很强，但更像 agent infra。
- FlowiseAI/Flowise - Low-code LLM App Builder - Score 75 - 约 45.2k stars、24.1k forks，2026-06-06 更新；成熟度高，本次作为基准观察，避免每日重复入 Top。

## Skip Reasons

- zed-industries/zed：编辑器产品很强，虽然 AI 相关活跃，但本轮重点是 AI-native product 仓库，Zed 的主体仍是编辑器平台。
- public-apis/public-apis：大型 API 列表，非 AI 产品、agent、RAG 或 workflow app。
- drawdb-io/drawdb：数据库设计工具，产品形态清晰但 AI native 属性不足。
- OpenBB-finance/OpenBB：金融平台成熟，但本轮没有足够信号说明近期 AI-native 功能是核心变化。

## 今日趋势观察

1. Agent 产品正在分化成三层：底层 agent runtime/CLI，中层 workflow backend/automation，上层 agent UI/desktop assistant。
2. IM/飞书/企微类 agent 仍是最容易落地的垂直入口，因为输入、身份、通知和审批天然存在。
3. AI workflow 平台正在靠近传统 automation 平台，MCP/agent action 会成为连接器市场的新增长点。
4. “趋势监控/知识雷达/记忆层”开始变成 agent 产品的基础能力，值得和本自动化流程互相借鉴。

## 今日建议动作

- 优先复核 NousResearch/hermes-agent 的异常高 star/fork 信号，确认是否为真实产品增长。
- 选 CowAgent 或 career-ops 做一次垂直 workflow agent 拆解，关注从触发到交付结果的闭环。
- 把 AionUi、Cherry Studio、OpenCLI 放入“agent UI/CLI 交互形态”对比表。
- 观察 Activepieces/Motia 如何把 agent 步骤接入生产 workflow runtime。

# Daily AI Native Product Radar - 2026-06-05

数据窗口：2026-06-02 10:21 至 2026-06-05 10:21（Asia/Shanghai）。

关键假设：GitHub API 在本地不可用（`gh` 未安装，`api.github.com` DNS 失败），因此本次采用实时 GitHub 仓库页/README 证据；未 clone 或实际运行仓库。分数偏向产品形态、可运行性、场景清晰度、近期活跃与可复刻价值。

## Top Projects

1. dograh-hq/dograh - Voice Agent Platform - Score 92
   - GitHub: https://github.com/dograh-hq/dograh
   - 做什么：开源、自托管的 Vapi/Retell 替代方案，用拖拽工作流构建生产级语音 agent。
   - 面向谁：要部署客服、销售、电话自动化或语音交互流程的团队。
   - AI native 点：LLM/STT/TTS/BYOK、MCP native、telephony、workflow builder 是核心产品面。
   - 增长/活跃信号：约 4.2k stars、842 forks、535 commits、16 issues、12 PRs，README 有产品截图、文档、云端入口和对比表。
   - 可运行性判断：有 `docker-compose.yaml`、`docker-compose-local.yaml`、API/UI/SDK/docs/examples；适合优先本地复刻。
   - 建议动作：优先试跑本地 Docker，拆解 workflow builder + voice runtime 架构。

2. Tencent/WeKnora - RAG Knowledge Agent Platform - Score 90
   - GitHub: https://github.com/tencent/WeKnora
   - 做什么：把文档转成可查询 RAG、自治推理 agent 和自维护 Wiki。
   - 面向谁：企业知识库、内部问答、IM 知识助手、私有化 RAG 团队。
   - AI native 点：ReAct agent、MCP 工具、web search、Wiki Mode、知识图谱、Feishu/Notion/Yuque 同步和 IM 渠道集成。
   - 增长/活跃信号：约 15.1k stars、1.9k forks、1,670 commits、153 issues、30 PRs；v0.5.2 更新包含 MCP HITL approval、Wiki graph、Yuque connector、CLI preview。
   - 可运行性判断：仓库包含 frontend、docker、helm、mcp-server、cli、docs、examples、docker-compose。
   - 建议动作：跟踪 Yuque/Feishu connector + agentic wiki，抽取为内部知识库实验。

3. github/gh-aw - Agentic Workflow CLI - Score 88
   - GitHub: https://github.com/github/gh-aw
   - 做什么：用自然语言 Markdown 编写 agentic workflow，并在 GitHub Actions 中运行。
   - 面向谁：希望把 issue triage、代码维护、自动修复、仓库运营流程放进 CI 的工程团队。
   - AI native 点：agent workflow 作为 repo 原生工件，支持 Copilot、Claude、Codex、Gemini，并带 guardrails 与 human approval。

## Watchlist

- ag-ui-protocol/ag-ui - Agent UI Protocol - Score 74 - 14k stars、2,046 commits；`npx create-ag-ui-app` 很顺手，但更偏协议/SDK，等更多产品化 app 模板出现。
- faramesh/faramesh-core - Agent Governance - Score 72 - 60 stars、250 commits、v0.2.0 on May 24；agent tool-call policy daemon 很有趋势价值，但当前更偏治理基础设施。
- openai/codex - Coding Agent CLI - Score 78 - 88.6k stars、7,150 commits；产品影响力极强，但非今日新发现，作为生态基准观察。
- humanlayer/12-factor-agents - Agent Engineering Reference - Score 68 - 原则型内容仓库，适合作为设计参考，不进入产品 Top。

## Skip Reasons

- Supersynergy/awesome-ai-agents-2025：awesome list/目录型内容，缺少单一可运行产品面。
- G1o22/awesome-ai-agents-2026：聚合列表，存在大量二手描述，适合作为发现源，不适合作为 Top 项目。
- VoltAgent/awesome-ai-agent-papers：论文列表，主要是研究导航，非可运行产品。
- QAInsights/awesome-ai-tools：工具清单/目录，缺少可运行仓库产品形态。

## 今日趋势观察

1. Voice agent 开源栈开始从“demo assistant”走向“可部署平台”：Dograh 面向 Vapi/Retell 替代，local-voice-ai 面向单容器私有化。
2. Desktop/browser agent 的主战场在可靠性：Cua 强调后台 computer-use，Stagehand 强调自然语言与代码混合、缓存、自愈。
3. RAG 产品正在合并 agent、wiki、IM、连接器与 MCP 审批：WeKnora 的 v0.5.2 是比较清晰的企业知识产品样本。
4. Agent governance 变成独立层：Faramesh 把每次 tool call 变成可审计政策决策，值得后续跟踪。

## 今日建议动作

- 先试跑 Dograh 或 local-voice-ai，建立 voice-agent 可运行样板。
- 用 Stagehand/Cua 对比一个固定网页任务，观察“可重复执行”和“恢复失败”的工程设计。
- 为 WeKnora 做一张 RAG+Wiki+IM+MCP approval 的产品拆解卡。

# Daily AI Native Product GitHub Radar - 2026-06-04

数据窗口：2026-06-01T02:17:12Z to 2026-06-04T02:22:12Z

信息来源：实时 Web/GitHub 搜索与公开仓库页；参考本地 2026-06-02 和 2026-06-03 radar，降低重复项目权重。当前 shell 环境无 gh CLI，curl 对 api.github.com 未返回可用内容，因此未使用 GitHub API 增强；本轮未 clone 或本地运行仓库，可运行性基于 README、安装入口、examples/demo/docker/API/CLI 信号判断。

## Top Projects

### 1. smart-mcp-proxy/mcpproxy-go
- GitHub: https://github.com/smart-mcp-proxy/mcpproxy-go
- 分类：MCP Gateway / Agent Tooling Infrastructure
- AI Native Product Score：88
- 做什么：Go 实现的 MCP 代理/网关，把多个 MCP server 的接入、路由和管理集中到一个更可部署的服务层。
- 面向谁：需要把内部工具、SaaS API、数据源统一接入 Claude/Cursor/Codex 等 agent 客户端的平台工程团队。
- AI native 点：核心价值是让 agent 工具调用从“本地配置文件”升级为可运维、可治理的工具网关。
- 增长/活跃信号：MCP gateway/proxy 在近期搜索中显著增多，说明团队开始从单个 MCP server 转向工具层基础设施。
- 可运行性判断：Go 服务形态清晰，预期具备 CLI/服务端启动路径；本轮未 clone，需下一步核验 config、auth、multi-server routing 和日志。
- 建议动作：优先试跑。用 3 个 MCP server 组成最小工具网关，验证鉴权、路由、失败隔离和审计日志。

### 2. openswarm-os/openswarm
- GitHub: https://github.com/openswarm-os/openswarm
- 分类：Multi-agent Workflow / Agent OS
- AI Native Product Score：86
- 做什么：面向多 agent 协作的开源工作流/运行环境，强调把多个专长 agent 组织成可执行任务系统。
- 面向谁：需要构建 research、coding、ops、support 等多角色 agent workflow 的 AI 产品团队。
- AI native 点：产品形态围绕 agent 编排、任务分解、工具调用和协作状态，而不是单次 chatbot。
- 增长/活跃信号：multi-agent/agent OS 在近期搜索中继续升温，且和 OpenHands、Mastra、VoltAgent 形成不同层级的对照。
- 可运行性判断：仓库定位偏 runtime/workbench，需进一步核验 demo、CLI/UI、状态可观测性和失败恢复。
- 建议动作：Watch + 小样复刻。用“自动研究一个 GitHub 项目并输出复刻计划”测试多 agent 协作质量。

### 3. 1mcp-app/agent
- GitHub: https://github.com/1mcp-app/agent
- 分类：MCP Agent Client / Tool Aggregation
- AI Native Product Score：84
- 做什么：围绕 MCP 工具生态构建 agent/client，把多工具接入、任务执行和用户交互放在同一产品面。
- 面向谁：想把 MCP 从开发者配置变成可用 agent 应用的个人用户、开发者和内部工具团队。
- AI native 点：agent 能力来自工具生态聚合，用户价值来自“自然语言目标 -> MCP 工具链执行”。
- 增长/活跃信号：MCP client/agent 类项目在 72 小时窗口内出现频繁，说明协议侧需求开始向终端产品迁移。
- 可运行性判断：需要核验桌面/CLI/UI 入口、MCP server 配置和示例任务完整度；本轮未本地运行。
- 建议动作：加入 MCP agent client 横评，重点比较配置成本、工具发现、执行日志和权限提示。

### 4. hyprmcp/jetski
- GitHub: https://github.com/hyprmcp/jetski
- 分类：MCP Server Management / Agent Tool Discovery
- AI Native Product Score：82
- 做什么：围绕 MCP server 发现、安装或管理的工具，目标是降低 agent 工具接入成本。
- 面向谁：频繁试用 MCP server、需要管理多工具环境的 AI 工程师和团队。
- AI native 点：agent 的生产力取决于可用工具集，Jetski 这类管理层项目解决“工具如何被找到、安装、启用”的关键摩擦。
- 增长/活跃信号：MCP server 数量快速增长后，registry/manager/proxy 类项目开始变成新层级。
- 可运行性判断：需下一步确认命令行安装、server manifest 兼容性和是否支持主流 MCP client。
- 建议动作：Watch。若支持一键安装/启用多个 server，可进入 MCP 工具链复刻实验。

### 5. BrowserOperator/browser-operator-core
- GitHub: https://github.com/BrowserOperator/browser-operator-core
- 分类：Browser Agent / Web Task Automation
- AI Native Product Score：81
- 做什么：面向浏览器任务执行的 agent core，让 AI 根据目标理解网页、规划动作并操作页面。
- 面向谁：做网页自动化、QA、运营后台流程、数据采集和表单处理的开发团队。
- AI native 点：浏览器被抽象成 agent execution environment，核心是页面理解、动作选择、上下文恢复和任务完成度。
- 增长/活跃信号：Webwright、browser-use、Skyvern、Playwright MCP 之外仍有新 browser-agent core 出现，赛道继续扩散。
- 可运行性判断：核心库形态明确，需审计 examples、模型配置、浏览器依赖和失败处理；本轮未运行。
- 建议动作：放入 browser-agent benchmark 候选，用同一表单/后台任务测成功率。

### 6. gerkensm/callcenter.js-mcp
- GitHub: https://github.com/gerkensm/callcenter.js-mcp
- 分类：Voice Agent / Call Center MCP
- AI Native Product Score：78
- 做什么：把 call center/电话交互能力接入 MCP，使 agent 可以围绕电话客服或语音流程调用工具。
- 面向谁：想把客服、电话机器人、工单和 CRM 动作连起来的 voice-agent 实验团队。
- AI native 点：语音交互、业务工具和 agent 调用协议结合，适合从“聊天助手”进入真实电话工作流。
- 增长/活跃信号：voice agent 从通用实时框架向垂直场景移动，电话/客服是最早有 ROI 的方向之一。
- 可运行性判断：MCP server/JS 形态易于接入，但需核验电话 provider、凭证配置和 demo；本轮未运行。
- 建议动作：复刻候选。做一个只读客服场景：来电摘要 -> 查询知识库 -> 生成工单建议。

### 7. relevanceai/file-search-mcp
- GitHub: https://github.com/relevanceai/file-search-mcp
- 分类：RAG / File Search MCP
- AI Native Product Score：77
- 做什么：通过 MCP 暴露文件搜索/检索能力，让 agent 能围绕本地或托管文件执行问答与检索任务。
- 面向谁：需要给 Claude/Cursor/自建 agent 加入文件级 RAG 搜索的开发者和知识库团队。
- AI native 点：RAG 从独立应用后端变成 agent 可调用工具，适合嵌入多步骤工作流。
- 增长/活跃信号：RAG-MCP 连接器仍持续出现，说明检索能力正在协议化。
- 可运行性判断：MCP server 形态明确，需核验索引流程、文件权限、查询延迟和返回格式。
- 建议动作：Watch + 横评。与 Context7、Graphiti、传统向量库接入做检索质量对照。

### 8. alejandroqh/repo39
- GitHub: https://github.com/alejandroqh/repo39
- 分类：Code Agent Context / Repository Search
- AI Native Product Score：73
- 做什么：面向 agent 的代码仓库理解/检索工具，目标是帮助 coding agent 更快定位 repo 中相关上下文。
- 面向谁：构建 coding agent、代码审查 agent 或需要大仓库语义检索的工程团队。
- AI native 点：把代码库上下文供给做成 agent 的基础能力，直接影响自动编码、审查和修复质量。
- 增长/活跃信号：coding-agent 热潮带动 repo search/context layer 项目出现；项目仍早期，适合观察而非立即生产使用。
- 可运行性判断：需核验 CLI/API、索引方式、语言覆盖和与现有 agent 的集成方式；本轮未运行。
- 建议动作：保留 Watch/实验。用本仓库做索引测试，看是否能提升 issue triage 上下文命中。

## Watchlist

### superplan-md/superplan-plugin
- GitHub: https://github.com/superplan-md/superplan-plugin
- 分类：Agent Planning / IDE Workflow
- Score：72
- 简述：面向 AI/code agent 的计划与任务组织插件，可能补足 coding agent 的长期任务管理。
- 建议动作：等文档、IDE 集成和真实 demo 更明确后再升 Top。

### modelcontextprotocol/registry
- GitHub: https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/registry
- 分类：MCP Registry / Ecosystem Infrastructure
- Score：72
- 简述：MCP server 发现和分发基础设施方向重要，但更像生态底座而非单一产品。
- 建议动作：持续跟踪 registry 标准，作为 MCP manager/proxy 项目的兼容性基准。

### HexStrike-AI/HexStrike-AI
- GitHub: https://github.com/HexStrike-AI/HexStrike-AI
- 分类：Security Agent / MCP Offensive Security
- Score：71
- 简述：安全 agent + MCP 工具编排信号强，但风险边界和使用约束需要仔细审计。
- 建议动作：只做防御/授权测试场景评估，关注权限、审计和安全 disclaimer。

### Canner/WrenAI
- GitHub: https://github.com/Canner/WrenAI
- 分类：AI Data Analyst / BI Copilot
- Score：70
- 简述：数据分析 assistant 产品形态成熟，今天未进入 Top 是因为近期新增信号弱于 MCP/agent infra。
- 建议动作：作为“AI analyst”产品基线保留，后续看 release 和企业连接器更新。

## Skip Reasons

- Significant-Gravitas/AutoGPT：历史影响大，但今天窗口内不是新产品信号，且已不适合作为新增 radar Top。
- langchain-ai/langchain、run-llama/llama_index：基础框架生态重要，但本简报优先产品型应用、agent workbench、MCP 工具链。
- awesome-*、prompt collection、course/tutorial 仓库：可作为发现源，不进入产品雷达 Top。
- paper reproduction、benchmark-only、thin SDK wrapper：缺少明确用户场景或可运行产品面，统一降权。
- 只有 README、无代码/无示例/无安装入口的营销仓库：跳过，不伪造为 GitHub repo 条目。

## 今日趋势观察

1. MCP 的新增机会从 server 本身转向 gateway、registry、manager、client 和垂直业务 connector。
2. Browser agent 竞争焦点变成可治理执行：权限、审计、失败恢复和 human-in-the-loop 比单纯能点网页更重要。
3. Voice agent 正向电话客服、会议、质检等具体工作流落地，MCP 会成为语音 agent 连接业务系统的常见协议。
4. Coding agent 的下一层基础设施是 repo context、计划管理、执行边界和安全审计。
5. “产品形态”越来越体现在安装路径、demo、执行日志、权限配置和失败处理，而不是 README 里的 agent 概念。

## 今日建议动作

- 优先复刻：MCP Gateway 最小实验。用 mcpproxy-go 连接 file-search、GitHub/本地 repo search、一个 SaaS MCP server，观察 agent 工具发现和日志。
- 第二优先：Browser-agent benchmark。把 BrowserOperator 加入 Webwright/browser-use/Skyvern/Playwright MCP 同题横评。
- 第三优先：Voice-agent MCP 实验。用 callcenter.js-mcp 设计只读客服闭环，暂不接真实外呼。
- 长期跟踪：MCP registry 标准变化，决定后续项目卡片是否按 server/manager/proxy/client 分层维护。

## 关键假设

- 本轮增长信号为 2026-06-04 运行时公开搜索和仓库页快照，可能随 GitHub 索引和 star/update 快速变化。
- 当前环境无法用 gh CLI 或 GitHub API 做数值增强，未声称精确 star 增长。
- 本轮未 clone/执行仓库；所有可运行性为 README、仓库结构、安装入口和产品面信号判断。
- 已在 2026-06-02/2026-06-03 Top 出现的项目，今天只在有新趋势价值时进入 Watchlist 或跳过原因。

- sindresorhus/awesome: awesome/list 类型可作为发现源，不进入产品排名。
- modelcontextprotocol/servers: MCP 参考/聚合价值高，但今天更关注 Render/Railway 这类垂直平台 MCP。
- HumanLayer/12-factor-agents: 方法论文/工程原则价值高，适合修订 rubric，不作为产品型 Top 项目。
- 纯 prompt collection、benchmark-only、paper reproduction、thin SDK wrapper：本轮统一降权或跳过。

## 今日趋势观察

1. Browser agent 正从“能点网页”进入“企业级可治理自动化”：Webwright/Skyvern/browser-use/Playwright MCP 的差异开始落在权限、监督、失败恢复、审计与部署形态上。
2. MCP 进入垂直平台连接器阶段：GitHub MCP 之后，Render/Railway 这类 PaaS 控制面开始变成 agent 可调用工具。
3. Voice agent 更接近真实 AI-native 产品形态：LiveKit Agents/Pipecat 把实时音频、LLM、TTS、工具和会话状态合成新的交互层。
4. Agent 安全和治理开始出现产品位：agent-discover-scanner 说明企业会先问“我们到底部署了哪些 agent、它们能做什么”。
5. TypeScript agent runtime 赛道开始拥挤：VoltAgent 与 Mastra 都在争夺“AI app backend”的开发者心智，值得用同一任务压测。

## 今日建议动作

- 优先复刻：企业后台表单 browser-agent benchmark。输入自然语言任务，比较 Webwright、Skyvern、browser-use、Playwright MCP 的成功率、审计轨迹和失败恢复。
- 第二优先：PaaS MCP DevOps agent。用 Railway/Render MCP 做“读部署状态 -> 总结问题 -> 建议操作”的只读闭环。
- 第三优先：语音 agent demo。用 LiveKit Agents 做一个低延迟会议行动项或客服质检原型。

## 关键假设

- GitHub star/update/release 为 2026-06-03 运行时公开页面和搜索结果快照，可能快速变化。

- 已在 2026-06-02 Top 中出现的项目，今天只在有新对照价值时进入 Watchlist。

- AI native 点：把模型能力嵌入代码审查工作流，输出可追踪、可落地的 review comment，而不是一次性聊天建议。
- 增长/活跃信号：本轮搜索中作为明确产品型 AI code review 仓库出现，组织背书强，场景清晰。
- 可运行性判断：README/仓库结构指向可部署服务与平台集成；本轮未跑通实际 PR 评论。
- 建议动作：加入复刻候选：最小化实现“PR diff -> AI review -> GitHub comment”的闭环。

### 7. microsoft/playwright-mcp
- GitHub: https://github.com/microsoft/playwright-mcp
- 分类：MCP Browser Automation
- AI Native Product Score：82
- 做什么：把 Playwright 浏览器自动化能力作为 MCP server 暴露给 agents。
- 面向谁：需要让 agent 操作网页、做测试、抽取信息或执行浏览器任务的开发者。
- AI native 点：把浏览器动作标准化成协议层工具，便于不同 agent 客户端共享网页控制能力。
- 增长/活跃信号：上一轮 watchlist 后，本轮 MCP/browser-agent 搜索仍高频相关；作为协议层基础设施价值上升。
- 可运行性判断：MCP server 产品面明确，适合本地接入 agent client；本轮未执行端到端测试。
- 建议动作：与 browser-use/Skyvern 做分层比较：协议工具层、agent runtime 层、业务产品层。

### 8. crafter-station/agent-swarm
- GitHub: https://github.com/crafter-station/agent-swarm

- AI Native Product Score：78
- 做什么：面向多 agent 协作的编排/运行框架，目标是让多个角色 agent 分工完成任务。

- AI native 点：产品核心是 agent group 的任务拆解、协调和上下文流转，而不是单 assistant。

- 可运行性判断：需要进一步审计 README 示例、安装路径和真实 demo；本轮先低分保留。
- 建议动作：Watch；只有当示例和真实任务闭环清楚时再升级为项目卡片。

## Watchlist

### microsoft/magentic-ui
- GitHub: https://github.com/microsoft/magentic-ui
- 分类：Browser + Local Files Agent UI
- Score：80
- 简述：仍是 browser/file-system supervised agent UI 的关键参照；本轮无足够新信号进入 Top。
- 建议动作：等待下一次 release 或 demo 级变化，再做深挖。

### openai/codex
- GitHub: https://github.com/openai/codex
- 分类：Code Agent CLI
- Score：79
- 简述：继续作为 coding-agent CLI baseline；今天更适合把它用作 Gemini CLI/opencode 对照组。
- 建议动作：对比 CLI 安装、sandbox、diff review、命令执行授权。

### browser-use/browser-use
- GitHub: https://github.com/browser-use/browser-use
- 分类：Browser Agent Runtime
- Score：77
- 简述：browser-agent runtime 成熟基线，今天被 Skyvern / Playwright MCP 分别从产品层和协议层补足。
- 建议动作：做三层对照表：browser-use、Skyvern、playwright-mcp。

### HumanLayer/12-factor-agents
- GitHub: https://github.com/HumanLayer/12-factor-agents
- 分类：Agent Product Methodology
- Score：70
- 简述：不是可运行产品，但对判断 agent 产品工程质量很有价值。
- 建议动作：用于修订评分 Rubric，不进入 Top 项目。

## Skip Reasons

- awesome/curated list：可作为发现源，但不是可运行产品。
- prompt collection / system prompt pack：缺少独立 runtime 或清晰用户场景时跳过。
- paper reproduction / benchmark-only：即使 star 增长快，也不符合 AI Native Product 口径。
- thin SDK wrapper：只封装模型 API、没有 UI/CLI/API 工作流时降权。

## 今日趋势观察

1. Terminal coding agent 正在从单点产品进入横评期：Gemini CLI、opencode、Codex、Claude Code 的差异会落在权限、上下文、diff、shell 执行和恢复能力上。
2. MCP 的产品价值开始从“接工具”变成“补上下文和接平台”：GitHub MCP Server 负责开发对象，Context7 负责最新文档，Playwright MCP 负责浏览器动作。
3. Browser agent 正在分层：Playwright MCP 是协议工具层，browser-use 是 runtime 层，Skyvern 更接近可交付业务自动化产品。
4. AI code review 是值得复刻的窄闭环：输入 PR diff，输出结构化 review comment，最容易形成可验证的产品体验。

## 关键假设

- GitHub star/release/update 信息为 2026-06-02 运行时页面和搜索结果快照。
- 本轮未本地 clone/运行仓库；可运行性为 README 和仓库结构审计。
- 评分优先产品形态、真实 workflow、安装路径、demo/docs 和最近活跃，而不是单纯 star 数。
- 对已在 2026-05-31 Top 出现的项目，除非有新 release 或新角度，本轮只放入 Watchlist/对照组。

runs.sourceSummary: Real-time GitHub repository pages and GitHub/topic search results opened during this run; prior local radar JSON from 2026-05-30 was checked to avoid repeating yesterday's agent-memory-heavy focus. No repositories were cloned or executed locally; runnable status is judged from README, release, directory, Docker, CLI, example, and demo signals visible on GitHub.
runs.trendObservations: Today's strongest AI-native product signal moved from memory servers toward agent control planes and execution substrates: visual workflow builders, long-horizon super-agent harnesses, terminal/desktop coding agents, browser-operating agents, and secure sandboxes for AI-generated code. Mature projects are increasingly exposing multiple surfaces at once: UI plus CLI plus API plus MCP/extensions, which makes them more product-like than single SDK wrappers.
runs.assumptions: Scores prioritize product-shaped repositories with runnable UI/CLI/API, clear user workflow, concrete install path, examples/demo/docs, and recent release or visible activity. Star counts and release dates are approximate snapshots from GitHub pages at run time and may change quickly. For repos already covered in previous runs, inclusion requires a new angle or a recent release signal. Pure paper repos, prompt collections, awesome lists, benchmark-only repos, and thin SDK wrappers are downgraded or skipped.
