# Daily AI Native Product GitHub Radar - 2026-05-30

数据窗口：2026-05-27T00:00:00Z to 2026-05-30T03:17:45Z; GitHub repositories created, recently crawled, recently updated, or showing visible star growth in the last 24-72 hours

信息来源：GitHub repository pages and search snippets opened during this run, a current Reddit/GitHub-growth roundup surfaced by web search, and prior local radar runs to avoid repeating stale themes. Shell curl to api.github.com failed because DNS was unavailable in the sandbox, so repository metadata was audited via browser-accessible pages/snippets rather than GitHub API cloning.

## Top Projects

### 1. tinyhumansai/openhuman
- GitHub: https://github.com/tinyhumansai/openhuman
- 分类：AI Companion / Human-like Agent Product
- AI Native Product Score：92
- 做什么：Open-source product for building persistent AI humans/companions with memory, voice, avatar, and app-like interaction surface.
- 面向谁：Builders exploring AI companions, digital humans, coaching/education assistants, and consumer-facing agent experiences.
- AI native 点：The product is not a wrapper around chat; identity, persistence, multimodal interaction, and relationship memory are the core product primitives.
- 增长/活跃信号：Surfaced in a current fastest-growing AI repo roundup with roughly 17k stars and about +15k weekly growth; GitHub page was reachable during the run.
- 可运行性判断：README/product framing indicates a concrete open-source app surface rather than only a paper or prompt collection; marked for hands-on audit before production use.
- 建议动作：Create a project card and run a local install audit next; compare memory/avatar/voice architecture with consumer companion products.

### 2. colbymchenry/codegraph
- GitHub: https://github.com/colbymchenry/codegraph
- 分类：Code Agent Context / MCP Code Intelligence
- AI Native Product Score：91
- 做什么：Local pre-indexed code knowledge graph for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, OpenCode, Gemini, and other coding agents.
- 面向谁：Developers and engineering teams that ask coding agents to work inside large repositories.
- AI native 点：It directly changes agent context acquisition by exposing repository structure, semantic search, call graphs, and impact analysis through local CLI/MCP tooling.
- 增长/活跃信号：Continues to appear in recent AI repo growth signals after the 2026-05-28 radar; prior local run recorded about 29.8k stars and a recent v0.9.5 release on 2026-05-25.
- 可运行性判断：README documents one-line install paths, npx/npm usage, codegraph init, and local operation without API keys.
- 建议动作：Keep as benchmark project; run it against this repo and one larger repo to measure agent tool-call/token reduction.

### 3. supertone-inc/supertonic
- GitHub: https://github.com/supertone-inc/supertonic
- 分类：Realtime Voice Agent / Local TTS
- AI Native Product Score：89
- 做什么：Open-source neural text-to-speech stack optimized for expressive local speech synthesis and voice-agent use cases.
- 面向谁：Voice-agent builders, local AI app developers, audio product teams, and researchers shipping interactive speech UX.
- AI native 点：Low-latency expressive voice output is a core interface layer for voice agents, not a secondary media export feature.
- 增长/活跃信号：Surfaced in a current fastest-growing AI repo roundup with roughly 6.8k stars and about +5.5k weekly growth.
- 可运行性判断：Repository presents runnable open-source TTS code rather than a paper-only asset; needs local dependency/GPU audit before deeper recommendation.
- 建议动作：Add to voice-agent watchlist and test minimal synthesis path; compare latency and voice quality against hosted TTS APIs.

### 4. CloakHQ/CloakBrowser
- GitHub: https://github.com/CloakHQ/CloakBrowser
- 分类：Browser Agent / Privacy-preserving Automation
- AI Native Product Score：87
- 做什么：Browser-oriented agent surface focused on safe/private web automation and user-controlled browsing workflows.
- 面向谁：Builders creating web agents, browser automation products, and privacy-sensitive personal assistants.
- AI native 点：The browser becomes the agent runtime boundary: browsing, tool execution, privacy control, and user-visible automation are treated as product primitives.
- 增长/活跃信号：Surfaced in current AI growth results with roughly 9.4k stars and +872 weekly growth; category aligns with repeated browser-agent demand.
- 可运行性判断：GitHub repo presents a product-shaped browser project; local run needs follow-up because no shell network clone was possible during this run.
- 建议动作：Run install audit and inspect permission model, profile isolation, and whether automation APIs are durable enough for agents.

### 5. yigitkonur/humanlayer-agentmemory
- GitHub: https://github.com/yigitkonur/humanlayer-agentmemory
- 分类：Agent Memory / HumanLayer-compatible MCP
- AI Native Product Score：86
- 做什么：Memory layer for AI agents intended to persist context across sessions and make agent workflows less stateless.
- 面向谁：Agent builders, Claude/Codex power users, and teams evaluating durable memory for engineering or personal assistants.
- AI native 点：Persistent memory changes the agent interaction model from single-session prompting to long-running product behavior.
- 增长/活跃信号：Surfaced in current AI growth results with roughly 614 stars and +465 weekly growth; agent memory remains a repeated theme across this and prior runs.
- 可运行性判断：Appears as a concrete repository for agent memory rather than an essay; installation/API depth still needs hands-on verification.
- 建议动作：Create project card; compare data model, privacy controls, and retrieval semantics against Redis/Neo4j memory servers.

### 6. redis/agent-memory-server
- GitHub: https://github.com/redis/agent-memory-server
- 分类：Agent Memory Infrastructure / MCP Server
- AI Native Product Score：84
- 做什么：Redis-backed memory server for agents, positioning Redis as operational memory infrastructure for AI apps.
- 面向谁：Teams already using Redis, agent-platform engineers, and LLM app builders needing durable low-latency memory.
- AI native 点：It treats memory as infrastructure that agents can read/write through a server interface, making recall part of the runtime stack.
- 增长/活跃信号：Search surfaced the repo in current MCP/agent-memory queries; vendor-backed memory infrastructure is consistent with the week’s memory trend.
- 可运行性判断：Repository name and positioning indicate server product surface; local start/Docker path needs direct audit before adoption.
- 建议动作：Watch and test if Redis is already in stack; evaluate schema portability, TTL strategy, and MCP/client compatibility.

### 7. ruvnet/RuView
- GitHub: https://github.com/ruvnet/RuView
- 分类：Screen Understanding / Edge AI Assistant
- AI Native Product Score：82
- 做什么：AI screen-perception assistant for understanding what is on screen and supporting contextual local workflows.
- 面向谁：Desktop assistant builders, accessibility/productivity app developers, and users exploring local screen-aware agents.
- AI native 点：Screen perception is a missing sensory layer for personal agents; the product angle is giving agents grounded context from the user interface.
- 增长/活跃信号：Surfaced in current growth results with roughly 1.4k stars and +1.4k weekly growth, suggesting fast discovery from near-zero baseline.
- 可运行性判断：Repository appears product-shaped around screen AI; needs install and privacy/permission audit because screen capture is high-risk.
- 建议动作：Move to watch + experiment; evaluate macOS permissions, on-device vs cloud processing, and latency in real desktop workflows.

### 8. jayzeng/agentmemory
- GitHub: https://github.com/jayzeng/agentmemory
- 分类：Agent Memory / Developer Library
- AI Native Product Score：78
- 做什么：Developer-facing agent memory repository aimed at giving LLM agents a reusable persistence and recall layer.
- 面向谁：Developers adding memory to custom agents and internal assistants.
- AI native 点：Memory is core product behavior for agents that need continuity, preferences, project facts, and prior decisions.
- 增长/活跃信号：Search surfaced the repo in current agentmemory queries; included because multiple memory projects appeared simultaneously in the same window.
- 可运行性判断：Likely more library/API than full app; retained in Top because it addresses a sharp agent-runtime pain point, but scored below richer product surfaces.
- 建议动作：Compare against other memory servers; keep only if README exposes clear examples, storage model, and integration path.

## Watchlist

### neo4j-labs/agent-memory
- GitHub: https://github.com/neo4j-labs/agent-memory
- 分类：Graph-based Agent Memory
- Score：74
- 简述：Neo4j-backed agent memory concept that maps naturally to knowledge graph retrieval and relationship-heavy recall.
- 观察理由：Graph memory can encode entities, relations, and temporal context in a way that is more inspectable than flat vector memory.
- 增长/活跃信号：Surfaced in current memory-server searches; vendor-backed graph memory is aligned with the week’s agent-memory cluster.
- 可运行性判断：Promising infrastructure angle, but product surface and quickstart maturity need deeper audit.
- 建议动作：Watch for examples, MCP/client integrations, and repeatable demos before promoting to Top.

### agentralabs/agentic-memory
- GitHub: https://github.com/agentralabs/agentic-memory
- 分类：Agent Memory / MCP Server
- Score：71
- 简述：Another entrant in the emerging memory-server/MCP-memory space.
- 观察理由：Confirms that memory is becoming an agent platform component rather than a feature tucked into individual apps.
- 增长/活跃信号：Surfaced in current MCP memory search results; kept as a cluster signal rather than single-project conviction.
- 可运行性判断：Needs README/install/examples audit.
- 建议动作：Use as comparison point when building a memory feature matrix.

### themindvirus/ViMax
- GitHub: https://github.com/themindvirus/ViMax
- 分类：AI Visualization / Reasoning Interface
- Score：68
- 简述：Visual/interaction layer for AI reasoning or model workflows, with signs of strong early discovery.
- 观察理由：Potentially valuable if it turns model reasoning/interaction into an inspectable product surface.
- 增长/活跃信号：Surfaced in current growth results with roughly 5.8k stars and +5.8k weekly growth from a very new baseline.
- 可运行性判断：High-growth but unclear product completeness from surfaced snippets; retained as watchlist until demo/install maturity is audited.
- 建议动作：Watch one more cycle; promote only if README shows runnable UI/demo and a clear user workflow.

## Skip Reasons

- humanlayer/12-factor-agents：https://github.com/humanlayer/12-factor-agents。跳过原因：High-signal methodology/documentation repository, but not a runnable product with UI/CLI/API surface for this radar rubric.
- abordage/awesome-mcp：https://github.com/abordage/awesome-mcp。跳过原因：Awesome/list repository; useful discovery source, but not product software.
- Imbad0202/academic-research-skills：https://github.com/Imbad0202/academic-research-skills。跳过原因：Skill/prompt workflow collection for research tasks; useful but lacks independent product runtime.

## 今日趋势观察

1. Agent memory 正在从“聊天历史”变成基础设施：Redis、Neo4j、HumanLayer/AgentMemory 这类项目都在争夺 agent runtime 的持久上下文层。
2. 代码上下文仍然是 coding agent 的最高频痛点：CodeGraph 代表的本地索引/MCP 工具继续有产品化价值。
3. Voice agent 的开源栈开始补“可本地运行、可控延迟、可表达”的 TTS 层，Supertonic 值得与商业 TTS API 做延迟和质量对照。
4. Browser/screen-aware agent 的边界正在扩大，但这类项目必须重点审计权限、隐私、profile 隔离和失败回滚。
5. 高星增长不等于产品成熟：方法论、awesome list、skill collection 继续降权，除非出现安装器、运行时、治理台或明确 demo。

## 关键假设

- 本期 shell 无法解析 api.github.com；没有使用 GitHub API，也没有 clone 后本地执行。
- “最近 24-72 小时”按最近创建、最近爬取/搜索曝光、最近更新或明显星标增长综合判断。
- Star/growth 数字是运行时近似信号，用于排序参考，不作为精确指标。
- Skip list 只记录真实 GitHub 仓库；类型级跳过规则写在本节，不伪造仓库。

runs.dataWindow: 2026-05-25T00:00:00Z to 2026-05-28T03:33:38Z; GitHub repositories created, recently crawled, recently released, or visibly active in the last 24-72 hours
runs.sourceSummary: GitHub repository pages, GitHub release pages, GitHub search snippets crawled today, and prior run data from data/runs/2026-05-27.json to reduce duplicate coverage.
runs.trendObservations: The strongest product-shaped signal is shifting from standalone chat apps to operational layers around agents: context indexes, persistent memory, multi-agent orchestration, dashboards, and domain-specific MCP/CLI products. Recent repos that expose one-command install, MCP integration, Docker, Web UI, or dashboard flows scored higher than pure framework, skill collection, or benchmark repositories.
runs.assumptions: Scoring prioritizes runnable UI/CLI/API, clear user workflow, documentation/examples, recent release or crawl signal, and visible GitHub traction. Repository star/fork numbers are approximate snapshots from GitHub pages opened during the run. Local curl to api.github.com failed because DNS was unavailable in the shell sandbox, so metadata was cross-checked through browser-accessible GitHub pages and search snippets. Repos covered in the previous run were excluded unless they had a distinct new signal.

# Daily AI Native Product GitHub Radar - 2026-05-28

数据窗口：2026-05-25T00:00:00Z 到 2026-05-28T03:33:38Z。重点看最近 24-72 小时新建、最近 crawled/released、活跃更新或增长明显的 AI agent / LLM app / RAG / MCP / workflow / browser agent / code agent / voice agent / assistant / automation / copilot 项目。

## Top Projects

### 1. colbymchenry/codegraph
- GitHub: https://github.com/colbymchenry/codegraph
- 分类：Code Agent Context / MCP Code Intelligence
- AI Native Product Score：92
- 做什么：为 Claude Code、Codex、Cursor、OpenCode、Gemini 等代码代理提供本地预索引代码知识图谱，减少文件扫描、token 和工具调用。
- 面向谁：经常让 coding agent 读大型代码库的开发者、AI coding power users、工程团队。
- AI native 点：核心价值直接服务 agent 的上下文获取路径，把 repo 结构、调用关系、影响分析做成 MCP/CLI 工具，而不是普通代码搜索。
- 增长/活跃信号：GitHub 页面显示约 29.8k stars、1.7k forks、378 commits；搜索结果显示 2026-05-25 发布 v0.9.5，新增 shared MCP daemon，解决多代理同项目重复 watcher/SQLite/index 成本。
- 可运行性判断：README 提供 macOS/Linux/Windows 一行安装、npx/npm 入口和 codegraph init；100% local，无需 API key。
- 建议动作：优先试跑在本仓库和一个大型前端/Swift repo 上，验证 Codex/Claude Code 的工具调用减少是否稳定。

### 2. ComposioHQ/agent-orchestrator
- GitHub: https://github.com/ComposioHQ/agent-orchestrator
- 分类：Parallel Coding Agent Orchestration
- AI Native Product Score：90
- 做什么：调度并行 AI coding agents，每个任务/issue 使用独立 git worktree、branch 和 PR，并自动处理 CI 失败、review comments、merge conflicts。
- 面向谁：希望把 Claude Code/Codex/Aider 等代理放进真实工程流水线的工程团队和平台团队。
- AI native 点：不是单个 agent，而是 agent fleet 的管理层，把计划、执行、反馈修复和 PR 生命周期做成产品。
- 增长/活跃信号：GitHub 页面显示约 7.3k stars、989 forks、1,274 commits、数百 issues/PRs；搜索结果显示最近 5 天被爬取。
- 可运行性判断：README 提供 npm 全局安装、source setup、ao start 启动 dashboard；依赖 Node、Git、gh CLI、tmux/ConPTY。
- 建议动作：本地用一个小型 repo dry-run，重点看权限隔离、GitHub token 范围、失败回滚和人工审批点。

### 3. HKUDS/Vibe-Trading
- GitHub: https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading
- 分类：Domain AI Agent / Trading Workflow / MCP
- AI Native Product Score：87
- 做什么：面向交易和投研的个人 trading agent，包含 CLI/TUI、FastAPI Web UI、MCP server、回测、数据源、swarm presets 和量化 alpha zoo。
- 面向谁：个人量化交易者、投研团队、需要把市场数据/回测/报告接入 agent 的金融技术用户。
- AI native 点：将交易研究任务拆成工具、agent team preset、MCP 能力和 Web/CLI 交互，而不是简单金融聊天机器人。
- 增长/活跃信号：GitHub 页面显示约 8.9k stars、1.8k forks、213 commits；README News 在 2026-05-27 和 2026-05-26 有功能更新。
- 可运行性判断：支持 pip install vibe-trading-ai、vibe-trading serve、vibe-trading-mcp、Docker、Web UI、CLI；README 给出 demo 和 quick start。
- 建议动作：只做沙盒评估，不接真实账户；重点检查数据源稳定性、策略回测可复现性和财务风险免责声明。

### 4. builderz-labs/mission-control
- GitHub: https://github.com/builderz-labs/mission-control
- 分类：Agent Ops Dashboard / Self-hosted Control Plane
- AI Native Product Score：84
- 做什么：自托管 AI agent 编排和运维 dashboard，用于派发任务、监控 agent fleet、成本、日志、token、memory、安全、cron、webhooks 等。
- 面向谁：运营多个 agent 工作流的工程团队、内部自动化平台和 AI ops 团队。
- AI native 点：把 agent 运行、治理、安全、质量门禁、技能安装和多 gateway 连接做成控制台。
- 增长/活跃信号：GitHub 页面显示约 5k stars、872 forks、365 commits、18 issues；README 明确 alpha 状态但功能面很完整。
- 可运行性判断：提供 bash install.sh --local / --docker、pnpm dev、docker compose、GHCR image；SQLite local-first，无强制 Redis/Postgres。
- 建议动作：加入重点 watch；先用 demo 数据评估 dashboard 信息架构和安全默认值，再考虑真实任务接入。

### 5. vbcherepanov/total-agent-memory
- GitHub: https://github.com/vbcherepanov/total-agent-memory
- 分类：Agent Memory / Local MCP Memory Layer
- AI Native Product Score：82
- 做什么：为 Claude Code、Codex CLI、Cursor 和任意 MCP client 提供本地持久记忆层，含时间知识图谱、过程记忆、AST 代码库摄取、3D WebGL 可视化。
- 面向谁：长期使用 coding agents、希望跨会话保留偏好/项目知识/过程记忆的开发者。
- AI native 点：记忆层直接改变 agent 行为和跨会话能力，重点不是人类笔记，而是 agent 可召回、可巩固、可查询的上下文系统。
- 增长/活跃信号：GitHub 页面显示约 42 stars、11 forks、47 commits；搜索结果显示 2 天内被爬取，README 标注 2026-05-24 v12.2.0 修复 Codex/env 对齐相关问题。
- 可运行性判断：提供 npx、uvx、pipx、brew、Docker、manual install，多 IDE connect 路径；代码目录含 docs、examples、docker、tests。
- 建议动作：Watch + 小范围试用；重点验证自动保存噪音、隐私边界、数据库迁移和 Codex/Claude Code 配置写入是否可控。

## Watchlist

### github/copilot-cli
- GitHub: https://github.com/github/copilot-cli
- 分类：Official Coding Agent CLI
- Score：74
- 简述：GitHub 官方 Copilot CLI changelog 近期出现 MCP、background agents、remote/session 等能力演进信号。
- 观察理由：产品成熟且非新项目，但官方 CLI 对生态方向有强指示意义。
- 建议动作：跟踪 MCP Tasks、background agents、remote control 是否影响第三方 agent orchestration 产品空间。

### glebis/claude-skills
- GitHub: https://github.com/glebis/claude-skills
- 分类：Agent Skills Collection
- Score：63
- 简述：Claude Code skills 集合，含 deep-research 等工作流技能。
- 观察理由：技能生态在增长，但更像 workflow/package collection，产品面弱。
- 建议动作：观察是否演化成带 UI、registry、安装器或团队治理能力的产品。

### eltociear/awesome-molt-ecosystem
- GitHub: https://github.com/eltociear/awesome-molt-ecosystem
- 分类：AI Agent Ecosystem Intelligence
- Score：58
- 简述：对 AI agent platforms / x402 economy / CVE / bounty 等做生态整理。
- 观察理由：不是产品，但可作为后续雷达的线索源和风险信号源。
- 建议动作：只作为情报源，不进入 Top 项目池。

## Skip Reasons

- glebis/claude-skills：https://github.com/glebis/claude-skills。跳过 Top 原因：技能集合/工作流包，文档有用，但不是独立可运行 AI native 产品。
- eltociear/awesome-molt-ecosystem：https://github.com/eltociear/awesome-molt-ecosystem。跳过 Top 原因：awesome/list/研究型生态整理，不是可运行 UI/CLI/API 产品。
- github/copilot-cli：https://github.com/github/copilot-cli。跳过 Top 原因：官方成熟产品仓库，本期作为趋势观察更合适，不适合作为新发现项目评分。

## 今日趋势观察

1. 代码代理的下一层竞争不只是模型/编辑能力，而是上下文经济：CodeGraph 这类本地索引工具直接用“更少 token/更少 tool calls”卖点打动 agent power user。
2. 代理从个人工具走向 fleet/ops：Agent Orchestrator 和 Mission Control 都把 worktree、CI、PR、dashboard、安全、成本和质量门禁放进核心体验。
3. Memory 重新升温，但好项目开始强调本地、MCP、可迁移和多 IDE，而不是单纯聊天历史。
4. 垂直领域 agent 更容易产品化：Vibe-Trading 有清晰用户、工具链、数据源、Web UI、MCP 和一键安装，比泛 agent demo 更接近真实产品。
5. Skill/prompt/list 类仓库仍很多，除非出现安装器、运行时、团队治理或可观测界面，否则继续降权。

## 关键假设

- 本期未使用 shell 里的 GitHub API，因为 api.github.com DNS 解析失败；浏览器侧 GitHub 页面和搜索片段可用。
- 可运行性判断基于 README、目录结构、安装命令、Docker/Web UI/CLI/MCP 信号，未 clone 后本地执行。
- Star/fork/commit 数是运行时页面快照，可能随时间变化。
- Skip list 只记录真实 GitHub repo；类型级跳过规则写入趋势和假设，不伪造仓库。

- AI native 点：AI 不只是回答问题，而是围绕 repo 结构、代码上下文和审查流程形成产品体验。
- 增长/活跃信号：外部站点 codeep.dev 指向 GitHub，项目在近期 AI coding 工具搜索中出现，具备产品页信号。
- 可运行性判断：需要进一步确认本地安装路径；产品页存在但 GitHub README 可运行性需复核。
- 建议动作：加入短名单，下一轮重点检查是否有 CLI/API、示例 repo 和权限模型。

### 5. iBz-04/gloamy
- GitHub: https://github.com/iBz-04/gloamy
- 分类：On-device Personal Agent / Tauri App
- AI Native Product Score：78
- 做什么：安全的本地个人代理，目标是 on-device personal agents。
- 面向谁：重视隐私、希望本地运行个人 AI assistant 的 power users 和桌面工具开发者。
- AI native 点：强调本地、安全、个人代理操作系统式体验，AI 是核心执行主体。
- 增长/活跃信号：GitHub snapshot 显示约 58 stars、10 forks，2026-05-27 pushed，topics 包含 tauri-app、personal-ai-assistant、secure-ai-agents。
- 可运行性判断：Rust/Tauri 方向，具备桌面产品形态；当前 star 规模较小，README/安装成熟度需继续验证。
- 建议动作：Watch，重点看是否补齐安装包、权限沙箱和真实工作流 demo。

### 6. e2b-dev/E2B
- GitHub: https://github.com/e2b-dev/E2B
- 分类：Agent Sandbox / Code Interpreter Infrastructure
- AI Native Product Score：77
- 做什么：为 AI agent 提供安全 sandbox 和真实工具环境。
- 面向谁：构建 code interpreter、automation agent、enterprise agent 的开发团队。
- AI native 点：给 agent 一个可控执行环境，是 agent 产品从 demo 走向真实工作的关键底座。
- 增长/活跃信号：GitHub snapshot 显示约 12.3k stars、922 forks，2026-05-27 pushed，成熟项目仍持续活跃。
- 可运行性判断：文档和 SDK/示例成熟，产品化程度高；不是新项目，但当前窗口活跃。
- 建议动作：作为基础设施基准跟踪，不占用过多每日新发现注意力，除非出现重要 release。

## Watchlist

### WingedGuardian/GENesis-AGI
- GitHub: https://github.com/WingedGuardian/GENesis-AGI
- 分类：Autonomous Personal Agent
- Score：69
- 简述：带 persistent memory、self-learning、earned autonomy 叙事的 Python autonomous agent。
- 观察理由：2026-05-27 pushed，约 37 stars；概念贴近个人认知伙伴，但 AGI/自学习叙事偏重，需要验证真实任务能力。
- 建议动作：观察 demo、任务边界、记忆持久化设计和失败处理。

### swarm-ai-safety/swarm
- GitHub: https://github.com/swarm-ai-safety/swarm
- 分类：Multi-agent Safety / Evaluation
- Score：66
- 简述：用于多 agent 系统风险评估的 SWARM 项目。
- 观察理由：2026-05-27 pushed，有站点与讨论区；但更像评估/研究框架，不是直接面向终端用户的产品。
- 建议动作：关注其 multi-agent safety 指标是否被产品团队采用。

## Skip Reasons

- modelcontextprotocol/servers：https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers。跳过原因：MCP server/example 聚合价值高，但更像目录/基础设施集合，不是单一 AI native 产品。
- cline/mcp-marketplace：https://github.com/cline/mcp-marketplace。跳过原因：偏 marketplace submission/data repo，产品表面在 Cline 主产品内，不适合作为独立项目评分。
- swarm-ai-safety/swarm：https://github.com/swarm-ai-safety/swarm。未进入 Top 的原因：安全评估价值明确，但当前更像研究/评估框架，终端用户产品形态弱。

## 今日趋势观察

1. Coding agent 的竞争点正在从“能改代码”转向“长会话、缓存、成本、权限和可恢复性”。DeepSeek-Reasonix 的 prefix-cache 叙事很典型。
2. Agent runtime/sandbox 仍是高价值底座。vm0 和 E2B 都说明真实工作 agent 必须解决执行环境与安全边界。
3. Web UI 壳和桌面本地代理在增多，但质量分化明显：有些是真产品，有些只是把 agent framework 包了一层前端。
4. MCP 噪音继续升高。很多仓库是 registry、server collection 或单工具 wrapper，需要谨慎区分“生态组件”和“产品”。

## 关键假设

- 本期优先新近活跃和产品形态，成熟项目只有在当前窗口继续活跃且代表趋势时才保留。
- 没有伪造跳过仓库；类型级跳过原因写在趋势和假设里，skipped_projects 只记录真实 GitHub repo。
- 可运行性判断基于 README/仓库形态/项目页信号，未在本地 clone 全量执行。

runs.dataWindow: 2026-05-21 to 2026-05-24, GitHub repositories newly created, recently active, or showing visible growth signals around AI agents, LLM apps, RAG, MCP, AI workflow, browser/code agents, assistants, and automation.
runs.sourceSummary: GitHub repository pages, GitHub Search snippets, OSSInsight AI trending snapshot, Reddit r/ClaudeAI and r/mcp launch/discovery threads. Network from the shell was unavailable, so repository discovery used web search and GitHub pages rather than direct GitHub API calls.
runs.trendObservations: MCP keeps moving from protocol demos into product glue: code context, multi-agent coordination, and browser or desktop automation are the strongest repeated patterns. Coding agents remain the most product-shaped AI-native category, while early browser/desktop agents need closer checks for safety controls, documentation depth, and real workflows.
runs.assumptions: Scores prioritize product-shaped repositories with runnable UI/CLI/API, clear user scenario, documentation, examples, and recent visible attention. Star and growth numbers are treated as directional because direct GitHub API access was unavailable in the local shell. Type-level skips, such as prompt lists or pure paper reproductions, are described in the report rather than fabricated as skipped GitHub repos.

# Daily AI Native Product Radar - 2026-05-24

## Data Window

- Window: 2026-05-21 to 2026-05-24, with some 28-day OSSInsight growth context used as a secondary signal.
- Sources: GitHub repository pages, GitHub Search snippets, OSSInsight AI trending snapshot, Reddit launch/discovery threads.
- Constraint: local shell DNS could not resolve api.github.com, so no direct GitHub API enrichment was available.

## Top Projects

### 1. sst/opencode

- GitHub: https://github.com/sst/opencode
- Category: Code Agent / Terminal AI Assistant
- AI Native Product Score: 92
- Does: terminal-native coding agent that lets developers delegate code edits and repo work from the command line.
- For: software engineers and AI-assisted development teams.
- AI native point: the product loop is agentic coding, repo context, tool use, and iterative edits rather than a chat add-on.
- Growth / activity signal: OSSInsight AI trending snapshot showed very strong 28-day star growth, and the repo remains highly visible in coding-agent discussions.
- Runnability: CLI-oriented product surface with install docs and active repo structure.
- Suggested action: try on one contained repo task and compare edit quality, context handling, and rollback workflow against Codex CLI / Claude Code.

### 2. github/github-mcp-server

- GitHub: https://github.com/github/github-mcp-server
- Category: MCP / Developer Automation
- AI Native Product Score: 90
- Does: exposes GitHub context and operations to MCP-compatible assistants.
- For: developers and teams using Claude, Cursor, Codex-style tools, or internal agent workflows around GitHub.
- AI native point: turns GitHub from a UI/API target into a tool surface for agents.
- Growth / activity signal: continued high visibility in MCP trending lists and developer automation discussions.
- Runnability: server-style integration surface; practical value depends on MCP host setup and GitHub permissions.
- Suggested action: keep as a baseline integration for any AI coding or repo-ops workflow; evaluate permission boundaries carefully.

### 3. upstash/context7

- GitHub: https://github.com/upstash/context7
- Category: MCP / Code Context
- AI Native Product Score: 88
- Does: provides fresh documentation/context to AI coding tools through MCP.
- For: developers who want coding agents to use current library docs instead of stale model memory.
- AI native point: improves agent correctness by making external docs a first-class runtime dependency.
- Growth / activity signal: recurring appearance in MCP and AI trending snapshots; strong fit with the current context-injection wave.
- Runnability: MCP server pattern with clear integration intent.
- Suggested action: test on fast-moving frontend/backend libraries where hallucinated APIs are common.

### 4. openai/codex

- GitHub: https://github.com/openai/codex
- Category: Code Agent / CLI
- AI Native Product Score: 87
- Does: command-line coding agent for reading, editing, running, and iterating on software projects.
- For: engineers who want an agentic local development workflow.
- AI native point: coordinates model reasoning with local tools, file edits, and verification loops.
- Growth / activity signal: remains a top AI repository by visibility and ecosystem attention.
- Runnability: CLI product surface with install and usage docs.
- Suggested action: use as a reference for product ergonomics in AI coding agents: permissions, sandboxing, diffs, and verification matter as much as model quality.

### 5. All-Hands-AI/OpenHands

- GitHub: https://github.com/All-Hands-AI/OpenHands
- Category: Software Engineering Agent
- AI Native Product Score: 86
- Does: autonomous software development agent platform for coding, debugging, and task execution.
- For: engineering teams experimenting with agentic SWE workflows.
- AI native point: the primary interface is task delegation to an agent with tools, environment access, and execution feedback.
- Growth / activity signal: sustained high visibility among open-source SWE agents.
- Runnability: product-shaped with documented setup paths and an established project surface.
- Suggested action: benchmark against narrow issue-fix tasks, not broad vague tickets; measure completion, patch quality, and test behavior.

### 6. microsoft/qlib

- GitHub: https://github.com/microsoft/qlib
- Category: AI Workflow / Quant Research Platform
- AI Native Product Score: 78
- Does: AI-oriented quantitative investment research platform with workflows, data handling, and model experimentation.
- For: quant researchers and financial ML teams.
- AI native point: embeds AI/ML workflows into an end-to-end research product rather than a standalone model repo.
- Growth / activity signal: appeared in current AI trending snapshots with notable recent attention.
- Runnability: mature Python project with docs and examples, but domain setup is heavier than a typical app.
- Suggested action: watch for agentic research workflow integrations; not a top fit for general AI-native product builders unless finance is in scope.

### 7. macOS26/Agent

- GitHub: https://github.com/macOS26/Agent
- Category: Desktop Agent / macOS Assistant
- AI Native Product Score: 74
- Does: early macOS-oriented agent project aiming at desktop task execution.
- For: Mac power users and developers exploring local desktop agents.
- AI native point: tries to connect assistant behavior to operating-system level actions.
- Growth / activity signal: showed up in recent GitHub search around new AI agent repositories.
- Runnability: still needs hands-on validation; product promise is clear but safety and setup maturity need review.
- Suggested action: watch closely, then test in a sandboxed macOS account before granting broad permissions.

### 8. hydro13/tandem-browser

- GitHub: https://github.com/hydro13/tandem-browser
- Category: Browser Agent / MCP
- AI Native Product Score: 72
- Does: browser automation project positioned around tandem use with AI/MCP-style workflows.
- For: developers and operators who want agents to inspect or act in browser contexts.
- AI native point: browser state and actions become part of an agent workflow.
- Growth / activity signal: surfaced in recent MCP/browser-agent search results.
- Runnability: appears early; needs verification of install path, browser permissions, and examples.
- Suggested action: keep in Watch-plus: test only if docs include constrained permissions and reproducible demo flows.

## Watchlist

- shanirsh/prismodev - developer workflow diagnostic / AI coding helper candidate. Promising because it frames a concrete dev-tool loop, but needs more evidence of adoption and end-to-end examples.
- ebin198351-akl/agent-room - MCP server for multi-agent coordination. Interesting coordination primitive, but needs clearer product surface and battle-tested usage beyond launch posts.
- tjfontaine/web-agent-core - web/browser agent core package. Worth monitoring if it becomes a reusable runtime with examples, safety boundaries, and host integrations.
- dashn9/rusty-browser - browser automation / agent candidate. Keep only if runnable examples and non-trivial workflows appear.

## Skip Reasons

- Pure paper reproductions and benchmark-only repos were skipped because they do not expose a product surface.
- Prompt collections and agent prompt packs were skipped unless they included runnable orchestration code.
- Thin SDK wrappers were skipped when they did not add a user-facing workflow, UI, CLI, API, or operational automation layer.
- Marketing/demo-only repositories were skipped when they lacked installable code or reproducible examples.

## Trend Observations

1. MCP is becoming product infrastructure, not just an integration novelty. The strongest repositories turn external systems into tools agents can actually use.
2. Code agents still dominate the AI-native product leaderboard because they combine clear users, frequent workflows, measurable outcomes, and runnable local surfaces.
3. Browser and desktop agents are moving quickly but remain riskier. The gating factors are permission scope, reproducible demos, and recovery from bad actions.
4. Context freshness is now a product feature. Tools like docs/context MCP servers compete directly on reducing stale-code hallucinations.

## Key Assumptions

- Product-shaped means runnable UI, CLI, API, MCP server, or workflow engine with clear docs.
- Directional growth signals are acceptable for this run because direct GitHub API access failed locally.
- Mature high-growth projects can outrank brand-new repositories when they better satisfy the product and runnability criteria.

MCP remains the default integration vocabulary, while more projects are packaging agents as CLIs, web dashboards, chat bots, or deployable services rather than libraries only.
runs.assumptions: Scores prioritize runnable product surface, clear user workflow, README/demo quality, recent GitHub activity, and AI-native depth. Repositories highlighted on 2026-05-21 were not repeated unless they showed a distinct new product signal. Search quality is bounded by unauthenticated web access; activity labels such as updated/created are treated as directional signals, not audited star velocity.

# Daily AI Native Product Radar - 2026-05-22

## Top Projects

1. [google-gemini/gemini-cli](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli) - AI Coding Agent CLI - Score 92
   - Does: Terminal-first Gemini coding/automation agent with repo understanding, tool execution, and developer workflow integration.
   - Audience: Developers and teams that want a local command-line AI pair programmer.
   - AI native angle: The CLI is built around iterative LLM planning, tool use, code edits, and command execution rather than static code generation.
   - Growth/activity signal: High-visibility Google repo; GitHub search/topic snippets showed a very recent 2026 creation/update window and rapid attention.
   - Runnability: CLI-first surface with install/run documentation and examples; suitable for immediate local trial.
   - Recommended action: Try on a non-critical repo and compare with existing coding-agent flows.

2. [github/gh-aw](https://github.com/github/gh-aw) - Agentic Workflow Automation - Score 90
   - Does: GitHub CLI extension for agentic workflows that can create, manage, and run repository automation tasks.
   - Audience: Engineering teams already living in GitHub Issues, PRs, and Actions.
   - AI native angle: Turns GitHub workflows into agent-executed tasks, bringing planning/execution loops into the developer platform.
   - Growth/activity signal: GitHub-owned repo surfaced in recent AI-agent searches with active README/product positioning.
   - Runnability: CLI extension surface; clearer product fit than one-off scripts.
   - Recommended action: Watch closely; test against a small maintenance workflow once permissions and runner assumptions are understood.

3. [code-yeongyu/oh-my-openagent](https://github.com/code-yeongyu/oh-my-openagent) - AI Agent Collaboration Hub - Score 86
   - Does: Open-source platform for discovering, configuring, and orchestrating multiple AI agents.
   - Audience: Builders experimenting with multi-agent workflows and reusable agent templates.
   - AI native angle: Treats agents as first-class configurable product units with orchestration, rather than single prompt calls.
   - Growth/activity signal: Search snippets indicate May 2026 creation and recent updates, with a product-like README.
   - Runnability: Repo presents an app/platform shape; requires local verification before production use.
   - Recommended action: Clone and inspect install path; benchmark against existing agent orchestration tools.

4. [lobehub/lobehub](https://github.com/lobehub/lobehub) - AI Assistant Workspace - Score 85

5. [AstrBotDevs/AstrBot](https://github.com/AstrBotDevs/AstrBot) - ChatOps AI Assistant Platform - Score 83
   - Does: Multi-platform chatbot/assistant framework for IM channels with LLM-driven plugins and automation.

   - Growth/activity signal: Recent topic/search visibility and a substantial active repo footprint.

6. [safishamsi/graphify](https://github.com/safishamsi/graphify) - Graph RAG / Knowledge Workspace - Score 80
   - Does: Converts documents into graph-backed knowledge representations for AI retrieval and question answering.

7. [github/copilot-sdk](https://github.com/github/copilot-sdk) - Copilot App SDK - Score 78

8. [forcedotcom/mcp-hosted](https://github.com/forcedotcom/mcp-hosted) - Enterprise MCP Hosting - Score 76

   - Does: Full-stack real-estate AI agent using LangGraph-style workflow patterns.

   - AI native angle: Applies agent workflow orchestration to a concrete domain instead of presenting a generic chatbot.
   - Growth/activity signal: Recent search/topic visibility; useful as an early vertical-agent example.
   - Runnability: Promising full-stack shape, but maturity and setup depth need verification.
   - Recommended action: Keep as a vertical product pattern; do not treat as mature infrastructure yet.

## Watchlist

- [GRCEngClub/claude-grc-engineering](https://github.com/GRCEngClub/claude-grc-engineering) - GRC/security engineering workflow assets around Claude. Watch because the domain is concrete, but verify executable product surface.
- [dylibso/chicory](https://github.com/dylibso/chicory) - Not AI-specific, but useful if WASM sandboxing becomes a common agent tool-execution substrate.
- [browser-use/workflow-use](https://github.com/browser-use/workflow-use) - Browser automation workflow extraction remains relevant, but prior-run overlap means it stays watchlist unless new releases land.
- [menloresearch/jan](https://github.com/menloresearch/jan) - Mature local AI app; watch for product/release movement rather than daily novelty.

## Skip Reasons

- [codingmcp/cli](https://github.com/codingmcp/cli) - Messaging around free/proxy access and usage-limit bypass is a poor fit for product radar despite recent visibility.
- [bytedance/UI-TARS-desktop](https://github.com/bytedance/UI-TARS-desktop) - Strong desktop-agent research direction, but current signal still reads more like model/demo infrastructure than a broadly runnable product.
- [EmbraceAGI/LifeReloaded](https://github.com/EmbraceAGI/LifeReloaded) - Interesting personal AI concept, but insufficient verified runnable product evidence for today's Top list.
- [Mintplex-Labs/anything-llm](https://github.com/Mintplex-Labs/anything-llm) - Mature and relevant, but excluded from Top today to avoid crowding out fresher 24-72 hour signals.

## Trend Observations

- Agent products are converging on executable surfaces: CLI, GitHub Actions, hosted MCP servers, and chat bots are stronger signals than notebooks or SDK-only repos.
- MCP is becoming the enterprise integration default, especially for business systems where auth, tenancy, and governance matter.
- Memory/RAG is moving from feature to substrate: new projects increasingly sell persistent context, graph retrieval, or reusable memory as the actual product layer.
- Vertical agents are appearing in real-estate, GRC, and chat operations; most are still early, but they clarify user scenarios better than generic agent demos.

## Data Window and Assumptions

- Window: 2026-05-19 to 2026-05-22.
- Sources: GitHub repository pages and GitHub topic/search snippets available through web search; unauthenticated shell access to api.github.com failed DNS resolution.
- Assumption: recent web-search/update labels are directional, so scores emphasize product shape, runnable surface, documentation, and AI-native architecture over exact star delta.
- Assumption: yesterday's highlighted repos were not repeated unless they showed a distinct new signal.

# Daily AI Native Product Radar - 2026-05-21

**数据窗口**: 2026-05-18 10:15 to 2026-05-21 10:15 Asia/Shanghai. 主要依据 GitHub AI agent / MCP / AI workflow topic recent-update surfaces 与仓库 README 可运行性检查；shell DNS 无法解析 `api.github.com`，所以增长信号不使用精确 GitHub API delta。

## Top Projects

### 1. [matevip/mateclaw](https://github.com/matevip/mateclaw) - AI Coding Agent - Score 88
- **做什么**: 面向 Claude Code 的本地 GUI/管理层，支持会话、Git worktree、项目上下文和 agentic coding 工作流。
- **面向谁**: 高频使用 Claude Code、希望把终端 coding agent 产品化管理的个人开发者和小团队。
- **AI native 点**: 核心价值不是编辑器外壳，而是围绕 AI coding session、上下文与多分支任务编排组织软件开发。
- **增长/活跃信号**: GitHub topic recent-update 中高位出现，README 有清晰产品定位与运行说明，符合近几天 agent IDE/agent manager 热点。
- **可运行性判断**: 有明确应用形态和安装/运行路径，产品完成度高于普通 wrapper。
- **建议动作**: 本地试用，重点观察 Claude Code 之外的 agent 适配能力、session persistence 和团队协作路线。

### 2. [boxlite-ai/boxlite](https://github.com/boxlite-ai/boxlite) - Agent Automation API - Score 86
- **做什么**: 用 API/SDK/Docker 把 AI 任务放进可隔离运行的自动化环境，面向 agent 执行和浏览器/桌面式任务。

- **可运行性判断**: Docker/API/SDK 信号强，可直接进入技术评估。

### 3. [AliceLJY/telegram-ai-bridge](https://github.com/AliceLJY/telegram-ai-bridge) - AI Assistant / Messaging Agent - Score 82
- **做什么**: 把 OpenAI/Claude/Gemini/Groq/Ollama 等模型接入 Telegram Bot，提供多模型聊天、上下文、群组和自托管桥接。

- **AI native 点**: 产品入口是消息流，AI assistant 成为群聊/私聊里的常驻执行层，而不是孤立网页聊天框。

- **可运行性判断**: 需要 Telegram Bot token 和模型 API key；自托管路径清晰。
- **建议动作**: 放入轻量 assistant watchlist，同时评估权限、安全和群聊上下文隔离。

### 4. [scoutqa-dot-ai/thor](https://github.com/scoutqa-dot-ai/thor) - Research Agent Workflow - Score 80
- **做什么**: 面向研究/问答的 agent workflow，围绕检索、回答、评估或任务执行组织 AI 工作流。
- **面向谁**: 构建研究助手、QA agent、内部知识工作流的开发团队。

- **可运行性判断**: README/仓库形态比纯论文代码更接近应用，但仍需进一步跑 examples 验证稳定性。
- **建议动作**: 试跑 example，重点看数据源接入、评估闭环和是否支持企业内网知识源。

### 5. [vassiliylakhonin/agenda-intelligence-md](https://github.com/vassiliylakhonin/agenda-intelligence-md) - Meeting / Agenda AI Workflow - Score 78
- **做什么**: 将议程、会议材料或 markdown 工作流结构化为 AI 可处理的会议智能流程。
- **面向谁**: 需要把会议准备、议题整理和行动项生成自动化的产品/运营/知识管理团队。

- **增长/活跃信号**: 最近更新可见，切中 AI workflow 从聊天转向业务文档流程的趋势。
- **可运行性判断**: 更像工具型 workflow；需要检查 CLI/API 包装深度和示例输入输出。

### 6. [RileyCraig14/nexus-agent](https://github.com/RileyCraig14/nexus-agent) - MCP / Agent Commerce - Score 75
- **做什么**: 围绕 agent、MCP server 和 pay-per-call/服务调用的实验性连接层。

- **增长/活跃信号**: MCP recent-update 相关搜索面出现，方向与 agent commerce / MCP marketplace 趋势一致。
- **可运行性判断**: 早期项目，需确认 API、示例和真实交易闭环。

- **AI native 点**: 让 LLM 参与网页理解和行动决策，替代固定规则脚本。
- **增长/活跃信号**: AI agent topic recent-update 中出现且有较高累计 star 可见度，说明不是一次性空仓库。
- **可运行性判断**: 需要进一步验证最新 README 的安装、demo 和反爬/登录场景能力。

### 8. [MustafaKemal0146/fetih](https://github.com/MustafaKemal0146/fetih) - Security / Autonomous CLI Agent - Score 72

- **AI native 点**: 将 agent 作为命令行任务执行和分析的核心控制层。
- **增长/活跃信号**: GitHub AI agent recent-update 中新近活跃；安全 agent 仍是持续升温方向。
- **可运行性判断**: 需要谨慎沙箱运行，确认是否有清晰 dry-run、权限边界和示例。
- **建议动作**: 仅在隔离环境评估；优先看是否有真实 CLI help、Docker 和测试数据。

## Watchlist

- [alice9w2/peerbus](https://github.com/alice9w2/peerbus) - AI agent / workflow: 新仓库信号强但 star 与文档深度不足，观察是否补 demo、Docker 或实际集成。
- [botingw/asset-hub](https://github.com/botingw/asset-hub) - AI asset/workflow utility: 可能是资源管理或 agent 辅助工具，产品边界还不清晰。
- [docdyhr/uspto_fpd_mcp](https://github.com/docdyhr/uspto_fpd_mcp) - MCP server: 垂直数据源 MCP，有场景价值，但更像 connector，需要看到 agent workflow demo。
- [park1210/daisyui-mcp](https://github.com/park1210/daisyui-mcp) - MCP developer tool: 面向前端 UI/组件知识的 MCP server，若能接入 coding agent 会有实用价值。

## Skip Reasons

- [Axel-art/citation-fetcher](https://github.com/Axel-art/citation-fetcher): 更像单点文献/引用工具，AI native product 面不足。
- [AaaamrAAlabd/DontYap](https://github.com/AaaamrAAlabd/DontYap): prompt/行为约束类仓库，缺少可运行产品层。
- [jc-cb/polymarket-agent](https://github.com/jc-cb/polymarket-agent): 交易/市场 bot 风险较高，AI 产品通用性和可验证 demo 不足。
- [Doohae/Hierarchical-STAMP](https://github.com/Doohae/Hierarchical-STAMP): 更接近模型/研究代码，不符合本雷达优先级。

## 今日趋势观察

1. **Agent 产品壳继续从 IDE 扩到运行环境**: mateclaw、boxlite 这类项目说明用户不仅要模型能力，还要 session、workspace、sandbox、API 和执行环境。
2. **MCP 从 connector 走向服务市场想象**: nexus-agent、垂直 MCP server 和 UI/MCP 工具都在探索 agent tool distribution，但安全、权限和计费边界仍早期。
3. **聊天入口回到真实工作流**: Telegram assistant、meeting/agenda workflow 说明 AI assistant 正从网页聊天迁移到团队已经使用的消息和文档环境。
4. **安全/浏览器 agent 仍热，但要严筛可控性**: 这类项目容易有 demo 光环，真正评估要看 sandbox、权限、可复现任务和失败处理。

## 关键假设

- 最近活跃的 GitHub topic/search surface 足以作为候选发现源，但不是精确增长榜。
- 优先选择可运行 UI/CLI/API、Docker/examples/README 完整、用户场景明确的项目。
- 昨日 Top 项目未重复收录，避免雷达连续两天堆叠同一批成熟项目。

runs.dataWindow: 2026-05-18 to 2026-05-20 (GitHub repositories created or pushed in the last 24-72 hours, plus direct README checks)
runs.sourceSummary: GitHub Search API queries for created:>2026-05-17 and pushed:>2026-05-18 across agent, MCP, RAG, workflow, browser agent, and LLM topics; direct GitHub README/raw README checks for install commands, demos, screenshots, docs, Docker/examples, stars, forks, issues, and pushed_at evidence.
runs.trendObservations: The strongest signal today is agent infrastructure moving from chat and SDKs into executable surfaces: small-model coding agents, agent commerce skills, personal memory/identity layers, local RAG apps, MCP context compression, physical-device bridges, vulnerability agents, and enterprise AI/MCP gateways.
runs.assumptions: Unauthenticated GitHub Search API was used, so star velocity is inferred from current stars plus fresh created_at/pushed_at, not exact 24-hour star deltas. Scores prioritize runnable product surface, clear user workflow, README quality, docs/screenshots/examples, and whether AI is central to the product. Obvious SEO/marketing repositories, pure notes, interview guides, and prompt/skill collections are skipped even if fresh.

# Daily AI Native Product Radar - 2026-05-20

数据观察窗口：2026-05-18 to 2026-05-20；生成时间：2026-05-20T11:34:24+08:00。

## Top Projects (10)

### 1. Doorman11991/smallcode
- GitHub: https://github.com/Doorman11991/smallcode
- 分类: Local Coding Agent / Small-model Agent Runtime
- AI Native Product Score: 91/100
- 做什么: 面向 7B-20B 本地小模型的 terminal-native coding agent，通过预算管理、宽容工具解析、TODO 分解、patch-first 编辑和本地记忆提升小模型可用性。
- 面向谁: 想用本地 LLM 做 coding agent、重视隐私/成本/离线能力的开发者。
- AI native 点: 产品核心不是调用大模型，而是围绕小模型缺陷重构 agent loop、工具路由、上下文预算和执行追踪。
- 增长/活跃信号: 2026-05-18 创建；GitHub API 显示 733 stars、42 forks、2026-05-19 pushed。
- 可运行性判断: README 提供 npm/npx、预编译二进制、一行 install.sh/install.ps1、.env 配置、CLI 命令、Programmatic API 和 trace/eval 命令。
- 建议动作: 高优先级试跑；用一个中等代码修复任务比较本地 7B/14B 模型与云模型 fallback 的质量差距。

### 2. evilsocket/audit
- GitHub: https://github.com/evilsocket/audit
- 分类: Vulnerability Discovery Agent / Security Workflow
- AI Native Product Score: 88/100
- 做什么: 把 Cloudflare Project Glasswing 风格的漏洞发现流程打包成 8-stage agent：Recon、Hunt、Validate、Gapfill、Dedupe、Trace、Feedback、Report。
- 面向谁: 安全研究员、AppSec 团队、需要对真实代码库跑 AI 漏洞发现的工程组织。
- AI native 点: 多个窄域 agent、故意反驳、reachability gate、反馈循环和 schema-validated 报告构成完整安全产品流程。
- 增长/活跃信号: 2026-05-18 创建；GitHub API 显示 301 stars、40 forks、2026-05-19 pushed。
- 可运行性判断: README 提供 venv/pip install、audit auth-check/run/status/report、预算和并发控制、live target reproduction、SQLite state/results layout。
- 建议动作: 用一个可丢弃 VM 跑小型开源目标；重点验证误报率、reachability trace 和成本上限是否可控。

### 3. Shopify/ucp-cli
- GitHub: https://github.com/Shopify/ucp-cli

- AI Native Product Score: 86/100
- 做什么: Universal Commerce Protocol 的 shopping skill CLI，让 agent 搜索商品、建购物车、进入 checkout、处理升级/handoff、追踪订单。

- AI native 点: CLI 输出全结构化 JSON，命令带 schema introspection、agent skill 包和 escalation hook，让 agent 可以按商家实时 schema 操作交易流程。

- 可运行性判断: README 提供 npm install -g、ucp skills add、profile init、catalog/cart/checkout/order 命令和开发 pnpm build/test/lint/typecheck。

### 4. cosmicflow-space/mnemos

  - 分类: Voice Notes RAG / macOS Knowledge Tool
  - Score: 68
  - 摘要: superwhisper + local vector/RAG 方向新项目，stars 低但场景清楚。
  - 建议动作: 等 README/安装流程/截图更完整。

- ogubuikeAlex/orra-rag-agent (https://github.com/ogubuikeAlex/orra-rag-agent)
  - 分类: Enterprise Hybrid RAG Agent
  - Score: 66
  - 摘要: RAGAS-evaluated hybrid RAG agent，新但产品面和用户场景仍需进一步确认。
  - 建议动作: 后续观察是否补齐 demo、deployment 和 UI/API。

## Skip Reasons
- AbhishekK130804/Claude-Mythos-AI-Anthropic-App (https://github.com/AbhishekK130804/Claude-Mythos-AI-Anthropic-App): 描述明显关键词堆砌，包含 download/free/jailbreak/reverse proxy 等营销/SEO 信号，虽然 stars 高但可信产品面弱。
- SihaoLiu/vibe-agentic-interview-notes (https://github.com/SihaoLiu/vibe-agentic-interview-notes): 内容/观点笔记，不是可运行 AI Native Product。
- ather-techie/rag-interview-questions (https://github.com/ather-techie/rag-interview-questions): RAG 面试资料/学习内容，不是产品或工具。
- ayush016/android-lead-agent-skills (https://github.com/ayush016/android-lead-agent-skills): skill/prompt collection，适合参考，不符合本雷达优先的可运行产品标准。

## 今日趋势观察
- 新项目开始明显围绕“agent 可执行性”补短板：小模型 coding agent、漏洞发现流水线、commerce skill、设备控制协议都不是单纯 chat UI。
- 个人 AI 基础设施继续升温：Engram 管身份/偏好，Mnemos 管本地知识，说明 memory/RAG 正从框架层走向个人工具层。
- MCP 正在分化为三个方向：上下文压缩（SDL-MCP）、垂直能力桥（DCP/Tauri）、企业治理网关（ThinkWatch）。
- 许多新仓库仍有 SEO 化、prompt collection 化倾向；今日筛选重点压低了“关键词很多但运行闭环弱”的项目。

## 关键假设
- GitHub stars/forks/issues/pushed_at 来自未认证 GitHub Search API 和仓库 README 检查；未使用付费趋势数据或精确 star delta。
- 排名不是绝对技术质量，而是今天窗口内的 AI Native Product 信号强度。
- 对硬件/安全类项目未实际执行外部目标或硬件测试；可运行性以 README 命令、仓库结构和测试/示例证据判断。

runs.dataWindow: 2026-05-16 to 2026-05-19 (GitHub recently visible activity, newly surfaced repositories, and current README/release evidence)
runs.sourceSummary: GitHub repository pages and READMEs were checked directly for stars, commits, issues/PRs, folders, quickstarts, demos, Docker/examples, and product surface. Web search was used for discovery because unauthenticated GitHub API deltas were not available in this run.
runs.trendObservations: Today shows a sharp move from generic agents toward agent operating layers: cross-agent memory, session capture, browser/desktop tool surfaces, markdown-native orchestration, and security gates for MCP-connected execution.
runs.assumptions: Scores favor runnable UI/CLI/API, clear user workflow, docs/install quality, active repository surface, and whether AI is central to the product path. GitHub visible stars/commits/issues are treated as current visibility signals, not exact 24-hour deltas. Repositories from the previous run were avoided unless they represented a distinct new signal.

# Daily AI Native Product Radar - 2026-05-19

数据观察窗口：2026-05-16 to 2026-05-19；生成时间：2026-05-19T10:37:10+08:00。

## Top Projects (10)

### 1. NousResearch/hermes-agent
- GitHub: https://github.com/NousResearch/hermes-agent
- 分类: Self-improving Agent / CLI + Messaging Gateway
- AI Native Product Score: 92/100
- 做什么: 自带学习循环的通用 agent，支持 CLI/TUI、消息网关、定时任务、记忆搜索、技能生成和多模型切换。
- 面向谁: 需要长期运行个人/团队 agent 的研究者、开发者和自动化团队。
- AI native 点: 记忆、技能、自我改进、跨会话连续性和多终端执行环境是产品主干，不只是功能点。
- 增长/活跃信号: GitHub 页面显示约 156k stars、25.2k forks、8,767 commits、4.2k issues、5k+ PRs。
- 可运行性判断: README 提供 Linux/macOS/WSL/Termux 一行安装、Windows PowerShell 安装、CLI 命令、gateway、tools/model 配置；仓库含 docker、docs、plugins、skills、web、tests。
- 建议动作: 作为“长期自主 agent OS”高优先级试跑；重点看记忆写入边界、技能自改机制和远程执行安全。

### 2. HKUDS/CLI-Anything
- GitHub: https://github.com/HKUDS/CLI-Anything
- 分类: Agent-native CLI Harness / Tool Runtime
- AI Native Product Score: 89/100
- 做什么: 把复杂软件和服务包装成 agent 可用的 CLI harness/skill，让 agent 操作 Blender、浏览器、GIS、媒体工具等外部软件。
- 面向谁: 需要让 coding/automation agent 稳定调用图形软件、专业工具和网站的工程团队。
- AI native 点: 目标不是给人写 CLI，而是把“所有软件 agent-ready”作为运行层抽象。
- 增长/活跃信号: GitHub 页面显示约 36.6k stars、3.6k forks、640 commits、38 issues、22 PRs；README 新闻区显示 2026-04 中旬仍在持续合并 harness。
- 可运行性判断: README 提供 CLI-Hub、demos、tests、`npx skills add HKUDS/CLI-Anything --skill <skill-name>` 形式安装；仓库含大量 agent-harness 与 skills。
- 建议动作: 放入“agent tool surface”横评；优先验证 2-3 个真实软件 harness 是否稳定可复现。

### 3. jackwener/OpenCLI
- GitHub: https://github.com/jackwener/OpenCLI
- 分类: Browser Agent Runtime / CLI Hub
- AI Native Product Score: 87/100
- 做什么: 把网站、登录态浏览器、Electron app 和本地二进制封装成统一 CLI，让 AI agent 用确定性命令操作真实工具。
- 面向谁: 需要自动化网页操作、私有登录态任务和桌面应用控制的 agent 开发者。
- AI native 点: 为 Claude Code、Cursor 等 agent 提供 browser skill、adapter authoring、DOM 快照、点击/填写/抽取等低层操作面。
- 增长/活跃信号: GitHub 页面显示约 21.7k stars、2.2k forks、1,227 commits、36 issues、60 PRs。
- 可运行性判断: README 提供 npm 全局安装、Chrome extension、`opencli doctor`、browser/profile/list 等命令，以及 skills 安装方式。
- 建议动作: 试做一个需要登录态的网站任务，比较它和 Playwright/MCP/browser-use 的稳定性和可审计性。

### 4. thedotmack/claude-mem
- GitHub: https://github.com/thedotmack/claude-mem
- 分类: Cross-agent Memory / Session Continuity
- AI Native Product Score: 86/100
- 做什么: 捕获 agent 会话，压缩成长期上下文，并在未来会话中注入相关记忆；覆盖 Claude Code、Codex、Gemini、Copilot、OpenCode 等。
- 面向谁: 长期使用 coding agents、希望跨工具保留项目上下文和决策记录的开发者。
- AI native 点: 把 agent 会话本身当成可索引、可召回、可注入的产品数据层。
- 增长/活跃信号: GitHub 页面显示约 76.6k stars、6.6k forks、1,899 commits、82 issues、44 PRs。
- 可运行性判断: 仓库含 `.codex-plugin`、`.claude-plugin`、docker、docs、plugin、ragtime、tests、transcript-watch 示例。
- 建议动作: 重点试一次真实项目的多日任务；关注隐私、压缩质量、召回污染和跨 agent 格式兼容。

### 5. entireio/cli
- GitHub: https://github.com/entireio/cli
- 分类: Agent Session Capture / Git Workflow
- AI Native Product Score: 84/100
- 做什么: 挂进 Git 工作流，捕获 AI agent 会话，把 checkpoint 和 commits 索引到一起，形成“代码为何这样写”的可搜索记录。
- 面向谁: 使用多个 coding agents 的工程团队、代码审查者和需要可追溯 AI 开发过程的组织。
- AI native 点: 不是写代码 agent，而是给 agent 产出的工程过程补上 session provenance、rewind、explain、resume。
- 增长/活跃信号: GitHub 页面显示约 4.3k stars、335 forks、4,367 commits、65 issues、67 PRs。
- 可运行性判断: README 命令参考包含 `entire enable`、`entire checkpoint explain/rewind/search`、`entire session resume/attach`、`entire agent`；仓库含 `.codex`、`.claude`、`.gemini`、`.opencode` 集成目录。
- 建议动作: 与团队现有 git hook/PR review 流程做小规模试点，看是否能降低 agent 产出审查成本。

### 6. massgen/MassGen
- GitHub: https://github.com/massgen/MassGen
- 分类: Multi-agent Terminal Orchestrator
- AI Native Product Score: 82/100
- 做什么: 终端中的多 agent scaling 系统，编排多个 frontier model/agent 协作、推理、产出结果。
- 面向谁: 需要多模型互评、多 agent 规划/写作/代码任务的高级用户和研发团队。
- AI native 点: 把“多个 agent 并行协作”产品化成 TUI/CLI workflow，并支持作为技能接入其他 coding agent。
- 增长/活跃信号: GitHub 页面显示约 1k stars、160 forks、3,882 commits、1 issue、2 PRs。
- 可运行性判断: README 提供 `pip install massgen`、`uv run massgen --setup`、`uv run massgen --quickstart`，可选择 1-5 个 agent、模型后端和 Docker 执行模式。
- 建议动作: 用同一复杂任务对比单 agent 与 MassGen 的成本/质量/延迟，重点观察冲突消解机制。

### 7. sattyamjjain/agent-audit-kit
- GitHub: https://github.com/sattyamjjain/agent-audit-kit
- 分类: Agent Security Scanner / GitHub Action + CLI
- AI Native Product Score: 79/100
- 做什么: 面向 MCP-connected AI agent pipeline 的静态扫描器，覆盖 194 条规则、11 类风险、多个合规框架、SARIF 和 GitHub Action。
- 面向谁: 正在把 agent 接入 MCP、CI/CD、工具调用和生产环境的安全/平台团队。
- AI native 点: 直接把 agentic workflow 的配置、MCP 风险、hook 外传、权限问题纳入安全扫描。
- 增长/活跃信号: GitHub 页面显示约 111 commits、21 issues、2 PRs；虽然 stars 低，但产品形态和风险主题非常贴近当前 MCP 安全缺口。
- 可运行性判断: README 提供 GitHub Action、`pip install agent-audit-kit`、`agent-audit-kit scan .`、pre-commit hook 和 vulnerable examples。
- 建议动作: 进入安全 watch+试跑；先扫描一个真实 MCP/agent repo，验证误报率和规则覆盖。

### 8. mvar-security/mvar
- GitHub: https://github.com/mvar-security/mvar
- 分类: Agent Runtime Security / Execution Firewall
- AI Native Product Score: 78/100
- 做什么: 为 LLM agent runtime 提供确定性执行防火墙，使用信息流控制和 provenance 约束高权限工具调用。
- 面向谁: 构建可执行 shell/API/文件/凭据操作 agent 的平台与安全团队。
- AI native 点: 不靠 prompt filter 或 LLM judge，而是在执行 sink 处做策略拦截，是 agent runtime 治理方向。
- 增长/活跃信号: GitHub 页面显示约 172 commits、3 issues、4 PRs；stars 很低但文档、proof、demo、adapter、threat model 齐全。
- 可运行性判断: README 提供 `pip install mvar-security`、30-second proof、quickstart、Claude Code production-ready adapter、tests 和 proof scripts。
- 建议动作: 作为早期安全基础设施观察；优先验证是否能嵌入 Claude Code / OpenAI Agents / MCP 工具链。

### 9. charannyk06/conductor-oss
- GitHub: https://github.com/charannyk06/conductor-oss
- 分类: Coding Agent Orchestrator / Local Dashboard
- AI Native Product Score: 77/100
- 做什么: 本地优先的 AI coding agent 编排层，用 dashboard 管理 repo/workspace、git worktrees、真实 terminal、diff、preview、retry 和 reviewer feedback。
- 面向谁: 同时运行 Claude Code、Codex、Gemini 等 coding CLI 的个人和团队。
- AI native 点: 把 Markdown/kanban/task board 变成 agent 任务编排界面，输出 PR 和更新 board 状态。
- 增长/活跃信号: GitHub 页面显示约 30 stars、3 forks、1,238 commits、2 issues、8 PRs；早期但工程量和产品面完整。
- 可运行性判断: 仓库含 install.sh、docker-compose、desktop/dashboard 相关 packages、runtime-sidecar、docs、tests、security review。
- 建议动作: 放 Watch-to-try 边界；如果本地多 agent 协作是重点，可以先跑 demo dashboard。

### 10. firecrawl/open-lovable
- GitHub: https://github.com/firecrawl/open-lovable
- 分类: AI App Builder / Website-to-React
- AI Native Product Score: 75/100
- 做什么: 用聊天把任意网站克隆/重建成现代 React app 的示例应用。
- 面向谁: 需要快速生成前端原型、复刻页面结构、测试 Firecrawl+LLM app builder 的开发者。
- AI native 点: 把 web extraction、LLM 生成和 React 项目生成连成可运行产品流程。
- 增长/活跃信号: GitHub 页面显示约 26.4k stars、5k forks、59 commits、95 issues、38 PRs。
- 可运行性判断: README 提供 clone/install/env setup，仓库含 Next app、components、hooks、create package、env example。
- 建议动作: 作为 AI app builder 方向样本；重点验证生成质量、可维护性和 Firecrawl API 依赖成本。

## Watchlist (4)

- Fosowl/agenticSeek (https://github.com/Fosowl/agenticSeek)
  - 分类: Local Autonomous Agent
  - Score: 73
  - 摘要: 本地 agent，覆盖浏览、代码和本地/云模型 provider；GitHub 页面显示约 26.4k stars、944 commits。
  - 建议动作: 等待本轮外更强 release/产品信号；适合进入 local agent 基线观察。

- holaboss-ai/holaOS (https://github.com/holaboss-ai/holaOS)
  - 分类: Agent Workspace OS
  - Score: 72
  - 摘要: 把重复工作转成运行中的 AI work-stream，含 desktop、runtime、SDK、docs 和一行安装；GitHub 页面显示约 5.6k stars、548 commits。
  - 建议动作: 关注 workspace/memory/continuity 模型是否形成可复用 agent OS 形态。

- mvar-security/clawzero (https://github.com/mvar-security/clawzero)
  - 分类: Agent Execution Firewall
  - Score: 70
  - 摘要: 与 MVAR 配套的执行防火墙方向，适合观察 agent runtime security 是否从 demo 走向真实集成。
  - 建议动作: 等更多 adapter 与独立用户案例后再提升到 Top。

- NirDiamant/agents-towards-production (https://github.com/NirDiamant/agents-towards-production)
  - 分类: Production Agent Tutorial / Examples
  - Score: 68
  - 摘要: code-first production agent 教程，内容有用，但更像教程体系而非独立产品。
  - 建议动作: 做学习参考，不作为产品雷达主项。

## Skip Reasons
- humanlayer/12-factor-agents (https://github.com/humanlayer/12-factor-agents): 高质量生产 agent 原则文档，影响力强，但核心是内容/方法论，不是可运行产品。
- microsoft/ai-agents-for-beginners (https://github.com/microsoft/ai-agents-for-beginners): 教程/课程型仓库，适合学习，不符合本雷达优先的产品形态。
- modelcontextprotocol/servers (https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers): MCP server 集合/参考实现，价值高但不是单一产品；适合作为生态索引，不适合作为 Top 项目。

## 今日趋势观察
- Agent 产品开始补“操作系统层”：记忆、会话、workspace、gateway、scheduler、tool runtime 都在成为独立产品。
- 浏览器和桌面控制正在 CLI 化/skill 化：OpenCLI、CLI-Anything 代表把 GUI 和网站变成 agent 可审计执行面。
- MCP/agent 安全从理念进入工具：AgentAuditKit、MVAR 这类项目说明“prompt injection 到执行 sink”的问题正在被产品化处理。
- Coding agent 的下一层机会不是再造一个聊天框，而是记录、恢复、解释、审计和编排多个 agent 的工作过程。

## 关键假设
- 本轮没有认证 GitHub API star delta；增长信号以 GitHub 当前可见 stars/commits/issues/PRs、README 更新痕迹和搜索发现新鲜度为主。
- Score 是 AI Native Product Score，不是代码质量或公司质量分；低 stars 但具备明确 agent-native 产品面的安全/治理项目可入选。
- 与 2026-05-18 已覆盖的 opencode、Claude Code、Gemini CLI、n8n、Agno、Context7 等项目尽量不重复入 Top。

runs.dataWindow: 2026-05-15 to 2026-05-18 (strict recent release/update window), with OSSInsight/GitHub current visibility used as secondary growth signal
runs.sourceSummary: GitHub repository pages and READMEs for runnable evidence; GitHub visible stars/releases/issues/PRs; OSSInsight collection pages for broad current ranking context. Shell curl remained blocked, so no authenticated GitHub API delta export was used.
runs.trendObservations: This rerun shows a cleaner pattern: terminal coding agents are now full products with installers, desktop variants, IDE modes and MCP; MCP is becoming a first-class integration layer; and production agent platforms are adding governance primitives such as tracing, RBAC, human approval, memory and scheduling.
runs.assumptions: Score favors runnable product surface, recent release/update or strong current growth visibility, clear user workflow, docs/install quality, and whether AI is central to the product path. Big incumbent projects can rank if their current release/activity signal is strong, but pure SDKs, prompt packs, paper repos and resource lists are downgraded.

# Daily AI Native Product Radar - 2026-05-18 (rerun)

数据观察窗口：2026-05-15 to 2026-05-18；补充参考 OSSInsight/GitHub 当前可见度。
生成时间：2026-05-18T10:31:05+08:00

## Top Projects (10)

### 1. anomalyco/opencode
- GitHub: https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode
- 分类: Coding Agent / Terminal + Desktop
- AI Native Product Score: 92/100
- 做什么: 开源 AI coding agent，提供终端 UI、安装器、桌面 beta、内置 build/plan agent 和多语言 README。
- 面向谁: 希望在本地仓库中用 agent 做代码修改、探索、计划和执行的工程师与团队。
- AI native 点: agent 不是插件，而是主界面；内置可切换权限模式，覆盖终端、桌面和工程工作流。
- 增长/活跃信号: GitHub 页面显示约 162k stars、13k+ commits、806 releases，最新 release v1.15.4 标注 2026-05-17。
- 可运行性判断: README 提供 curl installer、npm、brew、Windows、Arch、Nix 等安装方式；桌面 beta 有 release 下载。
- 建议动作: 最高优先级试跑；重点看 plan/build 权限边界、长任务恢复、MCP/工具接入和团队协作可控性。

### 2. anthropics/claude-code
- GitHub: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code
- 分类: Coding Agent / Terminal Product
- AI Native Product Score: 91/100
- 做什么: 终端里的 agentic coding tool，理解代码库、执行常规任务、解释复杂代码并处理 git workflow。
- 面向谁: 已在 Claude 生态工作的工程团队、独立开发者、代码审查/维护场景。
- AI native 点: 以自然语言驱动 repo 级任务，并包含插件目录、examples、bug report 命令和安装脚本。
- 增长/活跃信号: GitHub 页面显示约 124k stars、5k+ issues、542 PRs、625 commits；仓库含 demo.gif、plugins、examples。
- 可运行性判断: README 推荐 curl 安装脚本、Homebrew、Windows install.ps1/WinGet；进入项目目录运行 `claude`。
- 建议动作: 跟 opencode/Codex/Gemini CLI 做同仓库对比；重点评估插件生态和权限/审计体验。

### 3. google-gemini/gemini-cli
- GitHub: https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli
- 分类: Coding Agent / CLI + GitHub Action
- AI Native Product Score: 90/100
- 做什么: 把 Gemini 带进终端的开源 AI agent，支持代码理解、生成、调试、自动化和 GitHub workflow。
- 面向谁: Google/Gemini 用户、需要大上下文和搜索 grounding 的开发者团队。
- AI native 点: 内置 Google Search grounding、文件/命令/web fetch 工具、MCP 扩展、checkpointing 和 GitHub Action。
- 增长/活跃信号: GitHub 页面显示约 104k stars、6,175 commits、494 releases；README 写明每周 preview/stable、每日 nightly 发布节奏。
- 可运行性判断: 支持 npx 即跑、npm 全局安装、Homebrew、MacPorts、Conda；可用 Google OAuth 或 API key。
- 建议动作: 重点试用非交互脚本模式和 GitHub Action，用于 issue triage/PR review 自动化。

### 4. aaif-goose/goose
- GitHub: https://github.com/aaif-goose/goose
- 分类: General-purpose Agent / Desktop + CLI + API
- AI Native Product Score: 89/100
- 做什么: 本机运行的通用 AI agent，提供桌面 app、CLI 和 API，用于代码、研究、写作、自动化与数据分析。
- 面向谁: 想把多模型、多扩展、本地执行统一起来的个人和团队。
- AI native 点: 支持 15+ provider、70+ MCP extensions、ACP；产品面覆盖桌面、终端、嵌入 API。
- 增长/活跃信号: GitHub 页面显示约 45.4k stars、134 releases，最新 v1.34.1 标注 2026-05-15；项目迁入 Linux Foundation AAIF。
- 可运行性判断: README 提供桌面 app 下载和 CLI 安装脚本；文档含 quickstart、installation、tutorials。
- 建议动作: 用作“通用本地 agent 基线”评测；关注 MCP extension 管理和多 provider 切换体验。

### 5. n8n-io/n8n
- GitHub: https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n
- 分类: AI Workflow Automation / Low-code Platform
- AI Native Product Score: 88/100
- 做什么: 面向技术团队的 workflow automation 平台，集成 400+ connectors、AI agent workflows、LangChain、本地/云部署。
- 面向谁: 运营、增长、工程平台、内部自动化和企业集成团队。
- AI native 点: AI agent workflow 已嵌入可视化自动化平台，并可结合代码节点、集成、模板与自托管。
- 增长/活跃信号: GitHub 页面显示约 188k stars、625 releases，最新 stable 标注 2026-05-15。
- 可运行性判断: README 提供 `npx n8n` 和 Docker 快速启动，访问本地编辑器 `localhost:5678`。
- 建议动作: 作为 AI workflow 产品基线；评估 MCP server/client、新 AI nodes、模板质量和企业权限。

### 6. github/github-mcp-server
- GitHub: https://github.com/github/github-mcp-server
- 分类: MCP Server / Developer Workflow Integration
- AI Native Product Score: 86/100
- 做什么: GitHub 官方 MCP server，让 AI tools 读 repo、管理 issues/PR、分析 Actions、处理 workflow。
- 面向谁: 需要把 GitHub 上下文和操作能力接给 Copilot、Claude、Codex、Cursor、Windsurf 的开发团队。
- AI native 点: 把 GitHub 的工程上下文变成 agent 可调用工具面，是 coding agent 生产化的基础设施。
- 增长/活跃信号: GitHub 页面显示约 29.9k stars、831 commits、185 issues、149 PRs；README 覆盖 remote/local MCP 方案。
- 可运行性判断: 支持 VS Code one-click/JSON 配置、remote MCP URL、Docker local server、PAT/OAuth 配置。
- 建议动作: 立即纳入内部 agent 工具链；重点做 token scope、审计和 toolset 白名单策略。

### 7. upstash/context7
- GitHub: https://github.com/upstash/context7
- 分类: MCP Docs / LLM Context Tool
- AI Native Product Score: 85/100
- 做什么: 为 coding agents 提供最新代码文档和示例，支持 CLI+Skills 与 MCP server 两种模式。
- 面向谁: 使用 Cursor、Claude Code、Codex、opencode 等 coding agent 的开发者。
- AI native 点: 直接解决 LLM 代码生成依赖过时文档的问题，把 docs retrieval 做成 agent 原生工具。
- 增长/活跃信号: GitHub 页面显示约 55.5k stars、74 releases，最新 ctx7@0.4.2 标注 2026-05-11；MCP 生态传播强。
- 可运行性判断: README 提供 `npx ctx7 setup`，可自动生成 API key 并安装 skill/MCP；也支持手动 MCP URL。
- 建议动作: 接入一个真实 coding agent 测试一周；观察是否减少 hallucinated API 和版本错误。

### 8. agno-agi/agno
- GitHub: https://github.com/agno-agi/agno
- 分类: Agent Platform SDK + Control Plane
- AI Native Product Score: 84/100
- 做什么: 用于构建、运行和管理 agent platforms 的 SDK/平台层，支持 tracing、scheduling、RBAC、human approval、memory、toolkits 和 UI。
- 面向谁: 正在把 agent 做成生产服务的平台团队和 AI 应用团队。
- AI native 点: 从“写一个 agent”提升到“管理一个 agent 平台”，把权限、审计、运行、接口和部署纳入核心。
- 增长/活跃信号: GitHub 页面显示约 40.2k stars、5,564 commits、190 releases，最新 v2.6.7 标注 2026-05-15。
- 可运行性判断: README 链接 docs、20 行 first agent、auto-improving platform 示例；可部署到容器环境。
- 建议动作: 研究其生产 API、human approval 和 observability 设计，判断是否适合作为内部 agent backend。

### 9. mem0ai/mem0
- GitHub: https://github.com/mem0ai/mem0
- 分类: Agent Memory Layer / Self-hosted + Cloud
- AI Native Product Score: 82/100
- 做什么: AI assistant/agent 的通用记忆层，支持用户/会话/agent 多层记忆、SDK、CLI、自托管 server 和 cloud。
- 面向谁: 做客服、个人助理、长期任务 agent、自动化系统的团队。
- AI native 点: 把“长期记忆”做成独立基础设施，直接影响 agent personalization 和跨会话连续性。
- 增长/活跃信号: GitHub 页面显示约 56k stars、319 releases，最新 @mem0/cli v0.2.5 标注 2026-05-14；README 强调 April 2026 新记忆算法。
- 可运行性判断: CLI quickstart、pip/npm SDK、自托管 Docker compose、server bootstrap 和 dashboard 路径都明确。
- 建议动作: 放入 memory layer 横评；重点测召回质量、隐私边界、自托管复杂度和 agent-owned API key 模式。

### 10. openai/codex
- GitHub: https://github.com/openai/codex
- 分类: Coding Agent / CLI + Desktop App Entry
- AI Native Product Score: 81/100
- 做什么: 本地运行的轻量 coding agent，支持 CLI、IDE 入口和 `codex app` 桌面体验。
- 面向谁: OpenAI/ChatGPT 用户、需要在本地工程中运行 coding agent 的开发者。
- AI native 点: 以本地 agent 执行代码任务为核心，连接 ChatGPT 计划或 API key，覆盖 CLI/IDE/桌面入口。
- 增长/活跃信号: GitHub 页面显示约 83.3k stars、6,580 commits、789 releases；最新 release 显示 2026-05-08，严格 release 时间不在 72h 内，但当前关注度和产品面强。
- 可运行性判断: README 提供 npm、Homebrew、GitHub release binary；运行 `codex` 即可开始。
- 建议动作: 保持在基线组，与 opencode/Claude Code/Gemini CLI 做同任务对比。

## Watchlist (4)

- browser-use/browser-use (https://github.com/browser-use/browser-use)
  - 分类: Browser Agent Framework / Cloud Product
  - Score: 75
  - 摘要: 浏览器自动化 agent 代表项目，GitHub 页面显示约 94.3k stars、9,212 commits；但最新 release 显示 2026-04-02，本轮放 Watchlist 而非 Top。
  - 建议动作: 关注 cloud 产品化、stealth/scaling 能力和与 MCP/coding agent 的集成。

- HKUDS/RAG-Anything (https://github.com/HKUDS/RAG-Anything)
  - 分类: Multimodal RAG Framework
  - Score: 73
  - 摘要: 多模态 RAG 方向热度高，但偏 framework/research，需要确认产品 demo 和真实用户工作流。
  - 建议动作: 若文档解析/RAG 是主线，观察是否出现可运行 UI/API 服务。

- getzep/graphiti (https://github.com/getzep/graphiti)
  - 分类: Temporal Knowledge Graph / Agent Memory
  - Score: 72
  - 摘要: agent memory/knowledge graph 方向重要，适合作为 mem0 的架构对照。
  - 建议动作: 关注 temporal graph 建模、实时更新和生产部署路径。

- langflow-ai/langflow (https://github.com/langflow-ai/langflow)
  - 分类: Visual Agent/RAG Builder
  - Score: 71
  - 摘要: 可视化 AI workflow/RAG builder 仍值得跟踪，但本轮没有比 n8n/Agno 更强的新信号。
  - 建议动作: 放入可视化 builder 横评，比较模板、部署、权限和 connector 生态。

## Skip Reasons
- openai/openai-agents-python (https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python): 高质量 SDK，但更像 agent framework，不是这轮优先的独立产品面。
- modelcontextprotocol/servers (https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers): MCP server 集合/参考实现，价值高但不是单一可运行产品。
- microsoft/autogen (https://github.com/microsoft/autogen): 重要多 agent framework，但本轮更优先保留具备清晰 UI/CLI/API 产品闭环的项目。

## 今日趋势观察
- Coding agent 已进入“产品军备竞赛”：CLI 只是入口，桌面 app、IDE、插件、MCP、GitHub Action、权限模式才是差异化。
- MCP 从“能接工具”变成“必须有治理”：GitHub MCP Server、Context7 这类项目会成为 coding agent 默认配件。
- 生产 agent 平台开始补齐 boring-but-critical 能力：RBAC、tracing、human approval、memory、scheduling、audit logs。
- AI workflow 平台正在吃掉一部分 agent builder 需求：n8n 这种原本的自动化平台通过 AI nodes/MCP/模板快速变成 agent 产品入口。

## 关键假设
- 严格窗口按 2026-05-15 至 2026-05-18；若 release 不在窗口内，但当前增长/关注度/可运行产品面非常强，会降低分数但仍可能入选。
- GitHub 页面可见的 stars/issues/PRs/releases 是本轮主要事实来源；没有使用未认证 GitHub API 计算精确 24h star delta。
- 分数是 AI Native Product Score，不是代码质量分；优先可运行产品、真实工作流和 AI 是否处在核心路径。

runs.dataWindow: 2026-05-12 to 2026-05-15 (past 72h), GitHub recently updated + trending AI/agent-runtime repositories
runs.sourceSummary: GitHub Topics (agent-runtime), GitHub Trending, GitHub Repository READMEs
runs.trendObservations: This window shows agent runtimes becoming "product-shaped": self-hosted dashboards, sandboxes, and governance firewalls; MCP is treated as the default tool surface; and shipping focuses on install scripts / one-command demos over code libraries.
runs.assumptions: Score favors runnable product surfaces (UI/CLI/API) with quickstart/demo/docker and clear user scenario; penalize skill/prompt collections and paper reproductions. Activity signals use GitHub topic "Updated" dates and visible stars/releases.
runs.markdownReport:
# Daily AI Native Product Radar - 2026-05-15

数据观察窗口：2026-05-12 to 2026-05-15 (past 72h), GitHub recently updated + trending AI/agent-runtime repositories
生成时间：2026-05-15T09:13:44+08:00

## Top Projects (8)

### 1. crabtalk/crabtalk
- GitHub: https://github.com/crabtalk/crabtalk
- 分类: Agent Runtime (Daemon + TUI)
- AI Native Product Score: 88/100
- 做什么: 一个“隐藏不了任何东西”的 agent daemon：跑 agent、调工具、接 MCP server，并提供 TUI/daemon/apps 分层。
- 面向谁: 想要自建可观测 agent runtime 的开发者/团队。
- AI native 点: 把 agent 当成常驻服务：daemon + 可插拔 packages + MCP 工具面，强调可观测与扩展。
- 增长/活跃信号: agent-runtime topic 显示近期更新（May 13, 2026）；仓库 Star ~660；有多个 release。
- 可运行性判断: 提供 install.sh 一键安装；Quick Start 用 cargo/crabup 拉取 daemon+tui 并启动。
- 建议动作: 本地跑一遍 quick start；重点评估 daemon 配置/插件模型与 MCP 连接体验。

### 2. swarmclawai/swarmclaw
- GitHub: https://github.com/swarmclawai/swarmclaw
- 分类: Self-hosted Agent Orchestration (Dashboard)
- AI Native Product Score: 86/100
- 做什么: 自托管多 agent runtime/框架：编排、委派、日程、记忆、MCP 工具，带 dashboard/截图/桌面端下载。
- 面向谁: 需要“平台式”多 agent 协作与可视化运维的团队。
- AI native 点: 把多 agent 组织结构、长记忆与工具接入做成产品（dashboard + 安装器 + docker）。
- 增长/活跃信号: agent-runtime topic 显示近期更新（May 13, 2026）；Star ~482；README 含截图与安装方案。
- 可运行性判断: 支持 npm 全局安装启动本地服务；也提供 docker compose；还有桌面端下载入口。
- 建议动作: 优先用 docker compose 起一个实例；验证组织结构视图/权限与工具接入。

### 3. runtm-ai/runtm
- GitHub: https://github.com/runtm-ai/runtm
- 分类: Agent Sandbox (Local + Deploy)
- AI Native Product Score: 84/100
- 做什么: 给 coding agents 的隔离沙箱：本地 session + 部署到可访问 URL，带日志与可观测性。
- 面向谁: 用 Claude Code/Codex/Cursor 等做“有权限但需隔离”的工程团队/个人。
- AI native 点: 把 agent 的危险动作（写文件/跑命令/部署）放到隔离环境里，产品核心是 sandbox/session/deploy。
- 增长/活跃信号: README 给出 uv tool 安装与 session start/deploy；也提供自托管 docker compose；Star ~118。
- 可运行性判断: CLI quick start（uv tool install + runtm session start/deploy）；自托管需 docker compose。
- 建议动作: 先在本机走通 session start + deploy 的 happy path；再评估自托管成本。

### 4. skrun-dev/skrun
- GitHub: https://github.com/skrun-dev/skrun
- 分类: Agent Skill → API Runtime (+ Dashboard)
- AI Native Product Score: 83/100
- 做什么: 把任意“agent skill”变成 `POST /run` API 的开源 runtime，并自带 operator dashboard 与 SDK。
- 面向谁: 想把 agent 能力做成可集成 API 的独立开发者/小团队/交付方。
- AI native 点: 把“agent loop + 工具/MCP + 观测”平台化，用户只交付 skill，本体提供运行时与可视化运维。
- 增长/活跃信号: README 有 Quick Start（npm 全局安装 + skrun deploy）和 dashboard 介绍；Release v0.7.0 标注 May 12, 2026；Star ~170。
- 可运行性判断: npm install -g 后可本地启动并通过 curl 调用；dashboard 位于 /dashboard。
- 建议动作: 找一个现有 skill 试着 skrun init/deploy；评估 auth/BYOK 与可观测性数据结构。

### 5. FonaTech/Clouds-Coder
- GitHub: https://github.com/FonaTech/Clouds-Coder
- 分类: Coding Agent Platform (CLI exec plane × Web UI)
- AI Native Product Score: 82/100
- 做什么: 本地优先 coding agent 平台：把 CLI 执行面与 Web 交互面分离，强调长任务恢复、可观测与 Skills Studio。
- 面向谁: 需要“可分发、可恢复”的 vibe-coding 工作台的个人/团队。
- AI native 点: 把长任务可靠性（timeout/truncation/anti-drift/recovery）当成一等能力，而不只是一个脚本集合。
- 增长/活跃信号: agent-runtime topic 显示近期更新（May 10, 2026）；Star ~475；提供 PyPI 安装入口与 UI 端口。
- 可运行性判断: pip 安装后 `clouds-coder` 启动，默认提供 Agent UI 与 Skills Studio。
- 建议动作: 本地装 PyPI 版本起服务；重点体验恢复机制与 Skills Studio 的交互闭环。

### 6. ucsandman/DashClaw
- GitHub: https://github.com/ucsandman/DashClaw
- 分类: Agent Governance / Policy Firewall
- AI Native Product Score: 80/100
- 做什么: AI agent 的决策/审批基础设施：拦截动作、执行策略、要求审批、产出可审计决策轨迹，并提供回放 UI。
- 面向谁: 需要 HITL 审批/审计/政策控制的 agent 产品与企业团队。
- AI native 点: 把 agent 行动治理做成“防火墙式产品”，核心是可审计的 decision trail 与回放。
- 增长/活跃信号: 仓库 Star ~257；提供 npx demo 一分钟体验与完整本地环境 quick start。
- 可运行性判断: 可直接 `npx dashclaw-demo` 启动 demo 并打开浏览器回放；也可 clone + npm run dev。
- 建议动作: 先跑 npx demo；若契合，用本地完整环境把一个真实 agent 接入 governance loop。

### 7. holon-run/holon
- GitHub: https://github.com/holon-run/holon
- 分类: Local-first Agent Runtime (Long-running tasks)
- AI Native Product Score: 78/100
- 做什么: 面向本地工作区的长运行 agent runtime：任务/唤醒/daemon/队列/状态等原语，CLI 可 one-shot 或 serve。
- 面向谁: 需要“跨时间持续工作”的本地 agent 执行层的开发者/团队。
- AI native 点: 把 agent 的“持续性”和“边界/信任/状态”建模为 runtime 原语，而不是单次聊天。
- 增长/活跃信号: agent-runtime topic 显示近期更新（May 12, 2026）；Star ~85；README 有安装与核心命令示例。
- 可运行性判断: cargo install 或 brew 安装；提供 holon run/serve/daemon/tui 等命令。
- 建议动作: 用一个真实 repo 做 holon run + holon serve；评估任务/唤醒模型是否可对接你现有自动化。

### 8. rohitg00/agentmemory
- GitHub: https://github.com/rohitg00/agentmemory
- 分类: Agent Memory Server (MCP + Viewer)
- AI Native Product Score: 77/100
- 做什么: 给 coding agents 的持久化记忆服务：提供 server + MCP + 实时 viewer/回放，并可导入历史会话。
- 面向谁: 使用多种 coding agent 的个人/团队（Claude Code/Cursor/Codex 等）希望统一“记忆层”。
- AI native 点: 把“记忆/检索/回放”做成独立产品面（server + viewer + MCP tools），能跨不同 agent 宿主复用。
- 增长/活跃信号: 仓库 Star ~8.9k；README 提供 30 秒 npx 启动与 demo；并给出各宿主的 MCP 配置块。
- 可运行性判断: npx 启动 server 与 demo，打开本地 viewer 端口观察记忆构建。
- 建议动作: 先跑 npx demo；如果效果好，接入你常用的一个 agent 宿主做一周试用。

## Watchlist (3)

- tinyhumansai/openhuman (https://github.com/tinyhumansai/openhuman)
  - 分类: Desktop AI Assistant (UI-first, integrations, voice)
  - Score: 74
  - 摘要: 桌面端个人 AI 助手（UI-first），强调本地数据/记忆树 + 大量第三方集成 + 原生语音能力。
  - 面向谁: 想要“日常工作流助手 + 连接器 + 语音”的个人用户。
  - AI native 点: 把多连接器、持续拉取、记忆树与本地 SQLite 作为默认形态，偏“产品”而非库。
  - 信号: 仓库 Star ~7.6k；README 提供 install.sh/ps1 安装；标注 Early Beta。
  - 可运行性: 提供 install.sh/ps1 脚本与官网安装；仓库结构较大，需进一步确认最小可运行路径。
  - 建议动作: 关注其最小可运行路径与隐私/权限模型；有空在隔离环境试装。

- CelestoAI/SmolVM (https://github.com/CelestoAI/SmolVM)
  - 分类: Sandbox Infra (Code execution / browser use)
  - Score: 71
  - 摘要: 面向 AI agent 的沙箱基础设施（代码执行、browser use 等），偏底层组件。
  - 建议动作: 若你在做 agent 执行隔离/浏览器沙箱，可跟进其架构与接口稳定性。

- trustgraph-ai/trustgraph (https://github.com/trustgraph-ai/trustgraph)
  - 分类: Context Graph / Agent Runtime Platform
  - Score: 70
  - 摘要: 以 context graph 为核心的 agent runtime 平台，适合做更系统化的“上下文操作系统”。
  - 建议动作: 若你在做 RAG→Graph 化或上下文工程，建议深入其数据模型与查询层。

## Skip Reasons
- 纯 skills/prompt collection（没有独立可运行产品面）
- 纯论文复现/训练代码/benchmark-only
- 只有 README 缺少可运行代码或 demo 的营销仓库

## 今日趋势观察
- This window shows agent runtimes becoming "product-shaped": self-hosted dashboards, sandboxes, and governance firewalls; MCP is treated as the default tool surface; and shipping focuses on install scripts / one-command demos over code libraries.
- 这 72 小时内，‘Agent Runtime’ 的差异化更多来自：sandbox、governance、可观测性与一键可运行，而不是再造一个 SDK。

## 关键假设
- Score favors runnable product surfaces (UI/CLI/API) with quickstart/demo/docker and clear user scenario; penalize skill/prompt collections and paper reproductions. Activity signals use GitHub topic "Updated" dates and visible stars/releases.
- 由于未使用 GitHub API（rate/auth），活跃度以 topic 页面 ‘Updated’、仓库 stars/releases/quickstart 作为近似信号。

runs.trendObservations: AI coding agent management tools are moving from single-agent assistants toward decks, workflow orchestration, context sync, eval gating, trust consoles, MCP-based code intelligence, and desktop-control agents.
